title: Cyberpunk Game Trailer Sequence
description: An incredibly detailed prompt for a game trailer sequence including character design, UI interactions, and environment transitions from a white void to a cyberpunk city.
content:
INK INDUSTRIES : GAME TRAILER
CHARACTERYoung athletic male, dark curly hair, shirtless, full chest and back tattoos, gold hoop earring, cigarette in mouth, black cybernetic prosthetic arms with cyan LED nodes at joints. Black shorts with white stripe, white socks, beige chunky sneakers. Seated cross-legged on white void floor.
CINEMATIC SETUPOpens on clean white void environment with minimal game UI. Camera high angle looking down at character. Hyper-realistic CGI rendering, clean white background transitioning to dense cyberpunk favela environment.
SEQUENCE [0s–15s]
[0s–2s] High angle shot looking down. Character seated on white floor, looking up at camera with cigarette smoke rising. Game menu UI on left: START NEW GAME, CONTINUE highlighted, SETTINGS, EXIT GAME. Player profile top right showing INK_NOMAD LVL 23. A cursor clicks CONTINUE. The button pulses. Subtle bass hit.
[2s–4s] Smooth zoom-in toward his left arm. UI panels slide in from left LEFT ARM EQUIPMENT panel appears. Selection highlights PHANTOM GRIP, then slides to CHRONOS CLAW. His left hand mechanically reconfigures fingers split apart, new claw-like digits lock into place, cyan LEDs pulse brighter. Stats bars animate on right panel. Servo click sounds.
[4s–7s] Camera orbits smoothly around to his right side. New UI slides in ARMAMENT CUSTOMIZATION grid showing HAND, FOREARM, ELBOW, UPPER ARM components. Selection cycles through parts rapidly. His right arm disassembles section by section forearm plates detach, new plating slides on, elbow joint swaps, hand reconfigures with exposed wiring and pistons visible mid-swap. Each component locks with a mechanical snap. Tech Points counter ticks up.
[7s–8.5s] Camera pulls back to medium shot. CONFIRM CONFIG button pulses. Click. All UI panels collapse inward. Character uncrosses legs, shifts position, now sitting relaxed, one knee up, cybernetic hand bringing cigarette to mouth. Smoke curls.
[8.5s–10s] LOADING bar appears at bottom. Fills rapidly 0 to 100%. White environment begins darkening shadows creep in from edges, warm golden light bleeds through. The white void dissolves like fog burning off. Character starts standing up in one fluid motion.
[10s–15s] Full environment loads around him as he rises to his feet. Dense cyberpunk favela materializes, neon signs flickering on, wet streets reflecting light, crowds populating, motorcycles, tangled power lines, stacked buildings climbing toward futuristic skyscrapers in the distance. Camera settles into third-person view behind him, showing his full tattooed back. HUD elements fade in, minimap top left, health bar, ammo counter bottom right. Quest marker appears. He takes a step forward into the street, puddle splashing under his shoe. Golden hour light cuts through the alley. Ambient city noise floods in, chatter, distant music, neon buzz.
STYLEHyper-realistic CGI. White void sections: clean, mini

A sharp CRACK echoes. A bullet strikes metal nearby — sparks burst. The tone shifts instantly.

Another shot — bullet grazes the edge behind him as he launches.

A bullet slams into the metal bars — sparks flash right next to his face.
Momentum swings him violently. He uses it to climb higher.

Climbing fast using window frames and AC units.
Shots continue — distant but precise.
One bullet shatters glass beside him, shards falling into the street below.

[13s–15s]
He pulls himself onto the rooftop.
Before he can breathe — CRACK. Bullet hits the surface near him.
He turns sharply — sees a large, sniper gun suitcase placed under a water tank on roof top corner hidden

He rushes toward it as another bullet strikes behind him

title: Mythic Action Comedy: Wukong Cat
description: A complex 15-second multi-cut action comedy sequence featuring an orange cat as a mythic trickster in a coliseum battle
content:
FORMAT: 15s / 160 BPM / MULTI-CUT / Seedance 2 / 3D myth-action comedy / dark humor
STYLE: Fast-cut spectacle, exaggerated physics, mythic scale meets slapstick payoff, punchline-driven pacing
SUBJECTS: Orange cat (mythic trickster aesthetic: golden headband, red-gold armor, cloud-rider stance, fierce but cocky). Colossal Buddha in clouds (serene yet overwhelming authority). Hyena gladiators (muscular, aggressive, armored). Arena animals (mixed species, roaring crowd).
PROPS: Golden staff, cloud platform, floating bone fragments, arena weapons, sand debris
ENVIRONMENT: Stormy sky above desert → massive impact crater → instant teleport to ancient Roman-style coliseum arena
MOOD: Arrogance → instant defeat → divine punishment → chaotic survival → comedic victory
COLOR LOGIC: Dark storm clouds + gold aura → dusty desert tones → warm brutal arena light → celebratory brightness
CAMERA: Rapid cinematic cuts, extreme scale shifts, dramatic zooms, impact shakes, crowd reaction inserts

SCENE:

Wide aerial shot. Orange cat rides a small cloud, gripping a golden staff, face furious. “Alright! Who wants it?!”
Clouds split open. A colossal Buddha form emerges. Massive palm fills the frame.
Instant impact. The palm slams forward. Shockwave blasts the cat backward mid-air.
Smash cut. Desert ground. Cat crashes down, forming a deep crater. Sand explodes outward.
Close-up. He groans, crawling out of the hole, coughing dust. “Okay… that was excessive…”
Sky darkens. Buddha voice echoes: “Now… you must atone.”
Giant finger points down. Flash of light.
Hard cut. Coliseum arena. Cat now in gladiator armor, holding a ridiculous feather wand toy. He looks around: “You gotta be kidding me.”
Reveal: a circle of snarling hyena gladiators closing in. One cracks neck: “Fresh meat.”
Cat yells upward: “This is not a fair trial!”
Hyenas leap in simultaneously.
Cat smirks suddenly. Flicks the wand—turns it into floating bone pieces. “But it is a distraction.”
Bones scatter across arena. Hyenas instantly break formation, chasing them wildly.
Beat. Cat sighs: “Predictable.”
Rapid action burst. He unleashes ultra-fast consecutive kicks, striking each hyena’s head one by one.
Comedic result: every hyena’s head gets stuck into the ground, legs flailing in the air.
Crowd erupts. Animals cheer wildly.
Cat turns toward camera, confident, brushes dust off shoulder.
He winks with left eye: “Guess I’m absolved.”

SFX: Wind roar in sky, massive palm impact boom, sand explosion, low divine echo voice, teleport flash, arena crowd murmur rising to cheers, bone scatter clinks, chaotic scrambling sounds, rapid kick thuds, comedic “thunk” impacts, roaring applause finale.

content: A group of young riders race down a steep grassy hillside on rugged mountain bikes in a hyper-realistic GoPro-style action shot. The camera rushes forward in a dynamic chase angle weaving between riders — chains whir, tires skid, rooster tails of dust spray behind every bike. The lead rider pulls ahead with body low over the frame, elbows wide, as the trail narrows toward the edge of a massive cliff. Wind howls through helmet vents. Camera follows: high-speed trail chase cam → sharp forward dive at the cliff lip → stomach-dropping free-fall perspective showing the vast open drop → smooth stabilization locking onto bikes gliding mid-air in formation. Far below, a quiet village sits tiny and distant. Bright daylight, vivid saturated colors, lush green hills, clear blue sky. Heavy motion blur on spokes and frame edges, realistic suspension fork compression, heat shimmer from thruster Gugu Gaga nozzles, hard sunlight lens flares across carbon tubes and polished rims, wind pulling jerseys tight against riders' bodies, dirt and pebbles frozen mid-air around tires. title: 1980s Retro Aesthetic Video Prompt
description: A descriptive prompt for a 15-second cinematic video capturing a nostalgic 1980s retro vibe with vintage fashion and warm sunlight.
content: Create a 15 second cinematic video inspired by a 1980s aesthetic, following a young woman through her day. She wears authentic 1980s outfits like oversized denim jackets, high-waisted jeans, loose shirts, vintage sneakers, scrunchies, and bold accessories. Start with a morning scene where she wakes up in a sunlit bedroom with soft curtains moving in the breeze. Add a bike ride shot with wind in her hair and golden sunlight. Move into evening where she laughs with friends under a warm sunset, capturing natural candid joy. End with a calm night scene by a window with city lights and soft neon glow, reflecting a peaceful mood. Use smooth camera movements, slow motion for emotional moments, and a mix of wide shots, close-ups, and POV angles. Focus on natural expressions, soft lighting, and a dreamy nostalgic feel. No text, no logos, no branding. Create a high-quality 4K cinematic storyboard in a soft 1980s aesthetic, showing a full day in the life of a young woman, with no text anywhere in the image. Use a warm, nostalgic tone with film grain, pastel colors, golden sunlight, neon accents, and vintage styling inspired by retro photography. The character should wear authentic 1980s outfits in each scene, such as high-waisted jeans, denim jackets, oversized blazers, graphic tees, polka dot dresses, scrunchies, and retro sneakers, with soft vintage makeup and voluminous hairstyles. The storyboard should be in a 16:9 layout with 8–10 panels, capturing simple emotional moments: waking up in a sunlit bedroom with sheer curtains, getting ready in front of a mirror, walking through a lively street with old cars and signs, listening to music on a cassette player or headphones, relaxing in a cozy caf9 or diner, riding a bike or enjoying an open road, laughing with friends in warm evening light, watching a dreamy sunset, and ending with a calm nighttime scene under neon lights or a glowing city. Focus on natural expressions, candid emotions, and cinematic composition using a mix of wide shots, close-ups, and POV angles, with soft lighting, gentle motion blur, and a dreamy aesthetic feel throughout, emphasizing mood and storytelling without any text or branding.

title: Shaw Brothers Style Cinematic Cat Drama
description: A highly detailed cinematic AI video prompt for a 15-second sequence in the style of 1960s Shaw Brothers films, featuring an absurd comedic confrontation between a bear chef and an orange cat with dramatic zooms and rapid-fire pacing.
content:
TITLE: “Dinner, Interrupted by Vengeance”

Seedance 2 | 15s cinematic AI video prompt | 1960s Shaw Brothers parody | soap-opera absurd comedy | cheap props | fake Mount Fuji backdrop | exaggerated acting | rapid-fire pacing | continuous motion | no pauses | dramatic zoom-ins | slapstick chaos

A low-budget farmhouse courtyard. Painted Mount Fuji backdrop visibly wrinkled. Fake wooden walls slightly shaking. Lighting harsh and uneven.

A black bear wearing a red dudou, sweating heavily, annoyed expression, stands at an ancient stove… but beneath it is a clearly modern gas tank.

He aggressively stir-fries food—pink salmon slices flipping unrealistically high.

0–3s
Close-up: wok flames burst too big. Loud sizzling.

Black Bear (grumbling)
if one more ingredient judges me, i’m eating the witness

Wooden door suddenly SLAMS open with exaggerated echo.

Whip pan.

3–6s
An orange cat STRUTS in.

Bulky body squeezed into an overly tight purple ancient female outfit. Heavy blue eyeshadow, bright red lips. Clearly masculine voice.

Wind machine hits dramatically for no reason.

Extreme close-up—slow blink.

Orange Cat (low, dramatic)
have you ever… caught a salmon… near mount fuji

Cut to black bear—freezes.

Sweat intensifies instantly.

Black Bear (nervous)
wait… don’t tell me… you’re the fish

Beat.

6–9s
Orange cat’s face SNAPS into rage.

Zoom crash.

Orange Cat (furious)
I’M THE NET

Thunder SFX. Completely mismatched.

White smoke EXPLODES—cheap stage smoke everywhere.

9–12s
Transformation reveal:

A giant brown rope fishing net appears—clearly handmade, uneven knots, slightly tangled.

The net FLOATS awkwardly forward (visible wire), then LAUNCHES at the black bear.

WHOOSH—overdramatic.

It wraps and SLAMS the black bear to the ground.

Spatula flies in slow motion.

Black Bear (muffled)
this is why i don’t trust metaphors

12–15s
Sudden beat.

Black bear’s expression changes—calm… then smug.

Extreme close-up—he pulls out a tiny lighter.

Black Bear (grinning, unhinged)
good thing i plan for stupid

CLICK—flame ignites.

WHOOSH—net instantly catches fire.

The net WRITHES and SCREAMS.

Fishing Net (panicking)
THIS IS ILLEGAL I HAVE RIGHTS

It burns absurdly fast—turns to ash mid-scream.

Cut—black bear stands up, dusting himself off.

Ash falls like snow.

Black Bear (relieved)
finalmente… something well done

Freeze frame—his smug face, background Fuji slightly peeling.

Hard gong + crackling fire sound.

CUT TO BLACK.

title: Cinematic ARPG Boss Battle Scene
description: A cinematic action-adventure video prompt for a boss battle between a rabbit and a giant fox, featuring Sekiro-style combat and dramatic camera work, suitable for cinematic video generation.
content: Cinematic Action-adventure game boss battle scene, Sekiro-style combat, single continuous shot, fast-paced with intense impact. A white rabbit adventurer stands at the center of a shattered ancient stone battlefield. Opposite stands a tall fox, dressed in flowing Eastern robes and wearing a dark mask, exuding an oppressive aura. It holds a long whip that sways slowly through the air. The battle erupts instantly. The fox dashes forward at high speed, its whip slicing through the air with sharp, explosive cracks. The rabbit precisely blocks with the frying pan, sparks bursting at the moment of impact. They enter a high-frequency exchange—continuous blocks, deflections, and pressure—forming a classic ARPG-style “posture combat” rhythm. Camera language: low-angle tracking, rapid forward movement, slight handheld shake on impact, with strong motion blur on the whip swings. The fox unleashes chained attack combinations: sweeping whip strikes, upward lash attacks, and long-range pulling strikes to control distance. The rabbit side-steps, rolls, and counters at close range, striking rapidly with the frying pan in tight melee. Mid-battle, everything suddenly pauses. The wind intensifies, sand spirals upward, and the atmosphere compresses dramatically. The fox leaps backward to create distance. Its body begins to emit a white glow—the ultimate move activates. Transformation begins—the fox rapidly expands, transforming into a massive white spirit fox. Its fur flows like misty clouds, its enormous body covering the entire battlefield, radiating overwhelming pressure. The camera pulls back, revealing the vast difference in scale. The giant fox raises its front paw and slams it down toward the rabbit with devastating force. At the moment of impact—shockwaves spread outward, the ground violently shatters, and sand explodes across the frame. Final shot: the rabbit is engulfed beneath the shadow of the massive fox’s paw. title: Anime Character Water Slide with Reaction PIP
description: A complex video generation prompt that creates a continuous shot of an anime character on a water slide, featuring a persistent circular picture-in-picture frame in the corner to show facial reactions.
content:
被写体：2Dアニメ調のキャラクターが乗ったボード一つ。メインカメラはボードの斜め後ろに固定、ショットは途切れない。右上に小さな丸いワイプフレームを埋め込み、キャラクターの顔を正面から常時可視化。丸ワイプは明確なフレームエッジを持ち、高い解像度でキャラクターの表情（驚き、興奮、爽快感）を映し続ける。

シーン：カメラをボードの真後ろのリアフォローマウントにロックし、ショットを決して切らない。リアルなウォーターパークの広大な青空ゾーンで始まり、トロピカルな緑（ヤシの木、南国の風景）を背景に、キャラクターはボードに乗ったままウォータースライダーの頂上からスタート。1本の連続したスライダーを滑走し、最初はゆっくり、徐々に加速。大きく右カーカーブを描き、水が豪快に飛び散り、白く煌めく。メインフレームをボード追従で保ち、スライダーレール、カーブ、水しぶき、光の反射が後ろから明確に読み取れるように。右上の丸ワイプではキャラクターの顔、肩、髪が風に揺れ、目はキラキラの驚きから歓喜へ、髪は速度の下でなびき、水がかかる瞬間にびっくり表情に。最終的には高速のストレート区間を突き進み、プール状の着水ゾーンに突入。着水の瞬間、大きな水の爆発。スローダウンしながら水が光に包まれ、爽快感が画面全体を満たす。ワイプでもキャラクターの着水時の輝く瞳と爽快的な笑顔が同時に映る。1本の途切れない動き、全編にわたりリアルな水と光、トロピカルな背景、メインフレームの追従、右上の丸ワイプの常時表示。

ムード：息をのむ爽快感、バラエティ的な楽しさ、驚きと喜びの融合、爽涼しさ、スピード感。

カラー・ロジック：ナチュラル・フィルム・プリント・エミュレーション。青空のビビッドな青、水の白い輝き、トロピカルな緑が鮮烈。

スタイル：シネマティックリアリズム＆アニメハイブリッド、アクション・エンターテインメント、バラエティ・スペクタクル。No spoken dialogue（セリフなし）。

title: Battle of Salamis Surrealist Sequence
description: An experimental historical surrealism prompt depicting the Battle of Salamis with time-fractured cinematic layers and impossible camera movements.
content:
A 1-minute surreal, time-fractured cinematic sequence set during the Battle of Salamis, 480 BCE, presented as a collapsing memory of history rather than a literal recreation. The camera moves like a sentient observer, phasing between time layers, gliding at impossible speeds just above the waterline of the narrow straits of Salamis.

The sea behaves unnaturally — waves freeze mid-motion, then shatter into droplets that reverse and reassemble. Hundreds of Persian war galleys stretch endlessly across the horizon like a mirrored army, duplicated and distorted, while the smaller Greek triremes emerge sharply from pockets of clarity, cutting through the chaos with precision.

Instead of continuous motion, the video pulses between hyper-slow suspended moments and sudden bursts of extreme velocity. Oars slice through water in synchronized rhythm, each stroke echoing like a visual ripple through time. Ships flicker between intact and destroyed states, as if multiple outcomes overlap simultaneously.

The camera dives through narrow gaps between ships, then phases through hulls to reveal interior flashes — soldiers frozen mid-battle, expressions suspended between fear and determination. Greek triremes surge forward, their bronze rams faintly glowing, striking Persian ships in fragmented slow motion. Upon collision, wood disintegrates into particles of light and memory, dissolving into the sea.

The battlefield gradually becomes more abstract — fire arrows arc across the sky leaving luminous trails like constellations. Reflections on the water reveal alternate versions of the battle, hinting at parallel histories. Harsh Mediterranean sunlight refracts into prismatic beams, casting shifting, unnatural shadows.

Final moments: the camera rapidly ascends, revealing the entire strait as a fractured mosaic of time slices — victory, destruction, and silence coexisting — before collapsing into a single still frame of a calm blue sea.

title: Cinematic Top-Down Routine of a Drained Young Woman
description: A highly detailed structured prompt for Seedance 2.0 that creates a continuous top-down POV sequence of a woman's morning routine, focusing on realistic lighting, atmospheric haze, and specific motion cues.
content:
SUBJECT:
A drained young woman matching reference. She wears an oversized faded t-shirt and soft lounge shorts. Hair slightly messy, faint smudged kajal under her eyes, barefoot. Her movements are slow, automatic, almost like muscle memory rather than intention. Expression distant, unfocused.

ENVIRONMENT:
A narrow, low-ceiling studio apartment. A thin mattress pushed against the wall, rumpled sheets, clothes draped over a chair. A tight passage leads into a small wash area with a cracked mirror and damp floor. Beyond that, a compact kitchenette with stacked utensils, a flickering tube light, and a half-open window letting in tinted city glow. The space feels humid, stale, and lived-in.

MOOD:
Repetitive routine with an eerie undertone, like something unseen is quietly observing from above, waiting for a break in pattern.

COLOR LOGIC:
Muted tungsten warmth mixed with artificial green spill from outside. Slight haze in the air, soft diffusion on highlights, subtle noise for realism.

CAMERA:
Strict top-down POV tracking perfectly vertical above her head at all times. No tilt, no drift, no lateral offset. Smooth floating motion, phasing through ceilings and doorways seamlessly. 24mm lens feel, clean digital texture. Continuous single take.

SCENE FLOW:
She lies on the mattress, eyes open already, not waking, just… existing.
Sits up directly beneath the lens.
Without looking up, reaches beside her pillow. Finds a crumpled cigarette pack. Taps one out.
Places it between her lips. Searches briefly. Finds the lighter under the sheet. Lights it.
The flame flickers briefly against her face. She inhales. Drops the lighter.
She stands. The camera glides with her, perfectly locked overhead.
Walks slowly through the cramped room, stepping over scattered clothes.
Enters the narrow passage.
Moves into the wash area.
With the cigarette held loosely in one hand, she turns on the tap using the other.
Lets water run over her fingers first. Then splashes her face lazily, not fully committing.
Water drips. She doesn’t wipe it.
She exits back into the passage, trailing faint smoke.
Turns into the kitchenette.
Still under the exact center of the frame, she reaches toward the cluttered counter.
Moves aside a plate without looking. Picks up a steel tumbler.
Pauses.
Stands still.
The camera remains frozen above her.
She raises the cigarette slightly. Takes a slow drag.
Silence stretches.
Then, she slowly tilts her head upward.
Not sudden. Not sharp.
Just enough to meet the lens.
Holds eye contact.
Exhales smoke straight up, it blooms toward the camera, soft and hazy.
Doesn’t break the gaze.

SFX:
Soft lighter click, inhale/exhale, distant traffic hum, faint electrical buzz, water trickle, bare feet against floor.
Subtle room tone with low ambient tension.

title: Luxury Skincare Cinematic Ad
description: A high-end commercial prompt for a luxury skincare product, featuring detailed scene flow including establishing shots, product focus, and character interaction.
content:
Luxury Cream Cinematic Ad (Female Model – Reference Matched)

A cinematic, high-end luxury skincare advertisement featuring a young woman whose face closely matches the provided reference image — accurate facial structure, skin tone, hairstyle, and expression consistency across all frames.

She stands in a softly lit, premium indoor setting (minimalist luxury room with warm natural light filtering through sheer curtains). The atmosphere feels calm, refined, and elegant.

She is wearing a tasteful red outfit — a modest yet attractive dress consisting of a skirt extending just below her knees and a half-sleeve top, made of soft, flowing fabric. The styling is minimal and sophisticated, with subtle makeup and natural hair movement.

🎥 Scene Flow & Shots

1. Wide Shot (Establishing)
The woman stands gracefully near a window, gentle sunlight illuminating her silhouette. Curtains flow slightly, adding softness and motion.

2. Medium Shot (Introduction of Product)
She slowly raises a luxury skincare cream jar in her hands. The jar is sleek, glossy, and premium-looking (glass container with metallic accents). She looks at it with a soft, confident smile.

3. Close-Up (Product Focus)
Detailed macro shot of her hands holding the cream. Soft reflections, visible texture, and premium finish emphasized. Condensation or glow effect can be added subtly for luxury appeal.

4. Beauty Shot (Emotional Connect)
Camera shifts to her face — she looks into the camera with a calm, elegant expression. Slight head tilt, natural blinking, soft smile.

5. Interaction Shot
She gently opens the jar, lightly dabs a small amount of cream, and applies it gracefully (e.g., on her cheek or hand), maintaining poise and elegance.

6. Hero Shot (Final Frame)
She holds the product near her face, perfectly framed. Background softly blurred. Subtle glow lighting enhances skin and product.

🎨 Style & Technical Direction

* Ultra-realistic, cinematic quality
* Soft warm lighting, luxury aesthetic
* Shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh
* Smooth camera motion (slow pans, slight push-ins)
* 4K, high detail, ad-grade output
* Consistent character identity across all shots
* No text overlays unless minimal brand-style typography

title: Ghibli-Inspired Animated Short Film
description: A cinematic video prompt that creates a nostalgic, hand-painted Ghibli-style short film following a young inventor in a peaceful countryside village.
content:
Create a cinematic animated short film in a hand-painted, Ghibli-inspired aesthetic with soft lighting, emotional storytelling, and natural environmental motion. The tone is magical, nostalgic, and deeply atmospheric.
The story follows a peaceful countryside village and a young inventor who builds a flying machine that changes how the village sees the sky.
🌿 SCENE FLOW (SEQUENTIAL VIDEO STRUCTURE)
1. Establishing Village (Slow cinematic pan) Wide aerial shot of a lush green countryside village at sunrise. Rolling hills, rice fields swaying in wind, smoke rising from wooden houses. Soft golden light, peaceful ambient atmosphere, birds flying across the sky. Slow camera push-in.
2. The Hidden Workshop (Interior reveal) Cut to a cozy wooden inventor’s workshop filled with sketches, mechanical parts, and warm sunlight beams through dusty windows. Camera slowly moves across blueprints of a flying machine. Subtle floating dust particles, intimate mood.
3. The Inventor Moment (Character focus) Close-up of a young inventor sketching intensely. Emotional expression, soft lamp lighting on face, hands moving quickly across paper. Camera slowly rotates around character, showing determination and loneliness.
4. Machine Reveal (Hero object shot) The handcrafted flying machine is revealed—wood, brass, fabric wings. Camera low-angle orbit shot, slow dramatic reveal. Light glinting off metal parts. Subtle wind movement makes wings slightly shift.
5. First Flight Launch (Action sequence) The machine launches from a grassy hill above the village. Fast wind movement, grass bending, villagers running into frame below. Camera follows the machine accelerating upward into sky. Dynamic motion blur.
6. Mid-air instability (Tension moment) Flying machine tilts in turbulent wind. Camera shakes slightly, dramatic clouds swirling. Close-up of rotating wings struggling. Sound of wind intensifies. Emotional tension builds.
7. Village Reaction (Cutaway emotional shot) Villagers watching from below—children pointing, elders reacting in awe. Warm sunset lighting. Slow-motion emotional expressions. Camera pans across crowd faces.
8. Above the clouds (Calm transformation) Machine stabilizes above a glowing cloud sea. Peaceful silence replaces tension. Soft golden-orange sky blending into deep blue. Camera drifts slowly around the floating machine.
9. Magical Encounter + Ending (Climactic emotional finish) A glowing ethereal spirit-like light entity appears in the sky near the machine, gently illuminating everything. The inventor looks up in awe. Camera pulls back slowly into a vast sky revealing infinite clouds. Fade out into sunset.

MAIN CHARACTER: Shy white female cat student with clean soft white fur, gentle round eyes, and a delicate nervous expression. Wearing a neat pink short-sleeve blouse tucked into a black knee-length skirt (high school uniform). Clothes are tidy and properly fitted. Slightly hunched posture, avoids eye contact, hands close to chest. Personality: quiet, introverted → transforms into sharp, fearless, explosively confident fighter. Facial features must remain fully consistent.

BULLIES: 4 female gray cats with darker fur, heavy exaggerated makeup (thick eyeliner, smeared lipstick). Same uniform but messy—shirts untucked, loose collars, wrinkled skirts. Smug, loud, theatrical personalities. Movements are exaggerated, chaotic, synchronized teasing.

[ENVIRONMENT / ART STYLE]

LOCATION: Old classroom with scratched wooden desks, scattered books and papers.

ATMOSPHERE: Dark cinematic lighting, warm sunlight beams through dusty air, visible particles. Calm tension → explosive chaos.

STYLE: Ultra-realistic, 4K, gritty cinematic look, detailed fur texture, natural lighting with stylized exaggerated motion.

[CAMERA STYLE]

Handheld shaky cam, fast whip pans, dynamic tracking, impact shake, quick zoom-ins, occasional slow motion on key hits, slight comedic timing pauses.

[CINEMATIC TIMELINE – 15 SECONDS TOTAL]

SHOT 1 (0–2s) – Quiet
Main character sits alone studying neatly. Slow push-in. Silence with faint ambient noise.

SHOT 2 (2–4s) – Mocking
Bullies surround her, camera tight and shaky.

DIALOGUE:
“Wow… she still exists?”
“Hey nerdy, ever tried having a life?”
“Stupid AND awkward? impressive.”
“No boyfriend? yeah… obvious.”

She stays silent, eyes down.

SHOT 3 (4–5.5s) – Trigger
One bully knocks her book to the floor.

“Oops. it slipped.”

Silence drops.

SHOT 4 (5.5–7s) – Switch
Close-up. Her eyes lift, expression turns cold.

“…you done?”

SHOT 5 (7–11s) – CHAOTIC CAT FIGHT

Sudden explosive movement, fast and exaggerated:

• Hair grab → spin pull
• Sharp scream → double-hand shove
• Rapid slap combo (stylized rhythm)
• Collar grab → two bullies collide
• Knee bump + hip check → dramatic stumble
• Sidestep → light kick sends one sliding back
• Sleeve pull → flip onto desk (papers burst)

Camera rotates, whip pans, heavy shake
Dust and papers fly everywhere
Brief slow motion on strongest hits
Tone: aggressive but absurd, darkly comedic

SHOT 6 (11–13s) – Control
All gray cats down, tangled, groaning.

Main character stands center, slightly messy but composed, adjusts sleeve.

SHOT 7 (13–15s) – Final Line
Slow push-in.

She looks at camera, calm confident smirk.

“Alright…”
(beat)
“who’s next?”
“Bring it on.”

[IMPORTANT]

Maintain perfect character consistency across all frames.
No facial distortion or identity drift.
Action must feel fast, stylized, cinematic, not graphic.
Tone: hig

title: 16th Century Istanbul Market Street Sequence
description: An immersive, continuous-shot prompt depicting the bustling life of an Ottoman-era bazaar at dusk, following a sequence of subjects from vendors to a janissary warrior.
content:
FORMAT
cinematic continuous shot / motivated camera movement / 15s

SCENE
A bustling Ottoman-era market street in Istanbul, circa 16th century during the height of the Ottoman Empire, at dusk. Narrow cobblestone الطريق winds between wooden and stone buildings with overhanging upper floors and عثمانی architectural details.

Market stalls overflow with fresh bread, dates, figs, spices in colorful piles, النحاس utensils, woven carpets, and silks. Butchers display hanging cuts of meat, copper trays gleam under lantern light, and clay jars of زيت and honey line the edges.

Vendors shout in the 거리 in Ottoman Turkish accents, lively and layered. Smoke rises from braziers and nearby kitchens, blending with cool mist drifting from the Bosphorus. The ground is damp, reflecting lanterns and torchlight in uneven puddles. Cats roam freely, and a few chickens scatter between الناس.

CAMERA CONCEPT
A continuous, motivated camera move where each subject’s motion naturally redirects attention—flowing like a living observer through the chaos of the bazaar.

SEQUENCE

0:00–0:03
Close street-level view of a wooden stall stacked with figs, olives, and spices.
CAMERA FOCUS: a veiled Ottoman woman bargains with a merchant. She tastes a fig, pauses, then drops a few worn coins into his palm.

0:03–0:05
A donkey cart loaded with sacks of grain splashes through wet stone across the foreground, briefly obscuring the scene.
CAMERA SHIFT: the camera picks up the cart and begins tracking alongside it.

0:05–0:07
The cart squeezes through the narrow street, brushing against a hanging carpet with geometric Ottoman patterns. The fabric sweeps across the lens.
CAMERA SHIFT: as it clears, a group of chickens scatter loudly across the الطريق.

0:07–0:09
A ragged street boy rushes into frame, chasing the chickens with a stick, weaving through shoppers and السوق stalls.
CAMERA SHIFT: the camera follows him dynamically.

0:09–0:12
The boy passes the entrance of a dim kahvehane (coffee house). He disappears into the crowd.
CAMERA SHIFT: the wooden door creaks open as a tired man in traditional عثمانی لباس stumbles out.

0:12–0:15
The camera glides past him and enters the interior. Thick smoke from pipes fills the air, lit by flickering oil lamps. Low wooden tables, quiet گفتگو, cups of Turkish coffee.
CAMERA FINAL FOCUS: a silent armored figure sits in the corner—an Ottoman warrior (janissary/mercenary style), worn armor, السفر dust on boots, a curved sword resting beside him. He slowly raises his eyes toward the camera.

STYLE
Authentic Ottoman street life, dense crowd choreography, historically grounded textures, immersive bazaar realism.

LIGHTING
Warm lantern and torchlight reflecting on wet stone outside, cool mist diffusion, dim golden oil-lamp glow inside, smoke-heavy atmosphere.

QUALITY
photorealistic, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed textures, immersive camera flow, rich 16th-century Ottoman atmosphere

title: Hydraulic tidal-flow battle
description: An epic, multi-scene cinematic prompt featuring a woman with glowing tidal-flow patterns causing a massive urban flood battle.
content: A 31-year-old woman with close-cropped silver hair, high cheekbones, deep brown skin, wearing a navy pressure-woven trench coat threaded with luminous tidal-flow patterns that ripple across the fabric like moving water — hook at second two: she drops both hands onto the pavement of a coastal boulevard and the tidal lines ignite, glowing aquamarine beneath the asphalt as underground water mains rupture in sequence. The street begins to buckle as pressurized water channels surge upward through the infrastructure grid. The fight is hydraulic and architectural: hydrants explode into geysers mid-combat, storm drains invert into upward water cannons, and entire intersections liquefy as subterranean flood tunnels erupt to the surface. Her movements redirect the water systems — each step sending pressure waves through the ground that burst upward as towering water pillars. The gauntlet moves through a waterfront district progressively consumed by ocean force: street level flooded knee-deep → ferry terminal ripped open by tidal surges → elevated expressway collapsing into a rising inland sea. Ships break their moorings and slide into city blocks. Glass towers fracture as high-pressure jets shear through their lower levels. Chase-cam along a collapsing seawall as an incoming megawave overtops the harbor barrier. Velocity ramp at the moment the harbor gates fail and the ocean pours into the city basin. Cut to aerial: the coastline has been redrawn inland by half a kilometer. She stands atop a flooded skyline, tidal currents spiraling around the remaining buildings. Diegetic ocean-blue emissive lighting from the coat patterns interacting with churning floodwater, volumetric mist and spray particles, cinematic storm lighting, ultra-detailed water simulation, 4K.

title: Cinematic Urban Women's Portrait Short Film
description: A professional cinematic video prompt designed for Seedance 2.0, creating a narrative about three different women in a night city setting. It details character costumes, lighting, specific camera movements like slow-mo and dolly-ins, and includes timed Japanese narrations for a high-quality 15-second production.
content:
【风格】都市女性群像短片（Urban Women's Portrait Film），电影调色（Cinematic Color Grading），真实摄影质感（Photorealistic），暗调高级感，4K高清，3人出镜
【时长】15秒
【场景】深夜都市——夜店后台、公寓卧室、办公室
【角色】
A女@图片1（黑色长发，穿黑色皮质吊带裙+白色皮草外套，金色大圈耳环，金项链，墨镜架在头顶，冷艳气场）
B女@图片2（橘红色长卷发，穿白色慵懒大毛衣，珍珠项链，温柔恬静）
C女@图片3（黑色长直发，穿白衬衫+黑色领带+黑色短裙，金色耳环，眼眶泛红，隐忍倔强）

[00:00-00:02] 镜头1：夜店女王（Slow-mo Entrance）
【日语旁白】低沉女声："この街の夜には、三つの物語が息をしている。"（这座城市的夜晚，有三个故事在呼吸。）
慢动作中景（Slow-mo Medium Shot）：昏暗的夜店后台，报纸糊墙，钨丝灯泡打出暖黄硬光。A女单手叉腰，皮草从肩头滑落到手肘，她微微侧头，目光从墨镜上方扫向镜头，嘴角勾起一抹冷笑。金色耳环随头部动作晃动，反射出点点光斑。

[00:02-00:06] 镜头2：深夜独处（Intimate Moment）
【日语旁白】："一人は、誰にも見せない顔を隠している。"（一个人，藏着不给任何人看的脸。）
中近景侧拍（Medium Close-up Side Shot）：暖色台灯光+窗外冷蓝月光交织。B女坐在床边，一只手轻轻拢住毛衣领口，橘红色长发垂落在肩膀和胸前，她低头微微闭眼，睫毛投下阴影。珍珠项链在锁骨处微微发光。窗外城市灯光虚化成光斑（Bokeh）。

[00:06-00:10] 镜头3：办公室崩溃边缘（Breaking Point）
【日语旁白】："一人は、泣くことさえ許されない。"（一个人，连哭都不被允许。）
正面中景缓推（Slow Dolly In）：冷白色日光灯的办公室，下班后空无一人。C女靠在办公桌边，双手垂在身侧握紧裙摆，指节发白。镜头缓缓推向她的脸——眼眶通红，泪水在眼眶里打转但死死忍住不掉，嘴唇微微颤抖，下巴绷紧。领带被扯松了一截，衬衫领口微敞。

[00:10-00:13] 镜头4：三人交叉剪辑（Rapid Cross-Cut）
【日语旁白】："それでも——"（即便如此——）
快速剪辑（Jump Cut）三组画面交替闪切：
A女猛然转身推开夜店大门走入夜色，皮草在风中翻飞——
B女抬起头望向窗外月光，眼神从温柔转为坚定——
C女用手背猛地抹掉眼角的一滴泪，深吸一口气挺直腰板——
每组画面1秒，节奏加速，配低频鼓点。

[00:13-00:15] 镜头5：定格收束（Final Frame）
【日语旁白】："彼女たちは、立ち止まらない。"（她们，不会停下脚步。）
三分屏画面（Triple Split Screen）：左A女逆光走在街头、中B女站在窗前侧脸轮廓、右C女在电梯里抬头直视镜头。三人同时定格。
黑屏，白色日文手写体字幕浮现："三つの夜、三つの強さ。"（三个夜晚，三种坚强。）

title: Cartoon character rhythmic movement
description: A sophisticated Japanese prompt focusing on rhythmic animation, kinetic cuts, and graphic effects for stylized characters.
content:
BGMなし。SEのみ。
 カートゥーンアニメ調の誇張されたモーション。 
動きは「ゆっくりした入りと抜き」＋「中間の高速化」を強調し、ポーズ間をビュンと歪ませるように崩す。 
キャラクターは左右へ大きく緩急のある高速移動を繰り返し、 「移動 → 可愛い決めポーズで静止」をリズミカルに反復する。 

演出シークエンス： キャラクターは左右へ大きく緩急のある高速移動を繰り返し、 「移動 → 可愛い決めポーズで静止」をリズミカルに反復する。
顔アップ ・右上を見る → 左上を見る ・頬を赤らめ、手で口元を隠しながら意地悪にニヤリ ・マンガ的誇張表情＋ジェスチャー ・高速で後方へ引き、強いパースの決めポーズ ・手をカメラに突き出すフォーショアトニング 

カメラ： ダイナミックかつキネティックなカット割り。強い遠近感、誇張パース、キャラ追従と急加速を組み合わせる。リズムと“拍”を視覚で体感させる。 

動作設計： 肩・腰・脚を連動させ、体幹が大きくしなる。 しなやかさと爆発的な力を両立。 
荒々しくも洗練され、無駄のない動き。 

感情の流れ： 集中 → 加速 → 没入 → 解放 緊張と恍惚が同居する表情変化を明確に描写。 

エフェクト： 攻撃や動作の軌跡にシャープなエフェクト。 衝突時に弾けるビジュアル反応。 風圧・衝撃波で髪と衣装が大きく揺れる。 「重さ」と「鋭さ」を瞬間的に両立。 

スローモーション： 決定的瞬間の直前または決めのみで使用。 時間を引き延ばし、感情とインパクトを最大化。

 背景： ファンシーな室内ベース、キャンバス的扱い。 

レイヤー優先順位： キャラクター グラフィック模様 白背景 

グラフィック要素： 円、三角形、星形、多角形、柔らかいブロブ、ドット群。 フラット塗り、シャープエッジ、不透明、高コントラスト。 配色はパステルカラー限定。

 モーション連動： 図形はキャラクターの動き・ポーズに反応して動く。 視覚的エネルギーを増幅するが、顔や重要部位は遮らない。 構図設計： 全要素を自然に統合しつつ、視線は常にキャラクターへ集中。 キャラクターと背景のコントラストを強く保つ。 

「私を放置とは、色んな意味でいい度胸です！」

title: Elizabethan London Market Continuous Shot Prompt
description: A complex 15-second continuous shot prompt detailing an Elizabethan-era London market, with specific timestamps for camera movements, character actions, and environmental lighting for Seedance 2.0.
content:
FORMAT
cinematic continuous shot / motivated camera movement / 15s
SCENE
A bustling Elizabethan-era market street in London, circa 1500s, at dusk. Timber-framed buildings lean over a narrow muddy street, upper floors nearly touching. Wooden market stalls overflow with bread, fish, herbs, and cloth. Butchers’ hooks hang with raw meat, barrels of ale line the الطريق, and livestock—geese, chickens, and a stray pig—wander freely.
Vendors shout in the 거리, accents rough and lively. Smoke rises from chimneys, mixing with damp fog rolling in from the nearby River Thames. The ground is wet, reflecting torchlight and lantern glow in uneven puddles.
CAMERA CONCEPT
A continuous, motivated camera move where each subject’s motion naturally redirects attention—flowing like a living observer through the chaos of the market.
SEQUENCE
0:00–0:03
Close street-level view of a wooden stall stacked with apples and root vegetables.
CAMERA FOCUS: a cloaked woman argues over price with a merchant. She bites into an apple to test it, then reluctantly drops worn coins into his hand.
0:03–0:05
A horse-drawn cart loaded with sacks of grain suddenly splashes through muddy water across the foreground, briefly obscuring the scene.
CAMERA SHIFT: the camera picks up the cart and begins tracking alongside it.
0:05–0:07
The cart grinds through the tight street, brushing against a hanging cloth banner bearing a faded guild emblem. The fabric whips across the lens.
CAMERA SHIFT: as the cloth clears, a group of geese scatter loudly across the الطريق.
0:07–0:09
A ragged street boy darts into frame, chasing the geese with a stick, weaving through townsfolk and baskets.
CAMERA SHIFT: the camera follows him, dodging passersby.
0:09–0:12
The boy rushes past the entrance of a dim tavern. He disappears into the crowd.
CAMERA SHIFT: the tavern door creaks open as a drunk patron stumbles out.
0:12–0:15
The camera glides past him and into the tavern interior. Thick smoke hangs in the air, lit by flickering oil lanterns. Rough wooden tables, spilled ale, murmuring voices.
CAMERA FINAL FOCUS: a silent armored figure sits in the corner—less polished knight, more worn mercenary—mud-stained boots, dented armor, a longsword resting against the bench. He slowly raises his eyes toward the camera.
STYLE
Authentic Elizabethan street life, dense crowd choreography, grounded realism, historically textured details.
LIGHTING
Warm torchlight reflecting in wet mud outside, cool fog diffusion, dim golden lantern glow inside, smoke-heavy atmosphere.
QUALITY
photorealistic, cinematic lighting, historically grounded detail, immersive camera flow, rich 1500s London atmosphere

title: Ultra-realistic Black Lion Grooming Commercial
description: A detailed cinematic sequence for a humorous yet premium video of a black lion undergoing a blunt bowl-cut transformation in a luxury salon.
content: Concept: A humorous lion grooming transformation video featuring an ultra-realistic black lion inside a luxury animal styling studio. The tone is polished and premium but subtly ridiculous, like high-end salon content made for viral pet entertainment. Environment: An elegant boutique grooming lounge with matte black counters, warm vanity bulbs, soft mirror reflections, polished metal tools, and a clean editorial backdrop. The room feels upscale and cinematic rather than like a standard pet salon. A soft beauty-ring glow wraps around the subject, creating glossy highlights on the lion’s fur and tools. Main Subject: A hyper-realistic black lion with deep charcoal fur, a dense textured mane, powerful facial structure, expressive amber eyes, and extremely detailed whiskers. The lion wears a rich dark emerald grooming cape fastened around the neck. Its mane is being transformed into an intentionally comedic but perfectly executed rounded blunt bowl-cut style with an absurdly neat salon finish. Visual Language: Macro beauty shots, ultra-detailed close-ups, alternating between frontal portrait view, side profile, and overhead grooming angles. Shallow depth of field, clean focus pulls, precise autofocus tracking on the lion’s eyes, mane texture, scissors, and comb. Realistic salon tools include a metal comb, mist spray bottle, professional shears, thinning scissors, and a handheld dryer. Look and Feel: Bright luxury lighting, crisp clean aesthetic, tactile fur detail, premium grooming-commercial energy mixed with comedy. The overall style should feel realistic, pristine, and oddly satisfying, with a subtle ASMR grooming mood. 4K, ultra-detailed, sharp texture rendering, believable salon atmosphere. Sequence: Opening: The black lion sits calmly in the styling chair wearing the emerald cape, mane slightly overgrown, fluffy, and uneven. A human groomer’s hand enters frame and slowly lifts the messy mane with a fine comb, brushing upward through the thick fur. The strands separate naturally with soft rustling and tactile movement. Transition. Moistening Pass: From the side angle, a delicate mist is sprayed across the top and front of the lion’s mane. Tiny droplets catch the light. The thick black fur darkens, clumps slightly, and settles into a sleek damp texture as the lion remains still and dignified. Transition. Structural Cut: Overhead angle. A comb lifts a section of the damp mane, and sharp professional scissors remove the excess in one clean, deliberate line. The trim feels precise and intentional, with crisp satisfying snips and visible chunks of dark fur falling away. Transition. Softening the Shape: Front-facing close-up. Thinning shears work quickly across the front edge and sides of the mane, subtly softening the heavy cut. The movement is fast and delicate, producing a rapid series of light salon snips while the lion stares forward with regal seriousness. Transition. Blow-Dry: Side profile. Warm air from a dryer pushes through the dark fur, making it billow and expand into the finished bowl shape. The strands dance in the airflow. Closing: The final perfectly round bowl-cut mane is revealed. The lion looks directly into the lens with a stoic, kingly expression. Screen fades to black.

title: Marrakech Medina Heist Sequence
description: A high-energy cinematic heist prompt set in the Marrakech medina at golden hour, utilizing various camera angles like drone shots and steadicams.
content:
Marrakech medina at golden hour. The sun hangs low and orange over terracotta rooftops, casting long copper shadows between tangled alleyways stacked with spice pyramids, hanging lanterns, and drying saffron threads. Dust motes swirl in shafts of light.   
[0s–3s] Open on a tight overhead drone shot looking straight down into a narrow alley no wider than a man's shoulders. A young thief in a dust-colored linen shirt, bare feet slapping warm stone, bursts into frame sprinting full tilt. He clutches a small burlap pouch against his chest. The drone matches his speed, descending and tilting forward until it's level with the rooftops, revealing the vast medina maze unfolding beneath him.   
[3s–6s] Smash cut to a steadicam chase shot, 24mm wide, framing him from behind at waist height. He vaults a cart of blood oranges — they cascade into frame, bouncing like liquid fire across stone. A pursuing merchant shouts in Darija, swinging a wooden cane. The camera ducks under a low arch covered in blue tilework, and a shaft of golden light sweeps across the lens in a blinding flare.   
[6s–9s] Whip-pan to a lateral tracking shot as he scales a wall in three kinetic movements — foot on a crate, hand grabbing a copper pot hook, shoulder rolling onto a low roof. Hens explode into the air, feathers floating in slow motion. The camera rises with him in a vertical crane, revealing the full panorama: the pink Koutoubia mosque minaret in the distance, the Atlas Mountains silhouetted purple on the horizon, smoke rising from tagine stalls far below.   
[9s–12s] Hard cut to extreme close-up of his face, intercut with the pouch opening mid-stride — a single raw emerald the size of a walnut tumbles out, catches the sunset, and he snatches it back out of the air without breaking pace. Sweat beads on his brow. His dark eyes flick sideways. A 35mm lens, shallow focus, background dissolving into amber bokeh.   
[12s–15s] Reverse low-angle tracking shot, camera gliding backwards ahead of him across the rooftops. He leaps — a massive gap, at least four meters — between two buildings. Time stretches. His body arcs over the alley where, far below, a wedding procession plays ghaita horns and beats tbel drums, red petals falling. He lands in a perfect forward roll, springs up, and without pausing tosses the emerald into the air. Camera cranes up fast to catch it spinning against the blazing sun. Freeze frame. Silhouette. Cut to black.   
STYLE: Sun-baked desert epic, Villeneuve-grade scale with Guy Ritchie kinetic cutting. Shot on Alexa Mini LF, Cooke S4 primes. Color grade: burnt sienna, warm amber highlights, turquoise accent shadows from tilework. Heavy atmospheric haze, volumetric sun rays, practical dust kicked up by every footfall. Minimal lens flare, no grain — crisp, cinematic, rich.   
AUDIO: Breathy flute and hand-percussion tabla rhythm at 120 BPM building to a climax. Footsteps slapping stone. Distant call to prayer bleeding across rooftop

title: Little Alien and the Scarf
description: A narrative-driven story prompt depicting a heartwarming encounter between a boy and a small alien in a park, used for video generation.
content:
A small, glowing meteor streaks across the twilight sky and gently lands in a quiet park, leaving behind a soft shimmer. Amir stands nearby, holding a lantern, his eyes wide with curiosity.
The meteor cracks open with a faint hum, revealing a tiny alien named Lumo, who blinks under the dim Earth lights.
Amir steps closer, smiling warmly.
Amir: Hey there… you look lost.
Lumo shivers slightly, its glow flickering. Amir quickly takes off his scarf and wraps it gently around Lumo.
Lumo touches the soft fabric, fascinated, then tries to wrap it tighter around itself but gets tangled.
Amir chuckles and demonstrates how to wear it properly, looping it around his own neck.
Amir: Like this… see?
Lumo mimics him, finally getting it right. Its glow becomes brighter and steadier.
Lumo spins happily, letting out soft musical chirps.
Amir claps lightly, impressed.
Amir: Now that suits you!
Lumo gives a tiny salute, then glows even brighter in appreciation.

pulls the ribon. Phoebe steps forward and offers the brightly colored box to Zorg. Zorg touches the bow and carefully pulls the ribbon.

title: The Celestial Fracture: Biomechanical Valkyrie Action
description: An epic sci-fi cinematic prompt involving a biomechanical Cerberus, a plasma-wielding Valkyrie, and a supernova backdrop.
content:
The Celestial Fracture: A Supernova Strike

A hyper-realistic, high-octane cinematic video that demands absolute attention. A colossal, biomechanical Stained-Glass Cerberus—its internal skeleton forged from churning, liquid tungsten—violently crashes upward through the vaulted floor of a floating, neo-gothic cathedral suspended in the chaotic rings of a dying star. The breach sends explosive, slow-motion shockwaves of pulverized ancient marble and iridescent glass shards high into the localized anti-gravity field.

Riding the apex of the center hound's massive skull is a fiercely athletic Valkyrie, armored in polished obsidian and wielding a colossal scythe made of pure, white-hot plasma. Instead of bracing for the catastrophic impact, she harnesses the beast's violent upward momentum to launch into a spectacular, gravity-defying reverse-somersault execution strike, swinging the glowing plasma scythe overhead in a blinding, lethal arc directly toward the abyss.

The Twist:
Suddenly, an unexpected twist: as the Cerberus reaches the peak of its breach, the millions of suspended, shattered stained-glass fragments violently ignite with blinding, golden solar energy. The shards instantly coalesce and mutate into a massive swarm of glowing, translucent Celestial Manta Rays, their wings sharp as obsidian scalpels, erupting from the debris and soaring like kinetic missiles all around the suspended warrior.

The camera abandons a traditional wide shot for a relentless, fast-paced reverse-tracking snap-zoom. It spirals violently backward through the deadly storm of glowing glass manta rays, narrowly dodging their razor-sharp wings, before whipping 180 degrees to lock into a first-person POV directly over the Valkyrie's shoulder just as her plasma scythe connects with the Cerberus’s tungsten spine with catastrophic force. The blinding golden light of the dying star is dramatically pierced by a sudden, jagged shockwave of void-black anti-matter ripping across the nebula.

Audio Profile:
Audio features the deafening, apocalyptic crunch of shattering celestial architecture, the high-pitched, singing whine of the plasma scythe cutting the atmosphere, the terrifyingly beautiful, chaotic chime of a million glass wings slicing the air, and a soaring, high-tempo operatic choir layered with a heavy synth-bass crescendo. This auditory chaos cuts abruptly to a vacuum-sealed, ringing silence the exact millisecond the black anti-matter shockwave detonates.

title: Desert Leviathan and Shamanic Belly Dancer
description: A complex cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 involving a creature breaching from sand, environment shifts to frost, and a high-action chase sequence.
content: A hyper-realistic, high-octane cinematic epic set within the heart of an endless, undulating desert of scarlet sand. A colossal Desert Leviathan—a serpentine creature forged from ancient, hardened clay, bone, and pulsating veins of molten obsidian—violently explodes from the highest dune, breaching like a whale but through the earth itself. It sprays tsunamis of fine red sand high into the scorching air. Riding the apex of the Leviathan’s churning, scaly head is an ethereal belly dancer, draped in shimmering silk veils embedded with tiny mirrors and raw amber. Instead of trying to maintain balance, she embraces the creature's massive upward surge. She uses a golden, scimitar-shaped baton to weave the rising sand columns, drawing shimmering, fractal symbols of golden energy and glowing turquoise hieroglyphs from the creature’s hide, molding the flying sand into solid steps beneath her feet. The Twist: As the Leviathan roars—a sound like tectonic plates grinding beneath a waterfall—the entire desert landscape undergoes a sudden, localized environmental shift. The intense, oppressive heat violently transforms into an immediate, freezing flash-frost. The cascading waves of scarlet sand begin to solidify in mid-air, not into ice, but into geometric crystals of amethyst. Suddenly, a massive, explosive swarm of origami scarabs (folded from iridescent blue metal and paper) erupts from the frozen dunes, soaring like arrows all around the suspended dancer. The camera abandons a traditional perspective for a kinetic, fast-paced whip-pan tracking shot, following the dancer’s flight as she leaps from crystal sand-step to crystal sand-step, navigating the dangerous amethyst terrain and dodging the swarm of metal scarabs. She dives headfirst toward the creature’s open, frozen maw. Lighting & Atmosphere: The lighting is a conflict of extremes. The initial setting is scorched by a high-noon, harsh yellow sun. This is instantly replaced by the oppressive, cool, deep violet shadows of the flash-frozen desert and the refracted, kaleidoscopic colors bouncing off the amethyst crystals and metal scarabs. Audio Profile: The scene begins with a deafening, low-frequency rumble of shifting earth and the sickening crack of ancient wood. The Shaman’s magic hums with a pulsating, rhythmic chant layered with the crackling of siphoned electricity. When the frost-ravens erupt, the sound shifts to the shrieking, high-pitched scratching of ice on ice. A chaotic, primal drum score drives the action, cutting to absolute sonic vacuum just as the Shaman breaches the frozen breath, leaving only the sound of a single, slow heartbeat.

title: Dragonflight Trials POV
description: A visceral first-person perspective prompt for animating a rider mounting a massive black dragon on a mountain platform.
content: First-person POV from a rider approaching a massive black dragon from behind on a wooden mountain platform. The dragon stands at a starting ramp facing a wooden gate reading "DRAGONFLIGHT TRIALS START" with dragon-emblem banners on each side. Mountains and clouds beyond. The rider wears worn white leather gloves, dirt on hands. A white leather saddle with straps sits on the dragon's back. Ambient crowd noise: distant cheering, horns, excited murmur from spectators below. 35mm anamorphic, handheld POV, heavy film grain, teal-amber palette, bright sunlight, photoreal VFX, no zoom. 0s–2s: POV approaching the dragon's flank. Hands reach up, grab the saddle edge, pull up. One leg swings over. POV settles into the white saddle on the dragon's back. Hands grip the saddle straps. Crowd noise swells slightly. 2s–4s: Seated POV. The dragon slowly turns its massive horned head to the right, looking back over its shoulder toward the rider with one large amber eye — a knowing sideways glance, intense but calm. The eye blinks once, slowly. 4s–6s: The rider leans forward and extends one gloved hand to the side of the dragon's thick scaled neck. Pats it firmly three times with warm confident rhythm — thud, thud, thud — feeling the hard scales under the leather glove. The rider says softly but firmly: "Are you ready, my friend?" 6s–8s: The dragon holds the gaze for one more beat, then slowly turns its head back forward toward the starting gate. A deep exhale through its nostrils — a heavy deliberate sigh, two thick streams of warm air visible in the mountain cold. Its jaw tightens. Eyes narrow with focus. The crowd noise builds. 8s–10s: The dragon lowers its body slightly, hind legs coiling, claws gripping the wooden platform, wings tucking tight against its body in launch position. Muscles tensing visibly under the scales. The rider leans forward flat against the neck, hands locked on the straps, body pressed tight. Both locked in, both ready. Crowd roaring. The starting gate still ahead. Freeze on the tension. Style: hyperrealistic VFX, photoreal massive dragon, detailed scales and eye, worn leather saddle and gloves, mountain competition environment, visceral POV, rider always firmly mounted, layered crowd and competition soundscape — cheering, distant horns, wind, dragon breathing — building to crescendo, no music. title: No Ticket, No Problem Action Comedy
description: A highly detailed, long-form narrative prompt for an action-comedy scene involving cats in a jungle adventure.
content:
TITLE: “No Ticket, No Problem”
Seedance 2 | 15-second cinematic action-comedy | jungle adventure parody | high-speed chaos | dark American humor dialogue | exaggerated reactions | dynamic camera | punchy sound design

A rugged jungle theme park entrance. Primitive wooden fences, tall gates, and a massive hanging wooden sign reading “CAT UNIVERSE.” Lush overgrown jungle beyond. Mist in the air. Subtle ominous ambiance.

An orange cat wearing khaki explorer gear, binoculars hanging around his neck, sits in a dusty jeep. A white cat in a pink dress sits in the back seat, clearly unimpressed.

0–3 seconds:
Wide shot. Jeep rolls to a stop at the gate. Jungle sounds echo.

A hyena guard in camouflage uniform and sunglasses steps forward, stern and silent.

He leans toward the driver side.

Hyena guard (flat, intimidating):
"Ticket."

Close-up on orange cat. Confident smile… slowly fades.

He starts searching frantically.

3–6 seconds:
Interior chaotic close shots.

Glove compartment bursts open—papers, snack wrappers, empty cans flying everywhere.

Orange cat digging everywhere. Increasing panic.

Orange cat (nervous laugh):
"Okay… funny story… I definitely had it… spiritually."

Cut to white cat in backseat, staring out the window, bored and annoyed.

White cat (dry):
"I knew this date was illegal."

Orange cat freezes. Looks at guard.

Orange cat (awkward):
"Yeah so… about the ticket… I don’t have it."

Beat. Silence.

6–9 seconds:
Sudden shift.

Orange cat slams the gas pedal.

ENGINE ROARS.

The jeep EXPLODES forward—

SMASHES through the wooden gate. Splinters fly in slow motion.

Hyena guard jumps back shouting.

Hyena guard:
"HEY— THAT’S NOT A VALID—"

Cut off by chaos.

The jeep speeds into the jungle.

White cat SCREAMS as she grabs the seat.

White cat:
"OH GREAT NOW WE’RE CRIMINALS—"

9–12 seconds:
Deep jungle. Camera racing alongside jeep.

Glowing floating bubbles fill the air—each one softly pulsing with different colors.

Inside each bubble: a sleeping tiny green baby T-rex.

The jeep rushes past—

Wind pressure disturbs the bubbles.

POP—POP—POP—

Bubbles burst rapidly.

Tiny T-rexes drop, wake up instantly—eyes glowing, teeth bared.

They SCREECH and begin chasing the jeep.

Fast chaotic pursuit.

White cat sighs, completely over it.

White cat (annoyed, deadpan):
"See? This is why I can’t let you make decisions."

12–15 seconds:
She reaches behind the seat—

Pulls out a ROCKET LAUNCHER casually.

Orange cat glances back, concerned.

Orange cat:
"...you brought that on a date?"

White cat shrugs.

White cat:
"I like options."

She fires.

WHOOSH—

Rocket splits mid-air into multiple flaming fragments.

Each fragment targets a different baby T-rex.

Rapid impacts—tiny explosions.

The T-rexes yelp, panic, scatter and flee in all directions.

Silence returns except for engine hum.

Final shot:
Inside jeep.

title: Underground Crystal Cavern Mag-Lev Racing
description: A high-speed cinematic video prompt featuring a futuristic mag-lev pod racing through a cavern of luminous crystals and geodes, ending with a dramatic explosion of prismatic light.
content:
Start inside the mouth of a colossal underground cavern as the camera rushes forward and drops in a spiraling dive into the depths. Below, a mag-lev racing pod hurtles along a natural crystal rail formation deep underground, banking through impossible geological curves. 

Its design is minimal and luminous: a teardrop-shaped transparent cockpit revealing the pilot within, magnetic suspension rings that pulse electric blue, no visible propulsion — just pure electromagnetic force, and a surface so polished it mirrors the crystal walls rushing past. 

Giant amethyst and quartz formations blur by in streaks of purple and white while the pod's magnetic field makes the crystals around it resonate and sing. Without a cut, the camera tightens from the cavern-wide dive into a close chase along the crystal rail, revealing the pod's reflection fractured across a thousand crystal facets, electrical arcs jumping between the magnetic rings and nearby mineral deposits, and the crystal formations vibrating visibly, emitting harmonic tones. 

It drops below the rail for a dramatic undercarriage shot revealing the magnetic suspension gap — a thin line of pure blue-white energy — then whips to the front as the cavern opens into a massive geode chamber. For the climax, the crystal rail splits into three diverging paths around a central formation — an enormous singular crystal, twenty meters tall, glowing from within with trapped ancient light. 

The pod accelerates toward the fork, then at the last instant detaches from the rail entirely, going airborne through the geode chamber. It clips the giant crystal as it passes — the crystal shatters in slow motion, releasing its trapped light in a blinding prismatic explosion that fills the cavern with rainbow fire. The pod rides the light-blast's shockwave upward through a vertical shaft and erupts from a mountainside into daylight. 

The camera spirals outward for one final epic reveal — the mountain exhaling a column of rainbow light into the sky.

13–15s: Massive physical consequence: debris explosion, chain reaction collisions, shockwave through environment. But the subject emerges through it cleanly. 
Final shot: interior close-up,  subject still frozen, realizing they were not in control. Sound fades from mechanical precision back to raw breathing.

title: Emotional Hospital Interaction
description: A cinematic prompt capturing a subtle emotional shift in a patient looking at a doctor, using lighting and bokeh to represent internal feelings.
content: A calm, modern hospital room. A patient is lying on a bed while a professional, kind doctor stands beside him, gently checking his pulse and speaking softly. The camera slowly tracks from the side in a single continuous motion for the full 15 seconds. As the doctor leans slightly closer to examine the patient, the patient looks at the doctor and becomes emotionally captivated. His facial expression gradually shifts from weak and tired to calm, slightly smiling, and lost in admiration. To visually show his feelings (without unrealistic exaggeration), the background subtly transforms: the hospital environment softly blurs, and a warm, dreamy glow appears around the doctor. Light particles and soft-focus bokeh gently emerge, symbolizing the patient drifting into his thoughts. The patient is no longer focused on his illness instead, he is quietly staring at the doctor, completely absorbed in the moment. His breathing becomes calm, and his expression shows peace and affection. The doctor remains professional and unaware, continuing the check-up naturally. Final seconds: The camera continues its smooth motion as the dreamy overlay slightly fades, leaving a subtle emotional contrast a patient who has momentarily forgotten his pain, lost in thought. Important Direction (to avoid mistakes): The patient remains lying on the bed (not standing or moving unrealistically); The doctor behaves professionally (no exaggerated or inappropriate actions); The emotional effect is shown through lighting, focus, and atmosphere not unrealistic physical actions; No reversed roles or unnatural expressions; Keep the tone soft, respectful, and cinematic (not comedic or exaggerated)

content: 色鉛筆で緻密に描かれた幻想的なお花畑の風景、広がる色とりどりの花々（小さな花から大きな花まで密集して咲いている）、一本一本の花びらや葉が丁寧に描き込まれている 晴れた青空、柔らかい雲がゆっくり浮かぶ、深みのあるブルーのグラデーション、色鉛筆特有のストロークで表現された空の質感 多層的な色の重なり、繊細なクロスハッチング、細密な陰影、紙の質感がほんのり見える、筆圧の強弱による自然な濃淡、温かみのある発色 光が花畑に降り注ぎ、花びらがやわらかく輝く、風に揺れる自然な動き、奥行きのある構図（前景・中景・遠景がしっかり分かれている） アナログの手描き感、非常に高密度な描き込み、芸術作品のような完成度、静けさと生命力が共存する、美しく叙情的な風景 参照画像をエンドフレームにする。白いキャンバスから始まるシーン。最初は完全に無地の紙。やがて色鉛筆の繊細な線が現れ、ゆっくりと花畑の輪軌が描かれていく。下書きのような淡いグレーの線から始まり、徐々に色が重ねられていく。赤、黄色、ピンク、紫の花々が、色鉛筆特有の細かいストロークで丁寧に塗られていく。線は一本一本見えるように、手描きの質感を強調。塗り重ねるごとに色に深みと立体感が増していく。途中、部分的にズームして、紙の質感と色鉛筆のタッチ（ザラつき、重なり、筆圧の違い）がリアルに見える。背景の空は淡い青からグラデーションで広がり、柔らかい雲が軽く描き足される。最終的に、鮮やかで生命感のある花畑のイラストが完成する。完成直前はハイライトや影が追加され、全体が一気に引き締まる。光は柔らかく自然光、暖かい雰囲気。全体として「色鉛筆で丁寧に描き上げたアート作品」の制作過程を見せる映像。高精細、超精密ディテール、色鉛筆特有の繊細なシェーディング、紙のテクスチャ、アート作品、心地よい制作過程、ASMR的な描写 「ストロークが自動的に現れる（手は映さない）」 「時間経過を感じるタイムラプス風」

He slams a stone switch repeatedly. Instead of opening, the stone door grinds downward, sealing completely. 

DIALOGUE (Cat): “Oh come on—wrong button?!”  2 (2–3.5s) QUICK SCAN He spins, torchlight flickering across walls. Camera tilts up with his gaze—revealing a small hole in the ceiling. His eyes widen. DIALOGUE (Cat): “Okay… plan B.”  3 (3.5–6s) BUILD IN SECONDS He rushes to the sarcophagi—rips off multiple lids, wood cracking. With rapid axe strikes, he chops and reshapes pieces mid-motion. Camera orbits as he snaps them together into a rough ladder with absurd speed.  4 (6–7.5s) CLIMB AND LAUNCH He climbs fast, ladder wobbling. At the top, he forcefully kicks off—launching himself upward into the small ceiling hole, barely squeezing through.  5 (7.5–9s) CLAUSTROPHOBIC CRAWL Camera follows tightly behind as he crawls through a narrow, dark tunnel. Torchlight dims. Ahead, a faint glowing exit flickers. DIALOGUE (Cat, strained): “Yeah… definitely haunted.”  6 (9–11s) HORROR CHASE Behind him, a swarm of black scarab beetles floods into the tunnel—rapid clicking echoes. He panics and speeds up, scrambling forward. DIALOGUE (Cat): “NOPE nope nope nope—!”  7 (11–12s) ESCAPE BURST He bursts out of the tunnel into blinding sunlight—rolling forward onto the peak of a massive pyramid. Desert wind howls.  8 (12–13s) REVEAL HEIGHT He stands, catching breath—then looks down. Camera begins pulling rapidly upward, revealing impossible scale. His expression shifts to shock.  9 (13–14s) REALITY TWIST The pyramid morphs seamlessly into a printed symbol—the entire scene flattening into a green banknote design. The cat’s shocked face becomes a stylized portrait above the pyramid with “100 USD” markings.

title: Immersive High-Speed Office Melee
description: A comprehensive action sequence prompt for a 15-second brutal fight scene in an office setting, utilizing character references and dynamic camera work.
content:
15-second, no-dialogue, fully immersive high-speed brutal fight short film.

Two characters @ image1 and @ image2 . 
Live-action realistic style. Close-quarters, high-speed chaotic melee combat with no rules, fully out-of-control brawling. No flashy choreography—pure raw. Continuous exchange of punches, kicks, blocks, body checks, throws, and grappling entanglements. Ultra-realistic impact. Exaggerated yet physically grounded motion speed. Entire sequence in 120 FPS with no slow motion. Rapid dashes, evasions, and high-speed limb swings. Extreme motion blur and speed trails amplify intensity while preserving realistic weight and physics.

Master-level cinematic camera movement:

A professional film camera stays tightly locked to the action, flying dynamically with the fighters—high-speed dives, sudden stops, whip pans, and full 360° orbital tracking. The camera moves in sync with punches, kicks, and evasions, with responsive shake and displacement. One continuous take, no cuts. Sharp push-pull tracking, sudden directional shifts, fully integrated into the fight for a face-to-face immersive combat perspective. Smooth, zero-latency motion.

Master-level precision editing:

0–3 seconds: ultra-fast cuts to enter combat.

3–10 seconds: seamless action continuity with zero stutter or breaks.

10–15 seconds: dense, violent rapid-cut climax.

Editing rhythm escalates with combat intensity. Fast intercutting enhances chaos. Precise beat timing, no redundant shots. Constant suffocating high-speed pacing.

Environment Setting

Modern open-plan office with desks, computers, cabinets, printers, and swivel chairs; realistic layout with cool overhead lighting and side backlight for strong contrast. Slightly cramped space for added tension; no glass-breaking.

Environmental Interaction & Constraints:

Combat affects the space only through natural, physically justified collisions—papers scatter from air movement (not attacks), chairs slide or topple on impact, desks shift slightly without deliberate damage, and screens remain intact with minor vibration. No unnecessary or intentional destruction of equipment.

Body-driven combat: grappling, pinning, counter-throws, and realistic slams with subtle impact cracks/vibrations. Natural airflow—light paper/dust movement only, no exaggeration.

Final Action Design

Final 2–3s: both throw simultaneous close-range punches, freezing inches before impact—fully tensed, heavy breathing, locked in perfect deadlock.

title: Funny Cat Breakfast Wake-up Call
description: A detailed narrative prompt for a hyper-realistic video of a cat using its food bowl to wake up its sleeping owners in a modern bedroom.
content: A hyper-realistic video shot in a modern Western-style bedroom in the morning. An American couple is sleeping peacefully in bed with soft, natural daylight coming through the window. A tabby orange cat is running through the bedroom doorway, holding its own food bowl in its mouth. The cat jumps onto the bed and runs between the two sleeping figures. First, it places the bowl down gently on the pillow between them and taps on it once to make a soft clinking sound. The woman, without opening her eyes, merely groans and rolls over onto her other side. Next, the cat uses both its front paws to lift the entire bowl and drops it deliberately onto the sleeping man's head, making a loud metallic thud. He does not wake up. Finally, the cat extends its paw and begins repeatedly batting the man in the face to wake him up.

title: Orbital Ring Structural Failure
description: A sci-fi action prompt depicting the catastrophic collapse of a giant space ring around an alien planet with intense camera work.
content:
Gigantic orbital ring around an alien planet, structural failure propagating at high velocity, entire sections tearing apart while traffic is still moving across it.
Wide shot: the ring mid-rotation, a fracture suddenly racing along its surface faster than expected.
Hard tracking: camera locked to the crack as it splits structural layers, tearing through habitats and transit lines.
Close pass: maintenance ships accelerating along the ring, barely outrunning the collapsing structure behind them.
Near-failure: a ship misjudges speed, the surface drops away beneath it, forced to boost last-second to avoid being pulled into open space.
Chain reaction: rotating segments begin desyncing, colliding edges grinding and breaking apart.
Interior shot: corridor violently shifting, gravity flickering, people and debris slamming into walls as atmosphere vents.
Exterior whip: a massive section snaps free, rotating unpredictably, narrowly missing a fleeing ship.
Precision escape: pilot threads through a collapsing lattice of beams and cables, gaps closing in real time.
Shockwave: structural failure releases energy, pushing debris outward, ships struggling to maintain trajectory.
Final moment: a huge arc of the ring tears loose, drifting away, still populated with lights flickering across its surface.
Relentless structural collapse, no pauses, constant repositioning, cascading failures, grounded physics, massive scale with intimate danger.

title: Complex Action Sequence with Transformations
description: A highly detailed multi-phase video prompt for Seedance 2.0 that orchestrates character introductions, special effects, and cosmic transitions.
content:
## Phase C (0.20s): 灯籠起動・爆発・全景提示

(0.07s) 瞬時カットで暗転へ。固定カメラ。人型シルエットのみ見える暗転（必殺技発動前の静寂）。画面中央に花形紋章（5弁、赤+灰色、幅40%）が出現し、中心から黄金色の爆発光が8方向に放射。紋章下部から縦の黄金エネルギービームが下方に伸びる。エネルギーが上方に拡散し始める。

(0.13s) 固定カメラ（煽りローアングル）。灯籠型オブジェクトの全体像が画面中央に表示（縦長六角形の提灯型、赤い本体に白い5弁花紋章、石造り台座付き）。背後から赤い光柱が天空へ伸びる。黄色・ターコイズの星パーティクルが浮遊。画面下部30%にピンク〜マゼンタの雲。3フレームで約2%の微ズームイン。

---

## Phase D (0.17s): ティルトダウン・キャラクター顕現

(0.17s) ティルトダウン（約60–80px/fの下方向パン）。5フレームで灯籠の上部アングルからキャラクター顔のミディアムクローズアップまで移動。灯籠が画面上方に退くにつれ、その下に隠れていた3人ユニットが順次画面に現れる（腰部→上半身→顔の順に顕現）。灯籠の赤い発光が上方に退いていく。霧エフェクトがキャラクター腰付近に漂う。ズーム変化なし（純粋なティルトダウン）。

---

## Phase E (0.73s): 3人ユニット紹介・溜め演出

(0.27s) 固定煽りローアングル。緩やかなズームイン（1–2px/f）。冷色主体（紺色ベース）。3人が正面を向いた紹介ポーズ。各キャラが腕・手・首などを小さく動かし（手を上げる・傾ける等のポーズ変化）、画面下部の金色盾型台座が徐々に画面外へ退く。

(0.20s) ズームイン継続。紺+紫混合へ色調遷移。台座縁に沿って黄色い電撃エフェクトが蛇行（3→6本に増加）。3人の表情が徐々に戦闘的に変化（目を見開く・唇の端が上がる）。

(0.26s) 紫→オレンジ→赤へ急速な色調遷移（「溜め→臨界」の視覚化）。3人の顔がフレームの70%を占めるクローズアップ. 中央キャラが叫ぶような表情に、左右キャラが攻撃準備ポーズへ。色調がほぼ赤/オレンジに転換完了し、次カットの瞬時カットに備える。

---

## Phase F (0.44s): 降下攻撃・着地インパクト

(0.24s) 瞬時カットで遠景に切り替わり。超高速ズームイン（8フレームで約10倍の拡大）。キャラクターが黄金色のエネルギーリング（2–3重の同心円）に包まれた状態で画面中央上部に小さく見える。放射状の赤いスピードラインが画面全体に走る。光球が急速に接近。灯籠底面が縦方向モーションブラーと共に画面の60%を覆い、黄金色の炎が底部から噴出開始（幅300px→500pxへ拡大）。灯籠底面の花紋章が画面幅80%の超接写に。着地直前、巨大な炎が画面下部40%を埋め、虹色レンズフレアが出現。

(0.20s) 着地インパクト。固定カメラ（衝撃による5–10pxの微振動）。黄金色の炎が画面下部50%を占め、虹色レンズフレアと色収差（RGB分離）が発生。炎が70%に拡大。90%以上のホワイトアウト（黄金色系ウォームホワイト、1フレーム持続）。炎柱（幅200→150px）が画面中央を縦貫し、背景が紫〜藍色へ転換し始める。

---

## Phase G (0.56s): 光柱上昇・雲海突破・宇宙到達

(0.16s) ティルトアップ＋微ズームアウト。画面中央を縦貫する光柱（幅100→60px）が細くなりながら上昇し、両側に虹色ストライプが出現。画面下部30–40%にピンク〜マゼンタの雲海が広がる。光柱が虹色のトレイル（弧状の軌跡、レインボーグラデーション、下方が太く上方が細い）に変化。画面全体が紫にフェードし、場面転換のトランジション。

(0.10s) 固定カメラ。紫フェードが解消し、暗紫色の宇宙的空間が安定。画面下部にピンク〜マゼンタの雲海（立体的なボリューメトリック表現）。虹色トレイルが明確に出現し、先端に白〜黄色の光球（直径40px）を伴いながら下部中央から上方へ弧状に伸びる。

(0.30s) ティルトアップ＋微ズームアウト。虹色トレイルの先端光球が画面上部へ上昇（雲海→宇宙）。光球から短い放射光条（30px）が四方に出現。光十字（クロスフレア）の形成開始（水平100px・垂直80px）。光十字が完全形成。最大サイズ（水平300px・垂直200px）に到達し、中心に純白の光核（略楕円形）。黄金色の星パーティクルが周囲に4–5個浮遊。

---

## Phase H (0.50s): 宇宙飛翔・惑星衝突

(0.27s) 瞬時カットで宇宙空間のワイドショットへ. 固定カメラ。暗紫〜紺色の宇宙空間に恒星が10–15個散在。画面左下に赤い巨大惑星（大気のリム光あり）、画面右下に青い小惑星。画面中央やや左に太陽状の大フレア（赤い水平光条が左右500px）。フレアが縮小。彗星形状（白〜黄色の光核＋オレンジ〜赤の炎尾）が赤い惑星方向へ加速移動（炎尾100px→200pxへ伸長、移動速度30–60px/f）。

(0.23s) 微ズームイン。光核の中にキャラクターの人型シルエットが確認可能（高さ30px）。彗星が赤い惑星の大気圏に接近。ターコイズ色の六角形フレーム内にチェックマークUIが出現（グリッチ風色収差エフェクト付き）。惑星リム光に接触し、接触点からオレンジ色のフレアが放射状（6–8本）に広がり始める。

title: Coastal City Evolution 10,000-Year Timelapse
description: An ambitious timelapse video prompt depicting a coastal city's evolution through human history and into a sci-fi future in a single continuous forward dolly shot.
content: [CINEMATIC SETUP]  Film Style: Photorealistic 8K, 65mm IMAX. One continuous forward dolly — no cuts. The camera glides steadily forward at chest height, as if walking through time, while the coastal landscape and city evolve dramatically around it over 10,000 years.  Lens: 24mm wide-angle, shallow horizon line with subtle sea mist and horizon glow.  Color Grade: Soft dawn blues to warm earth tones to fiery sunset oranges to cool neon cyans to sterile white-silver, each era bleeding smoothly into the next.  Lighting: Natural daylight shifting to torchlight, gaslight, electric grids, holographic glow, and finally starlight — the illumination evolves with human progress.  Camera: Constant slow forward dolly movement. No lateral pans, no tilts. Seamless transitions through shared elements: shoreline becomes harbor becomes docks becomes launch platforms.  [TIMELINE — CONTINUOUS FORWARD DOLLY]  0-2s: PREHISTORIC SETTLEMENT. Glide forward along a wild rocky coastline at dawn. Simple thatched huts and stone circles assemble from scattered boulders and driftwood. Small fishing boats carve from logs on the beach. Early humans tend fires as smoke rises; shellfish mounds grow beside the path.  2-4s: ANCIENT PORT. The shoreline hardens into wooden piers. Mud huts transform into whitewashed stone buildings with red-tiled roofs. A bustling ancient harbor forms with wooden sailing ships docking. Marble columns rise on both sides. Olive groves and vineyards bloom rapidly along the advancing path.  4-6s: MEDIEVAL TRADE CITY. Stone walls and wooden structures give way to fortified castles and Gothic cathedrals. Cobblestone streets lay themselves underfoot. Markets assemble with colorful tents and horse-drawn carts. A grand harbor expands with larger galleons; cranes hoist cargo as the camera passes through sea spray and lantern light.  6-8s: INDUSTRIAL HARBOR. Cobblestones become paved roads. Brick factories and iron bridges replace medieval spires. Steamships and early railways emerge along the waterfront. Smokestacks rise, billowing dark plumes that fade into the next era. Warehouses and cranes multiply on both sides.  8-10s: MODERN METROPOLIS. Industrial grit transforms into sleek concrete and steel. Skyscrapers shoot upward in glass and chrome. Multi-lane highways and suspension bridges span the harbor. Cars and trains streak by with motion blur. Neon signs and digital billboards ignite sequentially as the city pulses with energy.  10-13s: NEAR-FUTURE MEGACITY. Glass towers evolve into towering arcologies with vertical gardens and glowing energy shields. Flying vehicles and maglev pods weave overhead. Holographic advertisements float in the air. The harbor fills with autonomous ships and floating platforms. Bioluminescent lights and drone swarms illuminate the scene.  13-15s: SPACE COLONY LAUNCH. The dense cityscape parts to reveal vast launch complexes on reclaimed land. Massive orbital elevators and starships stand ready.

title: Plot to Megacity Construction Timelapse

content: Cinematic timelapse sequence, 16:9, 15 seconds. Opens with a wide aerial shot looking down at a completely empty flat plot of land — dirt, nothing around it, golden morning light. Time begins accelerating. Foundation crews arrive, concrete is poured, steel frames rise from the ground. Roads begin forming outward in every direction. Buildings grow upward at timelapse speed — first small structures, then mid-rise, then massive gleaming skyscrapers shooting upward around the original plot. Construction cranes everywhere, scaffolding appearing and disappearing. The city fills in — roads packed with traffic, bridges appearing over rivers, neighborhoods expanding to the horizon. Day and night cycle rapidly — golden days, vivid blue skies, then nights with thousands of city lights glowing, neon signs flickering on, headlights streaming through streets like rivers of light. Seasons shift — summer heat haze, autumn colors, winter snow dusting the rooftops, spring green returning. Final shot pulls back wide revealing a full glittering megacity stretching to every horizon, lights blazing, alive. Camera locked on the original empty plot the entire time — now buried deep in the heart of the city. Photorealistic, IMAX cinematic quality, ultra sharp, vivid colors throughout, dramatic lighting at every stage, epic scale, smooth continuous timelapse motion from first frame to last.
