content:
Style: hyper-comedic, dramatic soap-opera parody, fast cuts, exaggerated reactions, anime-realism hybrid, vibrant lighting, TikTok UI overlays, chaotic energy
Scene 1 (0–1s)
Interior, messy bedroom. A white tiger in loose pajamas slurps instant noodles at a cluttered desk, eyes glued to a glowing monitor.
SFX: slurp slurp
White Tiger (muttering): “Let’s see what this stream is about...”
Scene 2 (1–2s)
Screen view: A beautiful white cat high school girl with a pink bob wig and sailor uniform dances energetically to upbeat J-pop style music. Floating comments and donations flood the screen.
Chat overlay: “SO CUTE!!!” “1000 YEN!!!” “Marry me!!!”
Scene 3 (2–3s)
Close-up: Donation pops up “¥1000”. The white cat’s eyes sparkle, she jumps higher, dancing more enthusiastically.
White Cat (cheerful): “Thank you for the donation~!!”
Scene 4 (3–4s)
She spins wildly, accidentally knocks the phone.
SFX: THUD
Filter glitches. Screen flickers.
Scene 5 (4–5s)
The filter abruptly turns off. The “cute white cat girl” is revealed as a tired old gray cat with stubble, still wearing the wig and uniform. Dead silence.
Scene 6 (5–6.5s)
Close-up: Old gray cat freezes, sweating.
Old Gray Cat (panicking): “Wait! This is—uh—an old-age filter! Yeah! Just a filter!”
Scene 7 (6.5–8s)
Cut to white tiger. Noodles shoot out of his mouth in slow motion.
SFX: SPPPPT!!!
White Tiger (shocked): “WHAT THE—?!”
Scene 8 (8–10s)
The tiger stands up in rage, fist trembling, then smashes the monitor.
SFX: CRASH!!!
White Tiger (furious): “I DONATED FOR THIS?!”
Scene 9 (10–12s)
Back to stream POV. Viewer count rapidly drops: 3000 → 1200 → 200 → 20 → 3
Chat overlay: “UNSUB.” “SCAM???” “BRO…”
Scene 10 (12–15s)
Close-up: Old gray cat staring at the screen. His expression shifts from shock to defeated sigh.
Old Gray Cat (quiet, exhausted): “...It was going so well.”
End Frame
Frozen frame on “3 followers” with dramatic soap-opera zoom-in and echo effect

title: Photorealistic Sandworm Hunt Short Film
description: An extremely detailed, multi-stage cinematic prompt for a desert chase sequence between a sail-skiff and a massive sandworm.
content:
Cinematic short film, photorealistic VFX. 15-second desert hunt at high noon. Blinding light, zero shade, heat shimmer on everything.

[0–2s] Overhead drone — red desert canyon system. Sandstone towers, wind-carved arches, dry riverbeds. One figure: a woman on a sand-skiff — a flat wooden board with a triangular sail, gliding across compacted sand on bone runners. She wears wrapped linen armor, copper goggles, a weighted net coiled at her waist. She watches the sand.

[2–4s] ECU the sand surface — it's BREATHING. Rippling outward from a point 200 yards ahead. The sand rises like a slow dome. The sail-woman cuts the skiff hard right. The dome ERUPTS — a sandworm. 40 feet, segmented, chitinous plates the color of rust. Its mouth is a vertical iris lined with grinding teeth like a rock crusher. Sand cascades off its body. It roars — the sound is DEEP, below human hearing, but you feel it shake the frame.

[4–7s] Chase through the canyon — the skiff banks between sandstone pillars. The worm follows UNDERGROUND — you see its path as a moving ridge of sand, smashing through the earth, pillars cracking as it passes beneath their foundations. She throws the weighted net — it wraps around a sandstone tower, rope trailing to her skiff.

[7–10s] The worm surfaces directly in the skiff's path. She leans the board, catches wind, and the skiff JUMPS — airborne over the worm's back. In mid-air she drives a barbed stake into the top of its head plate. Lands the skiff on the other side. Rope connects stake to the sandstone tower.

[10–13s] The worm charges away — the rope goes taut against the tower. The tower HOLDS. The worm's momentum whiplashes it sideways. It crashes into a canyon wall. Sandstone debris cascades. Dust cloud erupts like a bomb. Silence inside the cloud.

[13–15s] Dust settles. The worm lies against the canyon wall, breathing but pinned. She brings the skiff alongside, pulls her goggles up. Beneath the goggles — calm, focused eyes. She draws a curved knife and begins cutting a single iridescent scale from the worm's flank — the harvest. That's all she came for. One scale. The worm hisses but doesn't fight. She pats its flank once, takes the scale, pushes off. The skiff catches wind. She vanishes between the sandstone towers. Cut to black. Ultra-realistic.

description: A hyper-realistic handheld phone video prompt of school children playing inside a dust devil in rural Brazil, complete with shot-by-shot directions and audio cues.
content:
A hyper-real handheld mobile phone video set in an open dusty field in rural Brazil. Dry sandy ground, scattered trees, distant low houses. Bright midday sunlight, warm tones, slight haze. Visual style is slightly compressed with natural shake and motion blur, like real phone footage. Ambient sound includes wind, children laughing, and dust swirling.

Shot 1 (0–2s):
Handheld POV. A group of school kids with backpacks run across a dusty field toward a spinning dust devil forming ahead. The wind kicks up sand in circular motion. The kids are excited, shouting and laughing as they approach.

Shot 2 (2–5s):
The dust devil grows stronger, swirling rapidly. One kid jumps into it and gets lifted slightly, spinning playfully. Others follow immediately, running and jumping in. Bags, loose sand, and small debris swirl around them.

Shot 3 (5–8s):
Inside the dust devil, multiple kids are lifted and spun in different directions, laughing uncontrollably. One kid gets tossed out gently, lands on the ground, laughs, and runs back in. Another spins mid-air holding onto their backpack straps.

Shot 4 (8–10/12s):
The camera operator laughs loudly, slightly zooming in. The dust devil continues spinning the kids like a chaotic merry-go-round. Final moment: one kid flies slightly upward with arms wide, laughing.

title: First-Person POV Hangzhou Dining Prank
description: A detailed first-person perspective video prompt for Seedance 2.0 involving a character interaction and a humorous reaction to food at West Lake, Hangzhou.
content:
realistic live-action, single continuous shot, full first-person POV, no cuts, no angle changes, no scene transitions, no montage, no flash cuts, no music, no subtitles. Only two characters: my unseen first-person POV and @ Image1 sitting across from me. Natural ambient sound only: light restaurant noise, tableware, distant water, faint voices, chewing, spitting, rinsing, my laughter.

Setting:
Outdoor dining table beside West Lake, Hangzhou, near the water, calm daylight or soft late afternoon light. Real smartphone-video realism, grounded textures, realistic food, realistic body and hand motion, accurate chopstick use, accurate mouth movement, accurate eye focus. The lake stays visible to one side of frame.

Character:
@ Image1 is the only visible person. She can switch seamlessly between slightly fierce-cute and soft adorable. Lip sync, voice, expressions, and body language stay fully synchronized. Emotional arc: cheerful and relaxed while eating, then shocked disgust, then angry embarrassment.

Table:
Exactly 7 dishes on the table. One dish is the West Lake vinegar fish shown in @ Image2. @ Image1 is happily eating rice and the other dishes, but not the fish at first. The table feels full but readable. The fish dish remains clearly visible before I offer it to her.

Camera:
Entire video is from my seated first-person view across the table. My hand and chopsticks may enter frame naturally. Slight handheld micro-shake from breathing and laughter only, never chaotic. No third-person shots, no reverse shots, no overhead shots, no cutaways. Continuous believable framing centered on @ Image1 with part of the lake visible.

Action:
@ Image1 sits opposite me, happily eating from her bowl, enjoying rice and other dishes except the West Lake vinegar fish. She looks bright, playful, relaxed, cute.

From first-person POV, I pick up one bite of the fish with chopsticks and slowly extend it toward her. She notices it immediately, trusts me, leans forward, opens her mouth happily, and makes a cute “aam” sound as she bites the fish. I gently pull the chopsticks and my hand back out of frame.

She chews happily for about one second, expecting it to taste good. Then the taste hits. Her expression changes instantly into exaggerated but believable disgust. Her face shifts into a comedic purple-disgust reaction while staying within realistic live-action style. She quickly turns toward the lake and spits it out with repeated “ptui, ptui, ptui” sounds. The motion is fast, fluid, and continuous from chewing to rejection.

The moment she starts spitting, I begin laughing in first-person POV and keep laughing through the whole reaction. My laughter sounds genuine, amused, and uncontrollable, coming from behind the camera. The camera shakes slightly from laughing.

After spitting, @ Image1 sticks out her tongue in disgust, immediately grabs the water on the table

title: NBA Finals Game-Winning Moment
description: An extremely detailed 15-second storyboard prompt simulating a live broadcast of a game-winning shot in an NBA Finals atmosphere.
content: Theme: The final play in the atmosphere of the NBA Finals, a superstar's step-back three-pointer for the game-winning shot. Duration: 15 seconds. Frame: 9:16. Vertical screen. Style: Ultra-realistic sports live broadcast + cinematic bullet time replay of key moments. Core principle: Like a live broadcast, not a game, not a commercial studio shoot. 15-second storyboard: 0.0s - 2.5s Close-up sideline shot, the protagonist dribbles the ball at a 45-degree angle on the right side. The arena is packed, with a real score bar and countdown at the top. The camera shakes slightly, like a handheld stabilizer used with a telephoto lens for broadcasting. The rubbing of shoes and the suppressed cheers of the crowd can be heard. 2.5s - 5.0s The defender closes in, the protagonist dribbles and changes direction repeatedly, probing with his shoulder, the physical contact is obvious. The camera zooms in on the dribbling area above the chest and waist, sweat, breathing, and jersey movements are clearly visible. The basket remains visible in the upper part of the frame. 5.0s - 7.0s The protagonist suddenly stops and steps back, creating half a step of space. The timer has only 2 to 3 seconds left. The commentator's volume rises, and the audience begins to stand. This is a build-up of emotion, no slow motion. 7.0s - 8.5s: Jump and release, entering bullet time. The camera circles in a semi-circle from the protagonist's side and front, moving at an extremely slow speed. Focused close-ups: fingers flicking the ball, beads of sweat hanging in the air, jersey fibers, shoe soles leaving the ground, audience flashes, the backboard and lights creating a strong sense of spatial depth. 8.5s - 10.5s: Instantly returning to normal speed, the basketball arcs high towards the basket. The camera zooms in slightly, the net, rim, and scoreboard all in focus. The sound effects tighten, briefly lowering the ambient noise to make the basket more impactful. 10.5s - 12.0s: Swish through the net, the \"swish\" of the net is very clear, the buzzer sounds almost simultaneously. The score changes, the commentator explodes, the audience erupts. 12.0s - 15.0s: The protagonist lands, turns around, and roars or spreads his arms in celebration; teammates rush over, the audience erupts in cheers, and cell phone flashes fill the screen. The camera then switches back to a live broadcast style, retaining a slight sense of compression and the chaotic atmosphere of the scene, like capturing the actual moment after the match.

title: The Seed - Time and Scale Transition
description: A complex, continuous-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 that moves through time and scale in the Amazon rainforest, from a seed to orbital perspective.
content: THE SEED — Amazon Rainforest, One Tree, All Time One impossible continuous shot. Through matter. Through scale. Through time. No cuts. [0s–2s] The camera floats in the canopy of the Amazon rainforest. Dense, dripping, impossibly green. Toucans call. Monkeys move through branches. The camera drifts downward through layers of leaves — each layer a different shade of green, a different species, a different world. Light falls in shifting patterns. [2s–4s] The camera reaches the forest floor. Dark, humid, teeming. A seed sits in the black soil — a Brazil nut, mahogany-colored, the size of a fist. The camera pushes in. Closer. Closer. It passes into the soil. Darkness. Roots thread through the earth like veins. Underground, the unseen network. [4s–6s] The camera shrinks. It enters the seed itself. Inside, cellular structures — green, geometric, pulsing with water. The camera witnesses germination in time-lapse. A root breaks through the seed coat. A shoot pushes upward. Cells divide in radial symmetry. Life organizes itself. [6s–8s] The shoot breaks the surface. The camera rises with it. Time accelerates. The seedling becomes a sapling. Rain falls in fast-motion streaks. The sapling thickens — a year per second. Branches extend. The trunk widens. Bark forms, furrows, hardens. A decade of growth in two seconds. [8s–11s] The tree is adult now. Enormous. The camera pulls back as the trunk widens to 3 meters across. The canopy spreads. Animals arrive — a sloth climbs the trunk, orchids bloom on the branches, a jaguar sleeps in a crook of the roots. An entire ecosystem built around one organism. The camera rises with the tree as it reaches for the canopy. [11s–13s] The tree breaks through the canopy ceiling. Sunlight. The camera emerges from the green into open sky. For the first time, the scale of the forest is visible — an unbroken ocean of green stretching to every horizon. Rivers thread through it like silver veins. Clouds build. The tree is one cell in a body the size of a continent. [13s–15s] The camera keeps rising. The Amazon basin curves with the Earth. The planet's edge appears. Blue atmosphere against black space. The forest is a green lung on a blue world. One seed. One tree. One forest. One planet. The same thing at every scale. Cut to black. Impossible continuous shot: canopy → soil → inside seed → germination time-lapse → tree growth → canopy emergence → continental aerial → orbital perspective. title: Speeder Chase Cliffside City Action
description: An extremely detailed, multi-part action prompt for a continuous shot speeder chase through a cliffside city, waterfall, and ancient caves.
content: Speeder chase across a cliff city (single continuous shot) From a monumental cliffside city carved into stone, the camera dives toward a tiny streak of light ripping along a narrow ledge-road. Lock-on: a speeder hugging the wall at insane speed. The camera slingshots ahead, whips back, then drops tight to the rear thrusters: heat haze, grit snapping off the ledge, warning lights flashing. A collapsing balcony rains debris; the rider snaps a last-inch swerve under a falling arch, then threads through hanging laundry lines and open windows in one fluid line. The camera darts through the same openings, staying glued to the motion. One final bend and sudden calm: the camera blasts outward into a reveal of the city opening onto a boundless waterfall-fed valley, mist turning into rainbow.The rainbow mist lingers for half a second — serenity — then a SHADOW slices across it. From above, two black pursuit speeders dive through the mist, engines screaming. The camera tilts up just as the lead speeder banks hard off the cliff edge, skimming inches above the waterfall’s roaring drop. Spray explodes across the lens but never cuts. The camera rolls with the rider as they plunge straight down the waterfall face — not falling, but riding the vertical air current. Thrusters flare blue-white, stabilizers flickering. Pursuit crafts follow, firing pulse shots that streak through the mist like comets. The rider kicks sideways into a cavern hidden behind the waterfall curtain. The camera punches through liquid light into darkness — bioluminescent moss ignites along the cave walls, revealing an ancient tunnel carved by forgotten hands. Water drips in slow motion as the speed never drops. The camera swings low beneath the speeder, hugging the water-slick stone. Sparks burst as the underside grazes rock. Ahead: a broken bridge spanning a massive underground chasm. No slowdown. The rider guns it. The camera races ahead, flips 180° mid-air as the speeder launches the gap. For a breathless second, only void below — a bottomless abyss glowing faintly with magma veins. Mid-jump, one pursuer clips the edge and spirals down, vanishing into the darkness. The second clears it. Landing hard, the rider blasts toward a vertical shaft of daylight spearing down from above. The tunnel narrows — ancient gears and colossal stone mechanisms begin turning, triggered by the intrusion. Rotating rings. Crushing slabs.

Her freckled skin shows warm subsurface scattering in the bright afternoon daylight, giving her cheeks a healthy, lifelike glow. title: Samurai Sword Slash and Noto Ritual
description: A highly detailed cinematic video prompt for Seedance 2.0 that describes an explosive sword draw, magenta energy effects, and a slow, deliberate sheathing sequence with calligraphic kanji appearing in the finale.
content: Extreme close-up from low angle. The torso twists away from the draw side — the left shoulder drops forward, the right shoulder pulls back, weight loading into the rear hip. Magenta energy arcs swirl around the torso, building intensity. A bright flash ignites at the sword hilt.The body uncoils — explosive rush directly toward the camera with heavy motion blur and diagonal speed streaks. The face fills the frame for one instant, eyes locked forward — then the drawn blade sweeps past in a magenta flash and the figure is already behind the camera, shrinking to a distant silhouette against the dark horizon.The sky erupts with criss-crossing sword flash lines — each slash cuts diagonally across the full width of the sky, intersecting other slashes at random angles. Each line appears as a thick bright beam — white-blue core with magenta edges — then gradually thins and fades to a thin pink trace. New lines continuously appear while older ones dissipate. The layered effect builds to peak density before slowly subsiding.The camera rushes forward to catch up. A glowing blade trail sweeps across the lens. The figure stands in noto posture — right hand raised above the left shoulder holding the sword at a diagonal, left hand at waist level guiding the blade toward the scabbard opening.The blade gleams with a bright star-burst sparkle at its midpoint. Inch by inch over several seconds, the right hand lowers — the glowing sword descends in a slow, deliberate arc toward the waiting left hand. The gleam intensifies at the point where blade meets scabbard.The instant the blade seats — a massive magenta-white explosion of light detonates from behind. Radial beams shoot outward in every direction. The figure becomes a pure silhouette against the overwhelming brightness.Within the light burst, the kanji 斬 materializes in bold calligraphic brushstrokes — dark ink against the blinding glow. Ink-splash drip effects trail from the base of each stroke. A bright horizontal magenta beam slices through the center of the kanji, and the character fragments along the cut line — upper strokes drift upward, lower strokes drift downward, as if space itself has been bisected. The magenta glow gradually dims. The fractured kanji holds its split position as the light fades to a twilight afterglow.

title: Detailed Gacha Game Summon Animation
description: An extensive master prompt for creating professional gacha game 'summon' or 'gacha' animations with complex transitions, UI overlays, and rarity reveals.
content:
参考画像はリファレンスとしてのみ使用し、スタートフレームには使用しない。 ソシャゲのガチャ演出風。アップテンポで高揚感のあるBGM、電子音・抽選音・確定演出音などの効果音あり。

開始直後、以下の演出に入る。 超高速トランジション。
空間が歪み、ガラスのように砕け、破片が光へ変換され吸い込まれていく。
強いホワイトアウト。 その直後カット。 暗い空間に、
参考画像から連想される特徴を極端に誇張した「異常に奇抜なガチャ装置」がすでに存在している状態で描写される。 （例：キャラの髪色・モチーフ・世界観がそのまま機械化されている）
・巨大すぎる構造
・非現実的な回転機構
・浮遊パーツ
・光る配管やエネルギー流路
・意味不明だがかっこいい動き 装置内部にはエネルギーが循環し、脈動している。 画面中央に「TAP」「PULL」「OPEN」などの操作UIが表示される。
UIはネオン調で強く発光し、軽く振動. 操作と同時に、
装置が暴走するように振動・回転・発光。
エネルギーが臨界に達し、一点に収束。 カット変更。 排出演出：
参考画像の特徴から連想される「入れ物」が装置からぽろっと排出される。 （例）
・カプセル
・卵
・結晶
・箱
・缶
・巻物
・食べ物風オブジェ 形状・質感・色は参照画像から決定される。 入れ物は一度バウンドし、床や空間に軽く衝突して転がる。
その瞬間、ひび割れ・発光・内部からエネルギーが漏れ出す。 レアリティ判定演出：
・高レア：虹色・プリズム・画面全体に光が拡散 入れ物が震えながら、
徐々に浮き上がる。 カット変更。 入れ物が爆発的に開く。
内部から光と粒子が噴き出し、
参考画像の特徴を誇張したシルエットが出現。 強いフラッシュ。 カット変更。 参考画像の背景の雰囲気を継承した空間がすでに存在している状態で描写される（切り替えではなく、最初からそこにあるように見える）。
差し込む光、霧、粒子、空気の流れ。 キャラクターが中央に出現。 カメラ演出：
・足元から急速パン→顔へ
・周囲を回転しながら寄る
・キャラクターは躍動感にあふれる動き
・スローモーション→加速 キャラクターの周囲に、
参考画像から連想される属性エフェクトが発生。 （例）
・炎、水、雷、氷、光、闇、機械、自然など
・色や形状は参照画像の印象から決定 さらに、
属性マーク（エンブレム）がキャラクター背後または上空に出現し、
発光・回転・分裂する。 同時に、
画面全体にパーティクルが大量発生し、
レンズフレア、衝撃波、光の筋が走る. 画面中央に巨大テキスト： 「SSR」「UR」「LEGEND」などのレアリティ表示
（参考画像の印象から自動決定） 続いて、
参考画像の見た目から連想される
“異常に誇張された二つ名”を生成して表示。 さらにキャラクター名も生成表示。 追加UI演出： ・画面下部に豪華なキャラカードUIが出現
・枠は金・虹などに強く発光
・星の数が1つずつポップアップ
・カードが回転・スライド・発光 ステータス表示：
・HP / ATK / DEF / SPEED などが高速でカウントアップ
・数値は参照画像の印象から自動生成 スキル表示：
・スキル名を生成して表示
（例：「次元崩壊ブレイク」「無限反射オーラ」など）
・スキル発動のミニ演出（短いエフェクト） レア時追加演出：
・背景が一瞬変異（宇宙・崩壊・神殿など）
・画面揺れ + 強いフラッシュ
・粒子量増加 最終カット： キャラクターがカッコいい決めポーズで静止。
・キャラクターから連想される「称号」とカッコいい「名前」を画面にカッコいいハイセンスなデザインロゴで表示する。
背後に属性エンブレム、周囲にエネルギーが循環し続ける。
UIが軽く発光し続け、ループ可能な状態で終了。 スタイル：

content: 朝の光が差し込む部屋でベッドからコミカルに飛び起き、洗面台で眠そうに歯を磨く。キッチンでトーストの飛び出しに驚いた後、朝焼けの中を出発すると空中に「Good Morning」の文字が浮かび上がる。突然2Dアニメスタイルに切り替わり、猛スピードで街を駆け抜ける。実写に戻り、オフィスに到着して自信満々にポーズを決める。薄暗いオフィスで猛烈にタイピングするが、エラー画面に絶望する。再び2Dアニメになり、大量の書類と格闘する。実写に戻り、ドヤ顔でエンターキーを叩くとドラマチックな赤いスポットライトを浴びる。夜の公園をイルミネーションの下でスキップしながら帰り、部屋に着いて安堵する。ソファで丸まってくつろぎ、ベッドに入って布団を被る。目を閉じると部屋が暗くなり、「Good Night」の文字が星屑のように消えていく、という展開の15秒の縦型テレビCM風映像。

title: Epic Ink-Wash Fantasy Warrior Scene
description: A comprehensive cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a female warrior on a cliff top above a giant turtle carrying an ancient city. Includes detailed character design, lighting, and a 15-second camera timeline.
content: 主体角色： 一位年轻女性战士，黑色长发编成多股辫，发丝在风中飞扬如墨色旗帜。面容冷峻苍白，眉目深邃，嘴唇微抿，目光如刃。身穿通体暗黑色金属铠甲，铠甲表面流动着微弱的星辰光点，如同将银河碎片锻入钢铁之中。左肩披垂一面星空斗篷，深蓝与漆黑交织，其上散落无数细密的金色光尘。双手握持一柄与身等高的黑铁巨剑，剑身宽阔厚重，剑柄末端雕饰繁复的哥特式花纹，剑刃隐隐流转暗紫色的光弧。 环境场景： 东方水墨洪荒世界。一只亘古神龟缓缓从苍茫大海中升起，龟壳之上层叠着一座完整的东方巨型古城——飞檐斗拱的殿宇、密布的阁楼廊桥、倾斜的宝塔与层层叠叠的瓦屋依山势蔓延至龟背最高处。神龟四足如石柱般插入海中，足间瀑布般倾泻海水。海面弥漫着浓重的雾气，天空被铅灰色云层压得极低，偶有闪电在云缝中无声游走。神龟背上古城的最高处是一面断崖绝壁，崖顶孤立于云雾之上，崖面垂直而下，石壁上嵌满被海风侵蚀千年的古老石刻。 色彩与光线： 整体水墨青灰色调，深蓝与靛青的海面，雾白色的大气透视，铠甲上的星辰光点提供微弱的暖金色散光。闪电为冷白色，瞬间照亮时将角色剪影投射在云幕上。崖顶最后一刻，乌云裂开一线天光，苍白的日光如神谕般垂直倾泻在角色身上。 风格： 实拍电影质感，连续物理运镜，自然的镜头惯性与呼吸感，真实大气透视，水墨意境与暗黑奇幻交融，无CG痕迹，画面带有胶片颗粒与微妙的镜头畸变。 时间线： 0:00–0:03 镜头从海面以下开始，水下一片幽暗的深蓝。巨大的神龟腿部如远古石柱般矗立在浑浊的海水中，镜头沿着龟腿表面缓慢上升，苔藓、藤壶和被海水浸泡千年的石刻纹路从镜头前掠过。海水中悬浮着细小的光尘颗粒。镜头穿破海面的一瞬间，水珠附着在镜头上缓缓滑落，世界从沉默的深蓝骤然切换为风声呼啸的灰白雾海。 0:03–0:06 镜头继续向上攀升，随惯性略微摇晃。神龟背上的古城逐渐显露全貌——底层是倾颓的渔村废墟与生锈的铁链吊桥，中层是密集错落的屋舍与狭窄的石阶巷道，火光从某些窗口中隐约透出。一条巨蟒般的锁链从城中高塔垂挂而下，链环上刻满梵文般的封印符号，在风中发出低沉的金属呻吟。镜头穿过两座倾斜的塔楼之间的缝隙，碎石与瓦片从上方坠落，擦着镜头边缘掠过。 0:06–0:09 镜头以弧线运动绕至古城侧面，一只苍灰色的巨鹰从雾中无声掠出，翼展遮蔽半个画面，气流扰动使镜头轻微震颤。镜头跟随巨鹰飞行轨迹向上偏转，揭示出断崖绝壁的全貌——垂直的石壁高耸入云，崖面上凿刻着巨大的古神浮雕，面容已被风化得模糊不清，唯有空洞的双眼仍然令人不安。崖壁上有一条极窄的石阶蜿蜒而上，女战士的身影出现在石阶中段，正在攀登。她的星空斗篷在风中猛烈翻卷，巨剑斜背在身后，剑尖拖出的暗紫色光弧在雾气中留下一道短暂的残影。 0:09–0:12 镜头切换至崖顶平台的边缘，以低角度仰拍。女战士的手掌先出现在崖沿，指尖的金属护甲扣入岩石裂缝，然后她整个人翻身跃上崖顶。落地的瞬间碎石四溅，她的黑发被气流扬起如墨色火焰。她单膝跪地喘息片刻，铠甲上的星辰光点此刻明灭不定，仿佛在与她的心跳同步。她缓缓站起，面朝悬崖边缘，身前是万丈虚空——远处海平面上，更多神龟的轮廓在雾中若隐若现，组成一支沉默的远古舰队。风从深渊中涌上来，撕扯着她的斗篷和发辫。 0:12–0:15 她向前迈出最后一步，双足站在崖顶最前端的碎石之上。她缓缓将巨剑从背后拔出，剑身与背甲摩擦发出刺耳的金属嘶鸣。她双手握住剑柄，将巨剑高高举过头顶。就在此刻，头顶铅灰色云层猛然撕裂，一道苍白刺目的天光如利刃般从云缝中直劈而下，精准地照在她和剑刃之上。巨剑上的暗紫色光弧在天光激发下骤然爆发，沿剑身蔓延出无数细密的电弧与星尘碎片，如同银河在剑刃上重新凝聚。她的剪影被投射在身后翻涌的云墙上，放大成一个巨大的暗影。远处海面上的神龟群同时发出低沉的共鸣，海水开始震荡，雾气被声波推开形成同心圆。镜头缓缓后拉，画面逐渐展开为全景——孤崖之巅，一人一剑，脚下是驮载着千年古城的洪荒巨兽，身后是苍茫无尽的雾海与沉默行进的神龟舰队，天光如柱，万物俯首。

title: Porsche 911 GT3 RS Night Street Race
description: A comprehensive cinematic video prompt for Seedance 2.0 that generates a high-speed racing sequence. It includes detailed instructions for character consistency, environment lighting, and a shot-by-shot sequence breakdown for a professional cinematic look.
content:
Cinematic night street racing sequence featuring a Porsche 911 GT3 RS with a focused female driver (use Image1 as the face reference). Maintain exact facial identity from the reference image throughout the entire video.

Ultra-realistic visuals with smooth transitions between interior and exterior shots.

Driver
Young female driver whose face matches Image1 exactly. Face must remain consistent across every frame with no morphing or identity drift. Sharp eyes, composed yet aggressive expression. Subtle confidence. Dashboard lights and passing street neon naturally illuminate her face inside the dark cabin.

Environment
Dense neon-lit city at night. Wet asphalt reflecting pink, blue, and purple lights. Narrow high-end urban streets, tunnels, and glass buildings reflecting the speeding car. Atmospheric mist and light road spray enhance realism.

Camera Flow
Dynamic cinematic movement with seamless transitions between shots:
face close-up → over-shoulder → macro detail → exterior tracking → low ground perspective.
Use controlled whip pans, speed ramps, and natural motion blur to emphasize speed while keeping the subject sharp.

Sequence
0–2s
Extreme close-up of the female driver’s face. Eyes focused forward. One hand tightens on the steering wheel. Dashboard glow softly lights her face.
2–4s
Over-shoulder interior shot showing the road ahead. Neon reflections sweep across the windshield and her face as the car accelerates.
4–6s
Macro detail: her finger presses the drive mode selector. Quick cut back to her eyes reacting. Engine RPM rises.
6–8s
Exterior side tracking shot. Porsche 911 GT3 RS launches forward aggressively, tires gripping wet asphalt.
8–10s
Low ground shot near the wheels. Tires spin rapidly, reflections stretch across the wet road.
10–12s
High-speed run through tight neon streets. Rapid cinematic cuts between exterior chase shots and interior close-ups of her focused face.

Visual Style
Ultra-realistic cinematic lighting. Strong neon reflections on the car and wet pavement. Realistic vehicle physics, detailed Porsche design, natural motion blur to convey speed.

Final Requirements
Maintain consistent Porsche 911 GT3 RS appearance and stable facial identity matching Image1 across all frames. Smooth continuous motion, no distortion, no face morphing, and no design changes to the vehicle.

title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: Spring Imprisonment (Ancient Romance)
description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a dramatic ancient Chinese romance video sequence titled 'Spring Imprisonment,' specifying cinematic style, lighting, character details (using reference images), and a four-part script with dialogue and camera movements.
content:
画质风格： 电影感，4K超清，极致丝滑CG。
光影氛围： 柔和梦幻的春日晨光，丁达尔效应，高光带轻微光晕。
环境元素： 古风窗边，窗外繁花似锦，粉色花瓣随风轻旋入室。
角色设定：
女主【@图1】： 少女妆容，娇俏灵动。身着粉色轻盈纱裙，流苏头饰摇曳。
男主【@图2】： 清冷白衣。面容俊美但眼神幽深，带有极强的侵略性。

分镜脚本
第一镜：幻梦春光·错愕
镜头由窗外的春色平移至室内。女主坐在窗台边，粉色纱裙铺散，流苏头饰随动作细微晃动。
男主从后方弯腰，双臂形成合围之势，将女主环在胸前。

“夫人？”女主眼神慌乱，瞳孔微颤，嘴唇嗫嚅，满脸不可置信：“可是……我们不是说好只是演戏吗？你……你说话不算话！”
镜头： 中近景，侧向构图，强调两人空间的挤压感。
光效： 逆光勾勒人物轮廓金边，花瓣在两人之间穿梭掠过。

第二镜：耳畔低语·战栗
男主埋首于女主颈窝，凑近耳廓。特写镜头捕捉到他胸腔微震的低笑动作。
灼热的气息让女主白皙的耳根迅速泛红，身体因紧绷而产生细微的战栗。
男主唇角挂着势在必得的弧度，眼神深邃如墨。
镜头语言： 极近特写（耳部、颈部），强调感官接触的张力。

第三镜：牢笼宣告·入局
男主微微侧头，唇瓣几乎贴上女主的唇，声音低沉危险：“演戏？夫人，我的演技很好……好到能演一辈子。”
女主脸色由粉转白，目光从惊慌变为彻底的僵硬，仿佛看到无形的华丽牢笼正在收紧。
男主直视女主双眼，眼底黑雾浓重，透着“绝对掌控”的压迫感。

镜头： 两人面部对峙特写，焦点在男主充满野心的双眸与女主发白的嘴唇之间切换。

第四镜：深情禁锢·终幕
男主一字一顿宣誓：“这辈子，都别想逃。”
话音落下，他扣住女主后脑，强势而深情地吻住。
窗外风起，大片花瓣卷入室内，围绕两人飞舞，梦幻的春光掩盖了令人窒息的占有欲。
镜头： 镜头缓慢拉远，由近景转为全景，定格在繁花簇拥下的拥吻剪影。

音效
环境音： 窗外轻微的鸟鸣、风吹树叶的沙沙声。
人声： 男主磁性、沙哑的低笑，带有颗粒感的耳语。
BGM： 前期为轻柔的空灵钢琴，后期转入带有压抑感、逐渐激昂的管弦乐。

title: Prehistoric Dirt Bike POV: Racing Against Dinosaurs
description: A highly detailed, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to generate a first-person perspective video of a dirt bike rider racing through a prehistoric canyon while being hunted by dinosaurs. The prompt specifies visual style, character details, stage setting, emotional arc, color logic, and a precise timeline with SFX for a cinematic, high-adrenaline sequence.
content:
VISUAL STYLE: Use live-action feature film realism with crisp action-camera sharpness and prehistoric atmospheric haze. Subtle motion blur from vibration, micro-jitters from suspension stress.

CHARACTERS: Define a strict POV with mud-slick gloved hands gripping a dirt bike handlebar. Right hand aggressively feathering a sticking throttle, left hand riding a loose clutch lever. Boots locked onto vibrating foot pegs. Multiple massive prehistoric predators crossing and reacting to the path.

STAGE: A vast prehistoric canyon descending into dense fern canopy, a narrow river corridor, and a churned mud clearing under harsh daylight haze.

EMOTIONAL TARGET: Escalate from adrenaline control → mechanical failure → irreversible hunted panic.

COLOR LOGIC: Naturalistic Film Print Emulation with dust diffusion and sun-baked highlights.

⏱️ TIMELINE

00:00.0
Open on a hard POV at the canyon edge. Ultra-wide 14mm action lens. Engine already screaming too high — throttle is partially stuck. The bike lurches forward violently without full control. Hands fight the bar as the front wheel drops over the edge into a steep descent.
 SFX: Engine over-revving, chain rattle, gravel spray, wind blast.
00:03.2
Maintain uninterrupted POV. Bomb through dense treetop gaps and uneven terrain. A massive long-neck herbivore crosses ahead — the rider jerks the bar, barely missing its swinging neck. Throttle spikes unpredictably mid-turn.
 SFX: Engine surge spikes, deep animal bellow, branches snapping.
00:06.5
Dive into a narrow river corridor. Wet rock and mud reduce traction — rear tire fishtails violently. A flock of pterosaurs erupts across the path. The rider slips the clutch desperately to regain control, but revs surge again.
 SFX: Tire slipping, water spray, frantic wingbeats, engine scream.

00:09.8
Blast out of the river bend into thick mud. The throttle sticks wide open. The rider tries braking — response is weak. Speed becomes uncontrollable. The bike bucks hard, suspension slamming.
 SFX: Engine maxed out, brake squeal fading, mud tearing under tire.
00:12.4
Lose stability — partial wipeout. The bike skids sideways, camera dips violently but stays POV. Boots slam into mud, hands still gripping as momentum drags forward.
00:13.6
At ground level, stagger forward two steps after release. Breathing heavy. Look up—

A charging Spinosaurus bursts through river mist, jaws wide, closing distance instantly until teeth fill the frame.
SFX: Ground-shaking impacts, guttural roar, snapping jaws, abrupt cut.
🚫 EXCLUDE

Avoid third-person cuts, clean/stable riding, perfect control, teleporting terrain, frozen creatures, modern polished bike aesthetics, impossible recovery from skids, unrealistic suspension behavior.

Single continuous shot — no cuts, no camera movement.

0–1s [GENESIS]

4–6s [RIBBON → TORUS]

6–8s [TORUS → DATA RINGS]

Each ring carries small evenly spaced white nodes, like data points orbiting in precise synchronization.
8–10s [NETWORK]
Thin lines connect the orbiting nodes across rings, forming a dynamic geometric network.
Connections appear and disappear algorithmically, suggesting intelligence and computation.
10–11.5s [COMPRESSION]

13–14s [DISASSEMBLY]

14–15s [IDENTITY REVEAL]

title: Seedance 2.0 CG Video Prompt: Tea Kill - Instant Purgatory
description: An extremely detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a CG video titled 'Tea Kill - Instant Purgatory.' The video features a young female cult leader using superheated spiritual tea from a mystical cauldron to violently annihilate an army, emphasizing high-contrast visuals, complex camera movements, and intense sound design.
content:
视觉风格： 国风动漫3D CG，IMAX电影级画质。
氛围基调： 反差暴力美学，魔性、邪气、优雅、残忍并存。
色调： 墨青、暗金、琥珀、翠绿为主，高对比度，空间纵深感强。
人物设定： 年轻女性教主。面容绝美冷艳，五官锋利，墨绿色长发高束。身着墨青色战裙式战袍，浮动暗金水纹。
关键道具： 悬浮九龙紫砂神鼎（古朴深紫，暗金纹流转，内盛超高温灵茶）。
通用音效： 全程贯穿低沉风压、远处军阵轰鸣、甲胄摩擦、战旗猎猎声。

0-3秒
景别： 微距极近特写->超微距跟拍-> 极速主观俯冲。

画面内容：
镜头锁定主角右眼。深邃茶色眼眸带暗金流光，清晰倒映出城外黑压压的十万大军与战场火光。眼底尽是玩味与轻蔑。
镜头微移，她唇角微勾，露出一抹轻轻的冷笑。
单手托举的九龙紫砂神鼎悬浮于空，鼎口灵茶翻滚，热浪扭曲空气。
她伸出两根纤长手指，动作极其优雅诡异，从翻腾的热蒸汽中慢条斯理地捻起一片翠绿嫩叶。
镜头贴近茶叶。嫩叶脱手飞出的瞬间，时间仿佛放缓。
茶叶开始高速自旋，锋利的边缘切裂空气，周围炸开细密的音爆云与火花。
镜头切换至茶叶主观视角（或紧跟茶叶），极速向高空下的战场中心俯冲，失重感强烈。

音效强化： 鼎内滚水轰鸣声、蒸汽低吼声、茶叶破空与空气被极致撕裂的尖锐声。

3-6秒
景别： 极速下坠 ->极致广角全景-> 高空俯拍。

画面内容：
镜头跟随茶叶狂暴下坠，在触地前的一瞬间，猛然拉成极致广角全景。
那片轻飘飘的茶叶落地。
视觉奇观生成： 以落点为中心，整片地表瞬间液化。土石、战车、铁甲、旌旗全部被高温的琥珀色灵茶吞没。
古战场轰然化作无边无际、翻滚沸腾的茶海。
高温茶浪裹挟着毁灭气息疯狂扩散，敌军成片跌入茶海。铁制铠甲迅速烧红、软化、熔毁，大片白色蒸汽冲天而起，遮蔽天空。
镜头升至高空俯拍，黑云压城下，整片战场变成了一锅沸腾的炼狱茶汤。温润的琥珀色下是极致的残酷。

音效强化： 地表瞬间液化的沉闷声、茶海沸腾声、铠甲熔毁的吱嘎声、敌军凄厉惨叫与蒸汽爆响声。

6-10秒
景别： 低空疾掠 -> 极速推进（正面） -> 跟随抬升 ->穿梭风暴-> 俯冲切回。

画面内容：
镜头贴着沸腾的茶海表面低空疾掠，两侧是翻卷的茶液，蒸汽扑面而来。
镜头极速推近主角正面。她立于高处，不染尘埃，墨绿长发与墨青战袍在屠杀造成的热风中狂舞。
眼神骤然收紧，杀意如实质般刺出。
她轻轻动了动指尖。半空中那片最初的茶叶无声裂开，随即疯狂裂变。
数量激增： 百亿片翡翠般锋利的茶叶暴涨而出，遮蔽天幕。
镜头顺着叶群猛然抬升。无数茶叶交织，汇聚成数道接天连地的绿色龙卷风暴，贯穿茶海、军阵与乌云。
风暴卷起无数敌军与战马，他们在密密麻麻的叶刃中被反复切割、碾碎、粉化。
最终，所有人和物全部化作金绿色的发光茶尘。
镜头先是在风暴内部穿梭，展现极致的切割细节，随后跟随一股最凶狠的龙卷俯冲切回战场。画面华丽、妖异、干净利落。

音效强化： 无数茶叶高速切割的嘶嘶声（类似高压水枪）、风暴狂啸声、兵器集体断裂声、肉体与骨骼被粉碎的声音。

10-15秒
景别： 仰拍大远景 ->缓缓下压-> 脸部中近景定格。

画面内容：
风暴毫无预兆地骤然停止。
世界瞬间归于寂静。
镜头从仰拍大远景缓缓下压。天空黑云被撕开，透出冷光。
茶海与十万大军一同消散，地面化为一片无边无际的镜面琉璃平原，倒映着主角孤高的身影。
无数金绿荧光茶尘如鬼火般在静谧的空中缓缓飘落。
主角神情重新恢复慵懒。她随手收起九龙紫砂神鼎，虚空中浮现出一张古雅茶几与一盏清茶。
她端起茶盏，垂眸看着茶面。荡漾的茶汤中，隐约倒映出刚才屠尽十万大军的血腥画面。
唇角浮起若有若无的邪笑，随后轻轻吹开热气。
镜头缓慢推进到脸部中近景定格。袅袅热雾拂过她冷艳的侧脸，茶色金瞳平静而妖异。
满天茶尘飘落，画面呈现出一种被禅意教外壳包裹的极端魔性与杀意。

音效强化： 声音骤然归静（形成强烈反差），只剩轻风微拂声、茶尘飘落的沙沙声、瓷盏轻碰声与吹茶的热气声。

title: Ultimate Tropical Escape Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: An extremely detailed, multi-section prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a seamless, hyper-dynamic, one-cut video of a woman's tropical escape. The prompt specifies character appearance, setting (wooden pier, overwater villa), action sequence (running, room tour, diving into the sea), camera work (Hyper-dynamic follow shot, one-cut style), lighting (crystal clear tropical daylight), and color palette (cyan, turquoise, cobalt blue).
content:
【コア・コンセプト：Ultimate Tropical Escape】

1. シーン構成とアクション (Scene & Action)
冒頭:

視点は、茶髪の日本人の20歳のかわいい女性の背後を追う三人称視点のトラッキングショット。
彼女は南国風のへそ出しキャミソールと、タイトなジーンズのホットパンツを合わせた洗練されたリゾートスタイルを着用し、ピンクのリモワ風アルミキャリーバッグを軽快に引いている。少し焼けた肌。
場所は、エメラルドグリーンの海の上に浮かぶ木製の桟橋（ウッドデッキ）。
彼女は期待を抑えきれないように、最初からかなり勢いよく前のめりに走り出す。
歩幅は大きく、足運びは非常に軽快で、キャリーバッグの車輪もスピードに合わせて小気味よく滑る。
髪とトップスの裾が風を受けてなびき、到着を待ちきれない高揚感が全身から伝わる。

中盤（ルームツアー）:

彼女がモダンな水上ヴィラの木製の扉を開けると、そこには広大なオーシャンビューが広がる。
カメラは彼女の動きに同期し、リビング、円形の通路、そしてバスルームへと途切れず高速で流れるように移動する。
彼女は室内に入ってからもスピードをほとんど落とさず、弾むような足取りで駆け抜ける。
まるで目的地へ一直線に吸い込まれていくような、期待感に満ちた動き。
部屋の途中で、彼女は走る勢いのままキャリーバッグのハンドルから自然にサッと手を離し、バッグは慣性で壁際へ滑るように流れ、静かに止まる。彼女は一切ためらわず、そのままさらに加速してテラスへ向かう。

クライマックス:

彼女はヴィラのテラスから外へ飛び出し、そのままほとんど減速せずに階段を駆け下り、迷うことなくターコイズブルーの海へとダイブする。
この時、彼女はすでに手ぶらで、両手を自由に広げながらジャンプする。
助走の勢いがそのまま空中へ抜けるような、大胆で伸びのあるジャンプ。
空中で手足を大きく広げ、水しぶき（スプラッシュ）が美しく舞い上がる瞬間を捉える。

2. 視覚的・技術的ディテール (Visual & Technical Details)
カメラワーク:
Hyper-dynamic follow shot: 被写体との距離を一定に保ちながら、ジンバルを使用したような揺れの少ない、しかし圧倒的なスピード感のあるトラッキング。
One-cut style: まるでワンカットで撮影されたかのようなシームレスなトランジション。
カメラは彼女のランニングスピードにぴったり追従し、疾走感・没入感・爽快感を最大限に強調する。
キャリーバッグを手放す瞬間も滑らかにつなぎ、アクションの連続性が崩れない自然な導線を重視する。
ライティングと色彩:
Crystal clear tropical daylight: 雲ひとつない快晴。太陽光は真上から降り注ぎ、海面はキラキラとダイヤモンドのように反射している。
Color Palette:
海の「シアン」「ターコイズ」「コバルトブルー」のグラデーション
空の「スカイブルー」
ヴィラの「ナチュラルウッド」「ホワイト」
彼女の衣装の「ピュアホワイト」
髪色の「ライトブラウン」
これらが彩度高めに設定され、視覚的な満足度を最大化する。
テクスチャと質感:
Water: 水は極めて透明度が高く、底の砂紋が見えるほど。飛び込んだ際の水しぶきは、一粒一粒がクリスタルのように細かく描写される。
Architecture: ヴィラの外壁は白い縦格子のモダンなデザイン。床のウッドデッキは、日光で乾燥した木の質感が伝わるようなディテール。
Wardrobe & Hair: 茶髪は南国の風を強く受けて自然になびき、白いへそ出しキャミソールとホットパンツは、開放的でヘルシーな夏らしさを強調する。

title: Shaw Brothers Style Cat Fight Video Prompt
description: A detailed, bilingual (Chinese and English dialogue) prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a dramatic, high-contrast video in the style of a Shaw Brothers film. It features an orange cat protagonist and a black cat antagonist, culminating in an absurd action sequence involving a Gatling gun.
content:
模仿邵氏電影風格，在荒野的雪山里，冷色調高對比光影與濃厚膠片顆粒。橘貓主角（穿粗布樵夫衣、肩背柴刀）踏雪而行，風雪呼嘯。牠蹲下身，將一隻灰老鼠輕輕放到雪地上一隻瀕死的白貓身旁，低頭用英文沉聲說：
“This gray mouse is for you… I hope you can survive this winter.”
白貓氣若游絲，雪花落在牠微微顫動的鬍鬚上。

鏡頭一轉——暖色調突變，農家院落，柴火劈啪作響。橘貓正在劈柴，神情輕鬆。院門被推開，一隻黑貓（穿紅色鑲鑽禮服，步伐優雅、氣場強烈）緩步走入。橘貓一愣，露出驚喜神情，用英文說：
“Are you… that white cat?”

黑貓停步，微微側頭，氣氛瞬間凝固。下一秒，她猛地從身後掏出一把誇張的加特林，槍管反射出冷光，怒視橘貓，用英文冷聲道：
“I am that gray mouse.”

緊接著——誇張武俠式慢動作＋爆裂音效，加特林瘋狂掃射，火光與子彈殼如雨傾瀉，橘貓驚慌閃避，整個院落被打得木屑飛濺、塵土四起，畫面在極致混亂與荒誕中定格。

description: A detailed, structured prompt designed to test Seedance 2.0's physics engine, focusing on cause-and-effect movement, momentum, and realistic scale in a high-stakes action sequence.
content: SUBJECTS: A female warrior with shoulder-length hair, the ends naturally flipping outward, pressed backward and slightly disheveled by air resistance during high-speed movement. She wears a dark, form-fitting tactical suit combining real fabric and worn metal elements, with visible water stains, dust, and signs of use. A dual mechanical grappling hook system mounted on her back, capable of firing steel cables that retract to generate pulling force. The hook tips are metal impact heads used for attaching to or striking solid structures. The cable only triggers when support is lost or during a fall, and must latch onto a solid object before generating tension. Movement relies on: sliding, stepping, grappling pull, swinging, contact, and displacement through reaction forces. A massive stone hand connected to a giant's body (not severed, the arm extending upward into the clouds), descending vertically into frame from the cloud layer. Enormous in scale, with a weathered, rough surface, no glow, no regular structure. Each downward press carries clear weight, acceleration, air compression, and impact inertia. ENVIRONMENT: A high-altitude fractured bridge structure with wet, slippery concrete surfaces, showing water traces, cracks, and scattered debris. The bridge is heavily damaged with irregular broken sections, exposed and bent rebar, and hanging steel cables. Below the bridge is an empty abyss, swallowed by fog, with no visible ground. A distant city appears low and ruined, with reduced contrast due to atmospheric perspective. Lighting is overcast natural diffuse light, with a low-saturation cool color tone. MOOD: Oppression, imbalance, critical threshold, continuous motion COLOR LOGIC: Low-saturation cool gray-blue tones, strong atmospheric perspective, soft contrast STYLE: Realistic photographic texture, 35mm lens, handheld shooting with slight shake, natural depth of field, no sharpened edges, no clean CG look TIMELINE: SHOT 1 MS, 35mm, lateral handheld tracking The female warrior is sliding at high speed across the wet bridge surface, body leaning forward, center of gravity pressed onto the front foot, trailing foot dragging and kicking up water. Cracks form and the surface slightly sinks ahead of her. Above, within the clouds, the giant's hand is already aligned with her position, accelerating downward, not yet contacting the bridge, but its shadow rapidly deepens. SFX: wind, water friction, low-frequency pressure SHOT 2 WS, 28mm, falling follow The bridge collapses completely in front of her. Her front foot steps into empty space, losing support and dropping straight down. Only after the true fall begins does she raise her arm to fire the grappling hook. The cable strikes a hanging steel cable on the right and instantly tightens. SFX: concrete fracture, metal lock SHOT 3 MS, follow The cable tension redirects her from vertical fall into a high-speed swing to the right. Her body arcs upward, forming a curved trajectory. At the peak of the swing, inertia causes a brief pause before rapidly reversing direction. SFX: intensified wind cut, cable tension SHOT 4 MS, push-in At the end of the swing, she releases the cable. Her landing point is a falling concrete fragment. As she steps on it, the fragment accelerates downward from the applied force, while the reaction force propels her upward, altering her trajectory. SFX: cracking, air compression SHOT 5 WS, low angle The giant's hand slams down vertically at greater speed. She adjusts her body mid-air, narrowly passing beneath the hand. The hand impacts the bridge, generating a powerful shockwave, causing large-scale structural rupture and blasting debris and water mist outward. SFX: massive impact, structural rupture, low-frequency shock SHOT 6 CU, slow motion She is carried by the shockwave and her own inertia toward the edge of the hand. Upon contact with the hand's surface, visible friction causes sliding. She quickly uses the grappling hook to strike a crack on the hand's surface at close range, creating a deceleration point and adjusting direction, beginning to move toward the palm center. SFX: stone friction, low-frequency vibration SHOT 7 MS → WS Using the rough surface of the hand, she takes two accelerating steps and leaps. Her body leans forward, arm extended, about to reach the central area of the palm. The motion reaches its peak. SFX: heavy footsteps, air stretch SHOT 8 MS, continuous tracking At the exact moment she is about to reach the center, the giant's hand recoils from inertia and slams down again, releasing another impact that blasts her off the surface. Her body spins and is thrown back toward the remaining bridge structure ahead, re-entering a sliding state. At the same time, the bridge ahead begins to fracture again, matching the opening state exactly and forming a seamless loop. SFX: impact burst

content:
INFINITE FALL — Beer Catch

[image1] Guy: lean young man, wavy blonde hair, thin glasses, black short-sleeve open shirt, dark grey pinstripe wide-leg trousers, large silver belt buckle, brown leather loafers, arm tattoos, silver bracelets. Expression: not panicked — annoyed at the bottle, nothing more.

Fast orbital cuts, whip pans between angles, camera sometimes rushing past him at speed. Everything blown violently upward: hair, jacket, trouser legs, shirt — continuous strong upward wind throughout. The visual grammar of terminal velocity. Sound FX: constant roaring wind, fabric snapping, bottle tumbling, liquid sloshing.
Environment: pure white infinite void — no ground, no ceiling, no horizon. Just white in all directions.
A brown glass beer bottle tumbling slowly in freefall beside him, liquid sloshing inside, just out of reach.
negative: no ground, no slow camera, no calm floating — this is a violent fall

Camera whips around him — bug's eye from directly below looking up at him shrinking then rushing toward camera, overhead looking straight down at him, 10mm close pass inches from his face with the wind tearing at his hair and glasses, Dutch angle tracking his full body as he reaches. The bottle tumbles just past his fingers — he repositions fast, body rotating in the fall, reaching again. His glasses nearly torn off by the wind, he pushes them back with one hand without stopping reaching with the other. The fall feels violent and fast — not peaceful zero gravity, not serene floating. The roaring wind is constant and loud. His clothes are being destroyed by the air resistance — shirt billowing completely open, trouser legs flattened against his legs then snapping outward.
He finally grabs the bottle in one hard grip — fingers closing around the neck. He pulls it against the wind to his lips. Takes a long defiant sip. Wind still roaring. Hair still destroyed. Glasses still crooked. Camera does one final fast orbit around him — close, aggressive, whipping past. He lowers the bottle. Looks directly into the camera lens from centimeters away. Completely unbothered. Wind roar continues. Cut to black.

content:
Core Concept: A continuous free-fall illusion where an iPhone 17 Pro Max "drops" facing upwards, and the character leaps after it. As they fall together, rapid match-cut background and wardrobe changes simulate passing through multiple dimensions.  

THE "UNREACHABLE" RULE: During the entire flight sequence (Scenes 2-5), the woman is strictly unable to catch the iPhone. She must be reaching out desperately with empty hands, but the camera (the phone) remains just inches out of her grasp, maintaining the tension of the chase.  

CRITICAL CAMERA ANGLE & PROP RULE: The falling scenes MUST be shot from an extreme low-angle / worm's-eye view. The camera lens IS the falling iPhone. Therefore, the woman’s hands must be completely EMPTY during the fall. Do NOT show her holding the phone.  

Universal Rule: A young woman with red hair must appear in all scenes for perfect visual continuity. Strictly use "The same Character" lock.  
Total Duration: 10.0 seconds.  

Timeline & Scene-by-Scene Breakdown:  
Scene 1: The Pigeon & The Vault (00:00 - 00:01.5 | Duration: 1.5 sec)  
Location: High-end hotel balcony, sunny day.  
Action: The same Character (casual chic attire, red hair loose) is leaning on the balcony railing, holding her iPhone 17 Pro Max. A pigeon flies aggressively close to her face. Startled, she drops the phone.  

Camera Sequence: 
1. Medium shot of the drop. 
2. Tracking the phone tumbling (showing back glass and screen clearly). 
3. Close-up of her shock. 
4. She vaults the railing like a parkour athlete, diving after it.  

Scene 2: The City Fall (00:01.5 - 00:03.0 | Duration: 1.5 sec)  
Location: Sunny blue sky/glass skyscrapers.

description: A highly detailed, multi-scene cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a warrior woman leaping off a cliff into a maelstrom, being caught mid-air by a massive dragon, and then riding the dragon skyward. content:
The camera rockets up from below, tearing past jagged cliff walls, then whips into a downward tilt to reveal the ocean below in full violent eruption, waves detonating against black rock. On the cliff edge stands a warrior woman, utterly fearless, gazing into the maelstrom as if daring it to rise higher. 

She steps forward without hesitation and leaps off the edge, arms spread wide, plummeting through howling wind and salt spray. The camera dives alongside her in freefall, her hair and cloak thrashing upward as the black rocks and churning sea rush closer. 

Then a massive shadow tears through the mist below — a dragon surges upward with wings unfurling like storm sails, scales gleaming wet with ocean spray. It swoops beneath her mid-fall, and she lands on its back with practiced grace, fingers gripping the ridges along its neck. The dragon banks hard, climbing in a spiraling arc back up past the cliff face. 

The camera keeps pace, circling tight, then pulls ahead into a final close, frontal reveal: she rides the beast skyward, wind-whipped, calm, and burning with determination, the raging ocean now small and powerless far below.

图片1
当前状态：水平飞身冲刺，机械手臂前伸（延续参考图）。 载具｜紫色华为智界R7 无人驾驶飞行状态，右侧引擎受损隐患已埋，支持汽车↔F-14半翼展变形（仅展开机翼用于高空滑翔着陆）。 关键地形道具 朝天门大桥红色钢铁桥塔：距飞行路径约80米，全片最大威胁 重庆滨江路路面：江边平坦公路，第三章落地收势地点 长江江面：全程高度参照与反光背景 【情绪弧线三幕】 第一章（冲撞入车·混乱建立）→ 第二章（失速翻滚·逆境压制）→ 

第三章（擦塔俯冲·变形落地·反差收势） 接
图片2
延长15秒。 第一章（0–15秒）：飞身破窗夺控 · 空中混乱建立 风格：粗犷真实主义，35mm手持，正午强逆光。 镜头：主角冲刺肩后视角 ↔ 车侧广角 ↔ 俯拍长江背景，多角度剪切制造极度冲击感。 帧率：冲刺段正常速 → 打开侧面的车门进入车内正常速。 音效：强劲气流呼啸 → 机械手臂充能嗡鸣 → 车内警报骤响 → 金属震颤低鸣持续 【逐秒时间线】 0–4秒：【飞身冲刺·逆光对撞】延续参考图画面：主角水平飞身，机械手臂前伸，正午逆光将两者轮廓切成强烈剪影，长江江面大面积反光铺满画面下半部，朝天门大桥弧线清晰。镜头从主角肩后锁定智界R7——蓝紫能量光晕扩散，两者距离急速缩短，气流将主角马尾与西装衣摆完全水平压平。 4–7秒：主角用双手爬上车前盖然后移动到车的侧面打开车门上半身进入车内。正常速：主角上半身已探入车内，双腿仍悬于车外，白色西装下摆在高速气流中剧烈拍打，银色机械靴在气流中甩动。 7–11秒：【强行接管·锁定系统】主角机械手臂抓住座椅头枕将身体拽稳（仅上半身探入），HUD全屏蓝色警报，她另一手猛拍中控台——警报全灭，强制切换手动模式。车身稳定整整2秒。 11–15秒：【反差细节·整理西装】车外180km/h狂风从车窗灌入。她坐进车内后低头用机械手指利落整理西装领口，抬头——HUD屏幕上朝天门桥塔红色警告标记急速放大，距离显示：78米。她嘴角微动，握紧方向盘。

title: Mecha High-Speed Movement Cinematic Prompt (RAY-G)
description: A detailed, multi-segment prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second video showcasing the high-speed movement of a giant mecha named RAY-G (Image 1). The style is minimalist, hardcore mecha, and high-frame-rate, focusing on 'instant burst power' and 'streamlined trajectory,' inspired by Gundam and Metal Gear. The prompt uses two reference images and specifies five distinct shots with detailed camera work and effects.
content:
针对您提供的巨大机甲 <<<Image1>>>   (RAY-G)，我为您设计了一份时长 15秒、风格极其干练、时髦（Stylish）且充满重力无视感的高速移动视频脚本。

这份提示词融合了《机动战士高达：水星的魔女》的灵动感与《金属装备》的机械冷硬风，重点在于**“瞬间爆发力”与“流线型轨迹”**。

视频生成脚本：【RAY-G: 极速切点 (Point Break)】
总时长： 15秒

风格标签： 极简主义、硬核机甲、高帧率动作、流体动力学、赛璐璐高级感。

(00:00 - 03:00) 序幕：静止的动量 (Static Potential)
镜头： 极近景（Extreme Close-up），斜角构图。

画面： 画面中心是 <<<Image1>>>   漆黑磨砂装甲上的橙色线条。线条开始像血管一样有节奏地剧烈闪烁，发出高频的嗡鸣声。

特效： 空气因高温产生剧烈扭曲（Heat Haze），背景的海面保持极度的静谧，形成动静反差。

[Prompt / 提示词]:

极近景，斜角构图。聚焦于机甲 <<<Image1>>>   的黑色磨砂装甲。鲜艳的橙色线条像呼吸灯一样高频闪烁。装甲缝隙喷射出极细的白色高压蒸汽。环境背景模糊。极简主义色彩，电影级质感，金属冷硬风格。

(03:00 - 06:00) 瞬发：突破音障 (Instant Acceleration)
镜头： 侧面追踪镜头（Side Tracking Shot），伴随强烈的拉伸感（FOV Shift）。

动作： 机甲 @image2 的鸟脚状后肢猛地一踏，脚踝处的滑轮（Land Spinner）高速旋转。瞬间从静止变为超音速，海面被切开一道笔直的白浪。

特效： 产生圆锥形的音爆云（Sonic Boom），橙色残影在空中拉出一道锋利的直线。

[Prompt / 提示词]:

侧面动态追踪。机甲 @image2 瞬间爆发起跑。足部滑轮高速旋转，在海面上切开巨大的V形浪花。超音速冲击波云。极速运动模糊，机甲拉出长长的橙色轨迹残影。空间拉伸感，震撼的加速度视觉。

(06:00 - 10:00) 垂直机动：重力反转 (Vertical Evasion)
镜头： 动态环绕升降镜头（Crane & Orbit）。

动作： 机甲奔向一座半毁的沿海巨塔，完全不减速，直接顺着垂直的墙面向上冲刺。它在垂直墙面上进行了一个华丽的180度螺旋转身，避开假想的攻击。

特效： 碎裂的玻璃碎片在空中飞舞，折射出夕阳的橙光。

[Prompt / 提示词]:

动态环绕镜头。机甲 <<<Image1>>>   在垂直建筑物表面高速冲刺，无视重力。身体进行优雅的螺旋旋转（Barrel Roll）。碎片飞溅，反射夕阳橙光。高对比度阴影，赛璐璐动画风格，极具张力的动作设计。

(10:00 - 13:00) 高光：战术滑行 (Tactical Slide)
镜头： 极低角度（Low Angle）对准足部。

动作： 机甲从高处跃下，足部在海面上进行长距离的漂移滑行。身体压低至极限，呈现掠食者般的姿态。

特效： 巨量的水雾被激起，在阳光下形成彩虹。

[Prompt / 提示词]:

极低角度。机甲 <<<Image1>>>   在海面上低重心漂移滑行。巨大的白色浪花与水雾。掠食者姿态，机械关节细致运作。夕阳余晖，金属反光，色彩饱和度极高，极致的画面纯净感。

(13:00 - 15:00) 尾声：单眼凝视 (The Glare)
镜头： 正面近景，逐渐变焦。

动作： 机甲滑行停止，身体由于惯性轻微晃动。头部导向板打开，中心那颗发光的青绿色单眼（Monocular）猛地看向镜头。

特效： 画面最后瞬间闪过一个“LOCK ON”的橙色UI界面，随即切黑。

[Prompt / 提示词]:

正面近景。机甲 @image2 停止滑行，蒸汽散去。头部青绿色单眼亮起，锐利冷酷。屏幕中心出现橙色锁定UI。电影级运镜，画面骤然切黑。

title: Summer Pool Party Montage Video Prompt
description: A highly detailed, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second summer pool party montage video. The prompt specifies rapid cuts, 4K resolution, high saturation, and details specific actions, camera angles (macro, wide, close-up, underwater), and character appearances across 11 distinct shots.
content: 【风格】夏日泳池派对（Summer Pool Party Montage），快切剪辑（Rapid Cuts），4K高清，高饱和明亮色调 【时长】15秒 【场景】阳光露天泳池派对，两层公寓楼背景，泳池边站满人群，黄色浮床漂浮水面 【角色】金发女子、红发女子、黑发女子，均穿彩色花纹比基尼 [00:00-00:01] 镜头1：冰块开场（Macro Close-up） 近景：不规则透明冰块置于玻璃杯中，表面湿润，内部裂纹清晰，红褐色焦外光斑（Bokeh）满布背景。 [00:01-00:02] 镜头2：派对全景（Wide Shot） 全景：两层公寓前泳池，阳台池边挤满人群，画面中心两道白色水花从蓝色泳池炸出，黄色浮床漂浮。 [00:02-00:03] 镜头3：湿发笑容（Close-up） 特写：金发女子面对镜头，脸上密布水珠，湿发贴脸，张嘴大笑。浅景深蓝色水光背景。 [00:04-00:05] 镜头4：浮床慵懒（Medium Shot） 中景：黑发女子躺黄色浮床上，戴白色大框墨镜，双手扶眼镜，闭眼仰头。腕上银表、粉黄手镯叠戴。 [00:05-00:06] 镜头5：湿发慢动作（Close-up, Slow-mo） 特写升格：红发女子双手缓缓将湿发往后推开，微低头，水珠从发丝甩出。 [00:07-00:08] 镜头6：派对律动（Medium Shot） 中景：两名女子池边起舞，右侧女子腰间系带比基尼，腕叠银镯，右手握啤酒瓶，身体随节奏摇晃。 [00:08-00:09] 镜头7：池边并肩（Medium Shot） 中景：两名女子背对镜头并肩站立，蓝白/红白花纹泳裤，腕间手镯随手势晃动，池畔树影人群虚化。 [00:09-00:10] 镜头8：手持DV记录（Medium Shot） 中景：金发女子湿发，戴银饰，右手举银色手持DV对准前方，眼神专注盯取景器。左侧另一女子背影入画。 [00:11-00:12] 镜头9：水下双人游（Underwater Wide） 水下全景：金发、红发女子面对镜头游来，气泡翻涌，光线折射，画面带自然浊度。 [00:12-00:13] 镜头10：水下特写（Underwater Close-up） 水下特写：两人面部上身，光线穿透水面，少量气泡漂浮，表情隐约可见。 [00:14-00:15] 镜头11：沙滩球收尾（Wide Shot） 全景：蓝白沙滩球飞过画面中心，前景女子挥臂抛球，泳池边人群欢呼，浮床点缀水面。

title: Found Footage Comedy: Shadow Glitch Dance Video Prompt
description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second pseudo-documentary (Vlog Style) video with a fixed camera. The plot involves a woman recording a simple dance video, but her shadow on the wall suddenly performs a completely different, highly skilled breakdancing routine, creating a comedic effect. The prompt uses a reference image for the character.
content: 风格】伪纪录片（Vlog Style），超写实主义，固定机位实拍感，自然光，悬疑喜剧色彩，手机竖屏拍摄质感 【时长】15秒 【场景】普通家庭客厅，白墙前，下午侧光从窗户打进来，地上有瑜伽垫，墙上能投出清晰人影 【角色】女主@图片1，穿着运动背心和瑜伽裤，扎着马尾，正在对着手机支架录跳舞视频 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：日常铺垫（Normalcy / Fixed Camera） 画面：固定机位中景，手机自拍视角。 动作：女主对着镜头比了个心，然后开始跳一段简单的抖音热门舞蹈，动作略生疏，偶尔看地上的手机对动作。 关键细节：此时墙上的影子完全正常，动作同步。背景安静，只有蓝牙音箱放出的音乐声。 氛围：完全日常，没有任何异常暗示。 [00:05-00:11] 镜头2：BUG出现（The Glitch / Same Fixed Camera） 动作：女主重复同一段舞蹈，跳到中间一个转身动作时—— 高能时刻（核心爆点）：墙上的影子突然**没有跟着转身**，而是自顾自地切换成一套完全不同的高难度街舞动作（Breaking Power Move），影子在墙上做托马斯全旋，动作流畅丝滑。女主还没发现，继续跳自己的简单舞步，但影子已经完全脱离同步，在墙上疯狂solo。 导演备注：影子的舞蹈水平要明显碾压本体。两者的动作反差越大喜剧效果越强——本体在跳"爱你"手势舞，影子在做风车地板动作。 [00:11-00:15] 镜头3：喜剧回马枪（The Punchline / Same Fixed Camera） 动作：女主跳完回看手机录像回放，发现影子的异常，猛地扭头瞪向墙壁。 结果：影子此刻已经恢复正常——老老实实地复制着女主的每一个动作。女主狐疑地慢慢举起右手，影子也举起右手。女主快速换左手——影子也毫无破绽地跟上。 最终定格：女主一脸"我是不是疯了"的表情对着镜头，但就在画面即将结束的最后0.5秒，影子趁女主看向镜头的瞬间，偷偷比了个耶的手势。画面定格在这一帧。

title: Cinematic Battle Prompt: Wolf vs. Rooster
description: A highly detailed, multi-sequence prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a comedic yet action-packed battle between a furious armored wolf and an unbothered rooster in a Pixar 3D animated style.
content: Pixar 3D animated forest clearing. Sunny day, god rays through trees, green grass, flowers. CHARACTERS: - Giant armored wolf: black fur, gold sword, yellow eyes, furious and humiliated, attacks with full rage - Tiny rooster: red comb, completely unbothered, bored expression, deflects everything with casual wing flaps SEQUENCE: 0-3s — Wolf roars, raises sword overhead, brings it down with full force. Rooster glances up, sighs, flicks one wing — sword deflects sideways. Sparks fly. Wolf stumbles forward from own momentum. Rooster examines wing casually, unbothered. 3-6s — Wolf swings horizontal slash. Rooster ducks under it yawning, taps sword away with wingtip. Wolf spins, overhead strike — rooster hits ground, shockwave crater. Rooster hasn't changed expression once. 6-9s — Wolf goes berserk — rapid five-hit combo, sword blur. Rooster deflects each strike with alternating wings — tap, tap, tap, tap, tap. Casual rhythm like swatting flies. Last strike — rooster catches blade between two feathers. Stops it cold. Wolf strains, shaking. Can't move it. 9-12s — Rooster releases blade, wolf stumbles backward. Wolf charges with shoulder slam — rooster steps aside, wolf face plants into grass. Wolf up instantly, wild overhead — rooster flicks it away with tail feather. Sword spins out of wolf's grip, lands in tree trunk. 12-15s — Wolf stares at empty hands. Rooster turns, walks away slowly, doesn't look back. Scratches ground with one claw. Pecks at something in the grass. Wolf collapses face down defeated. Rooster glances back once. Looks away. Unbothered. CAMERA: Low angle on wolf attacks, extreme slow-mo on every deflection, close-up on rooster's bored face, wide on sword crater impacts, whip pan on rapid combo, wide defeat shot. title: Complex Action Sequence Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: A highly detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a dramatic sequence involving orbiting objects, talismans, a character reveal, energy transformations, and a final cosmic explosion, designed for a dynamic video output.
content:
Dark navy background. A few small objects drift along a wide circular orbit — the rotation center sits in the upper right of the frame, the camera watches from the outer edge. A decorated box, a striped ball, and a couple of carnival items arc past one by one, curving leftward across the view. Sparse confetti strips and gold coins float through the air.

Three cream-colored rectangular talismans appear on the same orbital path, each bearing a different painted emblem. They approach one at a time, sweeping across the camera in a wide arc.

A glowing golden-framed card carrying a character illustration enters along the orbit. It drifts to center screen and the camera pushes in. The golden frame swells beyond the screen edges and vanishes — only the character remains. Gold sparkles and cross-shaped flares surround the reveal.

Red talismans orbit the character in irregular circular paths. Flame-colored ribbons weave through the hair. A fireball ignites near the outstretched hand, swelling until it fills nearly half the screen with white-hot light. The fireball contracts back toward the hands. Energy converts — flames dissolve into crackling purple arcs. The talismans transform into large glowing red rectangles covered in flame-crest patterns, fanning out in formation.

The character spins with the talismans fanning wider. Camera drives in — golden light ignites in both eyes, a held beat of charge. Pull back to full body. White-gold explosion erupts outward. The talismans launch toward the camera — one large talisman surges forward, dark surface swirling with magenta crests, growing until it covers the entire frame. Black.

New scene. No character visible. Red glowing rectangles streak across dark space in a wide circular arc, trailing fire. They converge on a single point at center screen. On impact, red flash fills the screen — hot pink wash expands, then fades.

Red-orange glowing core at the center with spiral energy arcs rotating around it. More red rectangles converge from all sides onto the central energy sphere. Everything compresses to a single bright point — total whiteout.

Fireball detonates outward with radial god rays. It expands to half the screen, then disperses. Red rectangle debris drifts through the flames. The color shifts — red bleeds to magenta, magenta to purple. In one frame, cold blue-purple replaces everything. New scene.

【开场镜头序列·总时长15秒·共7个切换镜头】
■ 镜头1（0:00–0:02）无人机超广角·宇宙殖民地全景
以超广角无人机镜头从宇宙殖民地外壳切入。巨大的环形殖民地内部徐徐展现——晨光穿透弧形透明穹顶，斜射进入殖民地内部的近未来都市。城市天际线在金色晨雾中若隐若现，悬浮建筑群与发光轨道交错排列。镜头以极慢速度向内推进，营造出宏大的史诗感开场。画面色调：冷蓝主调，金色晨光为点缀。

镜头从正上方俯视，捕捉站在高台边缘的女性全身。她身着白色与红色机甲战衣，肩部装甲宽大且具攻击性线条，裙摆由多层刀状装甲板构成。黑色长发在高处的风中轻轻飘动。镜头以缓慢的垂直下降（crane down）方式靠近，白色机甲在晨光下反射出耀眼的金属光泽，红色回路纹路隐约发出微弱的光芒。高台下方是深邃的未来城市峡谷，悬浮车辆如星点般穿梭。
■ 镜头3（0:04–0:06）极近地面·足部特写
镜头切换至极近地面的低角度仰拍，聚焦于她白色高跟机甲靴的靴尖，精准立于高台边缘。镜头缓缓向后拉开，露出靴身的红色发光线条纹路与小腿部位的白色装甲片。靴尖之下是无尽的城市深处，模糊的霓虹光与建筑轮廓形成强烈的高度感与紧张感。风声与城市低频嗡鸣作为音效层。
■ 镜头4（0:06–0:09）侧面横向追踪·腰部至肩部
镜头从她的腰侧开始，以流畅的横向追踪（tracking shot）缓缓向上移动。经过多层刀状装甲裙摆的细节——每片装甲边缘锋利、有光泽；沿着腰部向上，红色能量纹路在白色装甲上蜿蜒延伸；到达宽大的肩甲，顶端有棱角分明的突起结构。整个追踪过程背景为虚化的城市天际线，浅景深突出机甲质感。镜头运动速度配合慢拍电子节奏，流畅而充满张力。
■ 镜头5（0:09–0:11）手部极致特写·赛博机械手
切换至手部特写。她的一只手（赛博机械义手）搭放于高台金属栏杆之上。镜头极近，捕捉机械关节的精密结构——白色骨架、红色发光关节点、指尖处细微的传感器纹路。红色光点以脉冲节奏缓慢闪烁，仿佛心跳。栏杆下方城市的反射光在机械手表面形成流动的光影。音效：微弱的电流嗡鸣声与城市风声交叠。
■ 镜头6（0:11–0:13）侧颜极近特写·晨光轮廓光
镜头切换为极近侧颜特写。白色面具从侧面看，边缘线条流畅且具攻击性；黑色长发顺着肩甲垂落，在微风中轻柔摆动。晨光从画面右侧打来，精准地勾勒出面具边缘与发丝轮廓，形成金色的逆光轮廓（rim light）。面具侧面隐约可见一双眼睛的轮廓，凝视远方的城市。表情无法判读，充满神秘感与力量感。背景极度虚化为橙金色的晨光光晕。
■ 镜头7（0:13–0:15）无人机后退上升·都市全景收尾
镜头以无人机方式向后拉升，女性的轮廓在画面中央逐渐缩小——从全身到半身到剪影，最终成为殖民地城市天际线前的一个微小黑色剪影。晨光将整个画面渲染成金橙色调。镜头继续上升至殖民地内部全景，都市的宏大规模完整呈现，以此结束开场序列。整体结尾节奏放缓，为后续音乐高潮蓄力。

title: Seedance 2.0 One-Shot Cinematic Camera Movement Prompt
description: A highly detailed, long-form prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to generate a single, continuous, complex camera shot (one-shot) through a massive Oriental fantasy city of gods and Buddhas, culminating in a close-up of a master martial artist. The prompt specifies camera movements, scene elements, character details, and cinematic quality.
content:
一镜到底镜头提示词：神佛之城·宗师登台】
镜头以一镜到底的方式，在巨型东方奇幻神都中俯仰、翻滚、旋转、飞驰。
【起始帧 - 图1场景】：镜头从天空俯冲而下，掠过悬浮的巨大苍白月球，快速接近两尊耸立云端的巨型佛像立掌雕塑（高度超过百米），穿过佛像指缝间缭绕的薄雾与红色灯笼串。镜头急速下降，俯瞰脚下青绿色运河纵横的东方奇幻水上都城，密集的木质古建筑、吊脚楼、石桥、灯火通明的船坞在雾气中若隐若现。
镜头穿过佛像掌心的雕花装饰，沿着盘绕佛像基座的螺旋木质栈道急速下坠，闪避悬挂的红灯笼、飘扬的经幡、朝拜的僧侣与香火烟雾。镜头俯冲掠过运河水面，激起水花，穿过一艘悬挂红灯的乌篷船顶，滑入水下。
水下镜头轻盈穿过透明的玻璃观景廊道，看到两侧深邃的水底古城废墟、沉没的石柱与浮游的锦鲤。镜头向上突破水面，冲出中心祭祀广场的喷泉，水珠四溅。
镜头在半空翻转，横扫过广场上整齐列队的数百名黑衣武者（如图2所示），他们双手抱拳、静默肃立，形成人墙。镜头穿过武者之间的缝隙，贴地滑行，掠过刻有云雷纹的巨型石质祭坛台阶。
【过渡段】：镜头沿着台阶螺旋上升，闪避两侧燃烧的巨型青铜香炉、摇曳的火光与飘散的香烟。镜头急速旋转360度，展现背景中两尊巨佛雕像、悬浮的苍白月球、雾气弥漫的天际线。
【结束帧 - 图2场景】：镜头最终稳定在祭坛顶端平台，正对着一位身穿白色长袍、腰束米色腰带、肩披黑色机械护甲的中年东方武者（参考图3角色）。他双手自然垂于身侧，手持两柄交叉的银色机械长刀，面带淡然微笑，站在台阶尽头的中心位置。
镜头缓缓后拉，展现他身后两尊巨型佛像立掌雕塑、下方密密麻麻的黑衣武者方阵、以及远处雾气中的水上古城全景。天空苍白月球巨大悬挂，薄雾缭绕，氛围庄严肃穆、史诗感十足。
无剪辑、不可思议的镜头运动、无缝衔接，充满东方神秘、史诗宏大、极具电影感。8K高清画质，高品质影像素材。

title: 15-Second Microdrama: Alien Cat Twist
description: An extremely detailed, multi-scene, 15-second microdrama prompt for Seedance 2.0, featuring a boy, a stray cat, a mother, and a shocking alien reveal, complete with specific scene descriptions, dialogue, sound design, and duration requirements.
content:
Scene (0–5s):
A stormy suburban American street at night, rain pouring, streetlights flickering. Close-up of a 7-year-old blond boy (soaked, cheeks flushed) crouching down, gently picking up a shivering stray orange cat. The cat meows weakly, clinging to his chest. Smash cut — the front door bursts open as the boy rushes into a warm yet tense living room. His mother (wearing a home knit sweater, stern expression) stands at the staircase, her face darkening.
Dialogue 1 (Mom, furious and sharp):
Are you kidding me?! You brought a dirty stray into MY house?!

Scene (6–10s):
The boy clutches the cat tightly, eyes tearing up, trying to explain. The cat suddenly stops shaking, slowly lifting its head, pupils shrinking unnaturally. In an instant — the orange cat LEAPS straight onto the mother’s face.
Slow motion: claws latch onto her face, she lets out a suffocating scream, stumbling backward, knocking over furniture.
The boy rushes forward in panic, desperately pulling at the cat.
Dialogue 2 (Boy, breaking down):
Stop! Stop! Let her go!! PLEASE!!

Scene (11–15s):
Extreme close-up — the boy finally yanks the cat off.
Silence.
The mother’s “face” peels off completely, along with her blonde hair, sliding down.
Revealing — a green-skinned, large black-eyed alien face, wet and cold, staring directly forward.

The boy’s pupils shake violently. The “face” drops from his hands onto the floor.
The orange cat lands and slowly turns its head, eerily calm.
The alien tilts its head slightly, mouth stretching into an unnatural smile.
Dialogue 3 (Alien, low and eerie):
…You weren’t supposed to see that.

Sound Design:
Heavy rain and distant thunder at the start, door slam impact; mid-section tearing/claw impact, furniture crashing, suffocating screams; final section sudden silence → wet peeling sound → rising low-frequency horror tone, final line with subtle echo.

Duration:
Exactly 15 seconds (high-intensity American micro drama, dense shock beats, extreme twist payoff)

content:
Original Japanese-Style Dark Fantasy Action Short Film:

Inside a dilapidated shrine hall, a white-robed warrior and a black-armored samurai engage in their final battle amid an atmosphere reminiscent of ritual chanting. Wooden beams creak, paper screens tear apart, and fragments scatter as moonlight filters through drifting dust and smoke. Tatami mats are disrupted and scattered across the floor.

The camera alternates between high-angle overhead shots and low-angle upward perspectives, emphasizing the spatial depth of traditional Japanese architecture, the oppressive tension surrounding the characters, and the solemn intensity of a fateful duel—evoking the climactic moment of an original Japanese fantasy animated film.

A strong hook within the first 2 seconds, followed by a stable and cohesive progression. Fluid, continuous action with cinematic composition, realistic lighting and shadow, an epic atmosphere, intense emotional weight, and high-definition detail. Designed for social media engagement. Avoids copyrighted characters and brand logos, ensuring a completely original creation.

title: High-Energy Japan Travel Documentary Montage
description: A complex, segmented prompt for Seedance 2.0 (via ClaudeCode + Renoise) generating a high-energy, 15-second travel documentary montage of Japan. The prompt specifies five distinct scenes (Torii gate, Kyoto backstreet, Shibuya crossing, Shinkansen, Tokyo aerial), each with detailed camera movements (orbits, dolly rush, 360 spin, crane up, whip pan) and specific visual requirements (photorealistic, natural film grain, no CGI). It also includes an audio style specification (High-energy EDM, 140BPM).
content:
Travel documentary footage of Japan, shot on Sony A7 IV,  natural film grain, photorealistic, no CGI, no stylization.

  [0-3s] A real weathered red torii gate at night. Camera starts  ground-level at the base of the gate looking up — then rapidly  orbits 180 degrees around the torii post, accelerating as it  swings, revealing the misty stone steps and orange lantern glow  on the other side. The movement is fast and sweeping.  

[3-6s] A narrow Kyoto backstreet at night. Camera bursts forward  at high speed down the alley in a fast dolly rush — wooden machiya  houses and red lanterns blur past on both sides. A woman in a dark  kimono steps aside. Camera tilts sharply upward mid-rush to reveal  the sky framed between the rooftops, then snaps back down.  

[6-9s] Shibuya scramble crossing at night. Camera starts low in  the crowd, spins 360 degrees fast at hip level — people and neon  signs streak past — then rapidly cranes straight up into the air,  rising fast to reveal the full intersection below. The spin-to-rise  transition is sudden and energetic. 

 [9-12s] A shinkansen N700 bullet train. Camera holds static for a  split second — then the train BLASTS past at full speed inches from  the lens, the shockwave shaking the frame violently. Camera  immediately whips to track it from behind, accelerating to match  speed, rice fields streaking. 

 [12-15s] Wide aerial Tokyo at dusk. Camera starts in tight on city  streets, then rockets upward fast — buildings shrinking rapidly —  spinning slightly as it rises, until the full Tokyo bay and Mount  Fuji horizon are revealed. Camera decelerates and holds the grand  final frame steady.  Audio style: High-energy EDM, hard synth drops, 140BPM, bass hit  on each camera snap. No text, subtitles, watermarks, or logos. Quality: photorealistic, natural textures, real locations, fluid  motion. Avoid: CGI look, artificial lighting, slow or static camera.

Camera Simulation
Shot on 65mm IMAX film with a vintage anamorphic lens. Noticeable film grain, subtle gate weave, and soft halation on highlights. Occasional lens breathing subtly warps the image as the body mutates.

Lighting Style
A dead, fog-covered wasteland under a massive dim moon.
Moonlight is unnaturally cold, casting blue-gray tones across the entire scene.
As the transformation begins, a deep amber-gold light burns from inside his body, clashing with the cold lunar light.

Dual-tone lighting:
Outside: cold lunar blue
Inside: feral burning orange

Scene Description
A man (use the uploaded face as reference, preserve exact facial identity and features) stands alone in a misty, desolate landscape. The camera moves in a handheld, slow circular orbit around him. Wind howls softly through the fog.

He looks up at the moon—his expression tired, resisting something within. His breathing becomes heavier. His fingers twitch unnaturally.

His body suddenly begins to break—his spine jerks, bones shift visibly beneath the skin in a disturbing, organic motion. A low growl escapes his throat, not fully human. Veins darken, then pulse with a dim amber glow from within.

His fingernails crack and extend into rough, uneven claws.

The transformation intensifies violently. His jaw stretches forward painfully, not snapping instantly but distorting in a slow, agonizing motion. Teeth push through his gums. Thick fur erupts unevenly across his body—messy, dirty, mixed with sweat and blood.

His posture collapses forward into a half-beast stance. The camera shakes more aggressively, reacting to the energy and movement.

He is caught in a disturbing hybrid state—not fully human, not fully beast:
One arm fully wolf-like, the other still human but breaking apart.
His face is asymmetrical—one eye human, the other glowing with feral light.

Nearby metal debris subtly vibrates—not magnetically, but reacting to a primal energy frequency emanating from him. His chest glows faintly, as if something inside is trying to break out.

Then—final snap.

His body fully transforms into a towering werewolf:
Massive, muscular frame
Wet, matted fur
Heavy breath steaming in the cold air
Eyes reflecting cold moonlight mixed with inner fire

His silhouette stands against the moon.

Silence.

He slowly lowers his head—not in rage, but pure instinct. The camera holds close on his face. A subtle twitch.

Then suddenly—he bursts forward at extreme speed, vanishing into the fog.

title: 15-Second One-Shot Awakening Strike Prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: An extremely detailed, 15-second, one-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a cinematic scene of a Chinese beauty transforming into an armored warrior in a post-apocalyptic city, complete with specific camera movements, sound design, and physical realism requirements.
content:
100%真人实拍质感，好莱坞IMAX大片质感，自然光影，冷峻纪实风格，阴天自然光，全程手持一镜到底，呼吸感晃动，随机焦点失焦，16:9宽屏。
【场景环境】
一条延伸至远方的被摧毁的城市街道。两侧是废墟混凝土建筑，钢筋外露，窗户破碎，部分建筑仍在燃烧，橙色火光与黑烟升腾。废弃汽车散落在开裂的沥青路面上，其中数辆正在燃烧。阴沉灰色天空，烟尘悬浮于空气中。多颗陨石拖着火焰与浓烟尾迹划过天际。背景中惊恐的平民在废墟间四散奔逃，有人跌倒，有人拖拽伤员。
【主体人物】
中国美女，深红色头发扎成松散凌乱的发髻，几缕发丝垂在脸旁。皮肤白皙，五官锋利，下颚线分明，自然妆容，眼妆细致。着装：黑色长款皮革风衣内搭黑色背心，黑色牛仔超短裙，黑色平底战斗靴，无腰带，双手佩戴黑色科技感护手。表情紧绷隐忍，微带痛苦，眉头微蹙——眼神中充满绝望与强烈的意志。
【15秒一镜到底·觉醒打击版】
0-2秒·觉醒
镜头低角度仰拍，取景她的上半身与面部，仰望独自站在被摧毁街道中央的她。风吹动她的黑色皮革风衣。她张开嘴唇，用日语尖叫:"かくせいしろ！"她猛然张开右手，黑色科技护手噼啪作响。紫色水晶质感的电弧从她手臂和护手爆发。空气向内压缩，空间扭曲畸变。冲击波发出低沉的音爆。紫色符文线条浮现并环绕她身体运转。
2-5秒·爆发
镜头开始环绕她运动。胸口爆裂出暗金色裂纹，浓稠的金色液体如血般涌出。她痛苦地尖叫。紫色雾气与细密电弧向外涌射。她的全部衣物从内部撕裂炸开，每一片都燃烧成灰烬——什么都不剩。有机装甲碎片向外爆射，随后以不自然的方式回缩重新附着在她身体上。紫色纹路对称蔓延过她的面部。面颊上裂开一道裂缝，露出下方脉动的紫色光芒。同时，多条机械臂状的附肢从她背部猛烈爆出——暗色金属质感，刀刃形状，如恶魔之翼般向外展开。火花、蓝色电弧和金色能量粒子从爆发点炸裂。镜头从背后捕捉完整的展开画面——她的剪影映衬在灰色天空下，机械附肢如扇形展开。爆发声如撕裂金属混合电弧放电。
5-8秒·生长
有机物质从体内渗出，表面闪烁虹彩光泽。白色装甲板对撞融合，留下灼烧痕迹。装甲向下延伸覆盖她的双腿，平底战斗靴被装甲完全吞噬取代，形成白色与暗紫色交织的装甲战靴，伴随微小火花锁定到位。她咬紧牙关发出痛苦的嘶吼。胸口核心如余烬般明灭闪烁。紫黑色金属蔓延覆盖她的面部，形成凹凸不平的面具，左眼比右眼先被覆盖。复眼开始成型，带有液态光介质不规则地闪烁。镜头持续环绕她运动。
8-12秒·完成
镜头继续缓慢环绕她。面具完全封合。角状结构从头顶向上生长，燃烧着紫金色火焰。一只复眼稳定发光，另一只带有电流不稳定的闪烁。装甲以白色与暗紫色交织，凹凸不平且布满战损，发光的紫色裂缝中渗出光液。机械附肢在她身后微微摆动。装甲每块锁定时发出清脆的金属卡扣声，随后是层次分明的机械归位声。她缓缓低头审视自己的双手——白色与暗紫色交织的装甲护手指节渗出紫色光芒。她缓缓抬头直视前方，复眼骤然全亮。
12-15秒·超音速冲锋
镜头急速后退。她双脚蹬地，脚下沥青瞬间炸裂形成深坑，一道猛烈的紫色能量爆炸从起飞点向外扩散，碎石与沥青碎块被炸飞至空中。她以突破音障的速度腾空飞射，直冲镜头方向——锥形音爆雾气在身后形成，机械附肢被气流向后压平，画面产生强烈的动态模糊。她的身影越来越大，越来越近，占满整个画面。紫色能量尾迹拖在身后。最后一帧，她的装甲面甲几乎撞上镜头，复眼猩红全亮，画面骤然切黑。
【环境音】
觉醒时的低沉音爆，撕裂金属与电弧放电声，痛苦的尖叫声，清脆的金属卡扣声，机械附肢展开的沉重金属声，背景中燃烧的噼啪声与远处爆炸声，最后的超音速冲锋伴随起飞点爆炸声、音爆冲击与急速逼近的风压声，画面切黑瞬间一切归于寂静。
【物理质感强化】
真实光影，变身前面部可见的皮肤质感，皮革风衣变身前可见的真实磨损与撕裂。机械附肢具有物理重量和惯性——展开后轻微摆动，并非僵硬不动。装甲板以白色与暗紫色交织，表面可见划痕、焊接痕迹和不平整边缘——不是干净光滑的。所有动作沉稳有力，充满痛苦但坚定——她在承受中觉醒。偶有轻微镜头晃动，纯正手持跟拍感。
【声音设计】
从尖叫激活到爆裂机械爆发，层层递进至起飞点爆炸与超音速冲锋的音爆，最终骤然切入寂静。整个序列散发着绝对的力量。仅生成音效，无音乐。

content: 生成一段具备顶级商业质感的亚洲超模与豪华跑车视觉大片，要求导演级分镜编排，节奏紧凑且高级。 0-2秒：[宏观到微观] 开场采用极速推镜头，从跑车锐利的大灯延时残影瞬间切入到亚洲顶级美女模特的瞳孔特写，展现极致的东方神韵。 2-5秒：[LOCKED-ON SHOT] 镜头锁定在模特的侧脸，伴随她自信且优雅的步伐进行侧向平移跟拍（Tracking Shot）。模特身穿高定丝绸质感晚礼服，发丝随风微动，背景是霓虹虚化的都市高架桥。 5-8秒：[360度环绕轨道镜] 模特站在三辆跑车交汇处中心位，镜头以其为轴心进行快速的低角度圆周环绕。通过升格（慢动作）处理捕捉她冷艳的回眸瞬间，眼神具备极强的侵略性和高级感。 8-10秒：[底角仰拍Hero Shot] 镜头从地面视角极速拉远至全景，模特傲立于豪车群中央，画面构图呈现完美的对称美学，光影聚焦在人脸上，展现女王般的统治力。 视觉风格：极致电影级写实，2.35:1宽银幕。整体色调偏向冷调青橙（Teal & Orange），画面带有自然的胶片颗粒感和高光柔化。人物肤质细腻自然，具有顶奢名刊的妆造质感。 声音设计：重低音电子氛围音乐，音效需根据镜头切换进行卡点（Swish音效），画面节奏随音乐鼓点产生呼吸感。 控制指令：锁定亚洲模特的五官特征与高级感妆容，确保人物在多变镜头下的一致性；动作衔接需丝滑无卡顿，光影随着模特的走位产生实时的物理反射。

content: 【第一段：柔美初现】时间段：0秒至3秒，景别与运镜：中景固定镜头，无运镜。女子妆造与服饰：女子长发披肩，头戴古风金冠与步摇，肤白红唇。期间展示三套服饰：1.黑底红边抹胸长裙，配金绣与珍珠流苏腰带；2.白袍红袖裙，内搭金绣抹胸；3.纯红开叉裙，配红金绣花肚兜。动作与神态：双臂随节奏舞动，指尖柔婉，表情柔和妩媚。声音：古风变装BGM。特效与环境：卡点硬切变装。背景为紫色地毯、屏风与烛台，紫雾弥漫。【第二段：清冷转换】时间段：3秒至6秒，景别与运镜：中景固定镜头。女子妆造与服饰：发型妆容不变。展示两套服饰：1.白袍黑裙，黑色抹胸饰有金蓝繁复刺绣，高开叉设计；2.粉色薄纱外衫，内搭浅蓝白底花卉刺绣长裙。动作与神态：手臂起落遮面后展开，身段轻盈，神态转为端庄清冷。声音：古风变装BGM。特效与环境：卡点硬切。冷暖色系服装交替，对比鲜明。【第三段：灵动转身】时间段：6秒至11秒，景别与运镜：中景固定镜头。女子妆造与服饰：穿着粉色透视轻纱外袍，内搭黑底金纹抹胸裙，腰间系紫色细带。动作与神态：背身回眸，提手轻抚，眼神含情，姿态灵动娇俏。声音：古风变装BGM。特效与环境：硬切转场。粉紫光影交错，烟雾效果增强。【第四段：华丽高频】时间段：11秒至15秒，景别与运镜：中景固定镜头。女子妆造与服饰：高频展示三套服饰：1.大红抹胸长裙，饰红金腰带；2.纯白广袖素色长袍，系白腰带；3.粉白拼色裙，胸前为浅蓝底飞禽刺绣。动作与神态：双手随急促鼓点上下交叠挥舞，动作幅度增大，气场全开。声音：古风变装BGM。特效与环境：极速卡点换装。多种色彩快速冲击，视觉华丽度达到高潮。

title: Seedance 2.0 Tsui Hark Style Wuxia Film Prompt
description: A highly detailed, multi-shot prompt for generating a Wuxia (martial arts) film sequence in the style of director Tsui Hark, set in Zhangjiajie's Tianmen Mountain, emphasizing dynamic camera work and specific action sequences. It requires a reference image for the character's face/costume.
content:
【云窟剑影·天门血战】
——张家界天门山一镜到底
核心风格： 徐克新式武侠大片、一镜到底、高帧率、4K超清。

色调： 徐克亮调，“冷玉青墨 + 琥珀流光”。高对比、山岚自带柔光滤镜，锐化人物轮廓，达芬奇工业级调色。

场景： 张家界天门山（湘西诡谲地貌。天门洞开，吞云吐雾；999级天梯垂直挂于绝壁，如通天之路；石林石柱如利剑攒蹙，云海翻腾间栈道若隐若现，飞鸟不渡）。

运镜轨迹：
低角度仰拍（强调天险） → 急速推向洞口 → 180°横向平移（展现栈道激斗） → 俯冲下坠 → 缓拉回正 → 逆光特写。

镜头脚本：
0-4秒【起势·天门云涌】：

运镜： 极低角度仰拍，镜头从天梯底部向上急速俯冲掠过。

画面： 人物面部参考@【@图1】武侠侠客装扮（白衣胜雪，斗笠压低，手持长剑） 孤身立于999级天梯中央。

动作： 狂风卷起周遭云雾，【@图1】右手扶剑柄，左手捏剑指划过鼻梁。镜头拉远，展现其背后的天门洞，宛如一只巨大的苍天之眼。

4-8秒【激斗·悬梯截杀】：

运镜： 180°环绕平移。

画面： 十余名劲装死士从两侧如猿猴般贴着绝壁荡下。

动作： 【@图1】足尖点梯，身形倒挂旋转。（徐克式慢动量感） 剑不出鞘，以鞘代棍点、拨、挑，气浪将台阶上的雨水震成水雾。镜头急速环绕，捕捉残影与金属撞击的火花。

8-11秒【破阵·纵横石林】：

运镜： 镜头跟随人物俯冲，穿过石拱门进入悬崖栈道。

画面： 刺客布下钢丝阵。

动作： 【@图1】长剑终于出鞘（剑身映射琥珀色日光），一记横扫千军。剑气化作青墨弧光，斩断钢丝，钢丝崩断回弹击碎崖石。他在仅容一人的栈道上闪转腾挪，身影与石柱交错，虚实结合。

11-15秒【收势·雾散孤峰】：

运镜： 镜头从洞口向外缓拉，由窄变宽，展现万丈深渊。

画面： 漫天符纸（或枯叶）随风飞舞，【@图1】立于天门洞边缘，脚下即是云海。

动作： 挽剑花归鞘，反手背剑。阳光从天门洞背后透射过来，形成巨大的丁达尔效应。

定格： 镜头推进至极度特写，斗笠边缘滴下一滴血，划过下颌。眼神凌厉如电，背景是无尽的山河大观。

title: Commercial Sports Car Photography Video Prompt
description: A highly detailed, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to generate a commercial sports car photography video, specifying camera movements, shot types, duration for each of the nine shots, and desired cinematic qualities like lighting, composition, and resolution, while explicitly forbidding the appearance of any person.
content:
跑车商业摄影分镜

镜头一 (1.5s): 画面开头是跑车，正面镜头，展示标志性的“愤怒”前脸。

镜头二 (1s): 近景镜头，虚拟摄像机慢慢围绕车标进行环绕运动（不转圈，纯环绕），特写法拉利跃马标志。

镜头三 (1.5s): 近景镜头，斜看LaFerrari独特的蝴蝶门（车身侧面），进行缓慢环绕运镜，强调其车身线条。

镜头四 (1s): 镜头移动至车尾处，进行近景拍摄，随后慢慢往后拉，运用希区柯克镜头（Dolly Zoom）效果，呈现视觉冲击感。

镜头五 (1s): 近景镜头拍摄车的后视镜，保持缓慢环绕运镜。

镜头六 (1s): 镜头缓慢向前推进，采用低角度推进运镜。车静止，呈现强烈透视感、光影渐变。专业汽车摄影，深邃背景，电影级构图，重心沉稳，高清实拍画质。

镜头七 (1s): 横向轨道滑动运镜，镜头平行扫过LaFerrari车身。车静止不动，流畅平移画面。侧光勾勒腰线，轮毂特写，细腻反光，高级感，电影运镜，干净构图。

镜头八 (1s): 俯视视角，镜头缓慢下降运镜。静态跑车，完美车身比例，顶光质感，干净地面反射，航拍感运镜，车静止，构图对称，奢华质感，8K超写实，广告级画面。

镜头九 (1s): 镜头缓慢推近特写，从整车推到车灯/轮毂/腰线。车静止，微距细节，光影渐变，电影感浅景深，高级质感，细节锐利，商业摄影。

说明：

画面与画面之间无需转场。

画面中不出现任何人。

最高画质：8K。

Seedance V2

title: Hyper-Realistic Parkour POV Sequence Prompt
description: A highly detailed, multi-stage prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to generate a hyper-realistic, single-take, first-person perspective (POV) action sequence of a man performing extreme parkour, including a terrifying freefall, rhythmic jumps, and a near-fatal slip, with specific audio and visual details.
content:
A hyper-realistic, 8K resolution, adrenaline-fueled single-take POV action sequence. The camera is chest-mounted on a man wearing camouflage joggers and worn-out black-and-white sneakers. He stands on the dizzying edge of a rusted skyscraper, 1000 feet above a crystalline turquoise ocean. No clouds, no haze—just a sheer, terrifying vertical drop into the deep blue.

[The Initial Freefall]
The sequence begins with a sudden, heart-stopping leap into a 20-meter vertical freefall. The camera points directly at his feet as the sea surface rushes toward the lens. A deafening, high-pitched whistling 'Hyuo' wind screams past the microphone. Just before the impact, he catches a lower rusted horizontal bar with both hands—white wristband visible—and swings his body forward to land on a tiny vertical pole.

[The Rhythmic Jumps & The Near-Death Slip]
He immediately begins a rhythmic series of high-speed jumps:

Jump 1: A clean, agile spring to a second vertical pole 2 meters away.

Jump 2: A rapid leap to a thin, rusted horizontal pipe.

Jump 3 (The Slip): As he jumps toward the third vertical pole, his right sneaker completely misses the mark and slides off the rusted metal. The camera tilts violently over the edge, staring straight down at the 1000-foot abyss. He lets out a sharp, panicked gasp. For a terrifying second, his body leans into the void, but he desperately claws at the pole with his fingers, his boots scrambling against the side until he manages to hook his leg and haul himself back up.

Jump 4: Still trembling, he forces a frantic, heavy-breathing leap to the next bar to keep the momentum.

Jump 5: A final, explosive long-distance jump to a swaying metal platform. He lands with a heavy, jarring metallic 'Clang', his body hunching low, gripping the vibrating metal for dear life.

[The Ending]
The camera remains in a low, fetal position on the final bar, shaking from the adrenaline. No dialogue. The audio is a visceral layer of the aggressive 'Hyuo' wind, his intense, ragged, and rapid gasping for air, and a loud, thumping heartbeat that resonates as if inside his chest. The harsh midday sun glints off the ocean waves far below, creating a blinding, beautiful, yet lethal glare. Cinematic materials, fluid 120fps motion, hyper-detailed rust and skin textures.

1990年代美国曼哈顿豪华证券公司开放式办公大厅，数百名穿西装的年轻男性经纪人密密麻麻站满整个空间，美国国旗悬挂四周，彩带在空中飘落，整个大厅陷入一种宗教仪式般的集体狂热。

00:09-00:15 男主角单手猛拍胸口，另一只手高举拳头，低声而用力地说出最后一句话："This is who we are." 镜头从特写骤然拉开为全景——数百人的大厅在同一瞬间爆发出最高潮的呐喊，彩带倾泻而下，镜头微微仰拍男主角的剪影逆光矗立在人群顶端，定格在那种英雄与癫狂并存的高燃瞬间。

title: Complex single-shot morphing video prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: A highly detailed, structured prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to generate a single, continuous, cut-free shot that smoothly morphs through seven distinct reference images. The prompt specifies cinematic style, dynamic camera movements (push-in, tracking, orbit), and detailed transformation logic between each image, focusing on temporal coherence and consistent subject identity.
content:
【基本設定】
structure: 単一の連続ショット（カットなし）
progression: 7枚の画像を順番にモーフィング
visibility: 各画像は一瞬だけ明確に認識できる（停止不要）
transition: 常に滑らかで連続的
style: シネマティック、高精細、ダイナミック、フリッカーなし
【プロンプト本体】
<<<Image1>>> から開始。
映像は完全に途切れのない1ショットで進行し、<<<Image1>>>  → <<<Image2>>>  → <<<Image3>>>  → <<<Image4>>>   → <<<Image5>>>   → <<<Image6>>>  → <<<Image7>>>  の順に連続的に変形していく。
全体は静止的ではなく、カメラが常に動き続けるダイナミックな映像の中でモーフィングが発生する。
ただし被写体の認識性は維持し、構図が破綻しないように制御する。
各画像は流れの中で一瞬だけ明確に視認できるピーク状態を持つが、停止やホールドはしない。
すべては連続した「動きの中の進化」として表現する。
【変形ロジック（順番固定・重複禁止）】
<<<Image1>>>  → <<<Image2>>>  ：
カメラが前方へスムーズにプッシュインしながら変形開始
輪郭 → パーツ → 色 → 質感の順で段階的に変化
微細な粒子分解 → 再構築
<<<Image2>>>  → <<<Image3>>>  ：
カメラが横方向へ流れるトラッキング移動
光の走査（ライトスキャン）により構造が書き換わる
発光ラインが流れ、形状が連続的に変化
※粒子表現は禁止
<<<Image3>>>  → <<<Image4>>>  ：
カメラが被写体の周囲を回り込むようにオービット移動
空間歪み・レンズワープにより形状が引き伸ばされながら変形
<<<Image4>>>  → <<<Image5>>>  ：
カメラがやや引きながら視点を変える（軽いドリーアウト＋角度変化）
被写体が液体のように溶け、流れながら再形成される
<<<Image5>>>   → <<<Image6>>>  ：
カメラが一瞬加速し、動きに勢いをつける
被写体が破片化し、空間に散った後、再び集まり新しい形へ再構築
<<<Image6>>>  → <<<Image7>>>  ：
カメラが再び中心へ寄りながら安定化
エネルギーが中心に収束し、光と波動によって最終形態へ統合される
【カメラ挙動（重要）】
・常に動いているが制御された動き
・使用可能：
  - プッシュイン / プルアウト
  - 横トラッキング
  - オービット（回り込み）
  - 軽いパース変化
・禁止：
  - 急激なブレ
  - 被写体ロスト
  - 不自然なジャンプ
【制約（重要）】
・カット編集禁止（完全1ショット）
・同一エフェクトの再使用禁止
・フリッカー、ノイズ、破綻禁止
・被写体の位置・スケールは大きく崩さない
・各画像は必ず一度は明確に視認できる状態を作る
・すべての変化は連続的かつ意味のある構造変形であること
【強化キーワード】
dynamic camera movement
cinematic motion flow
smooth continuous morphing
temporal coherence
high detail preservation
consistent subject identity
seamless transformation flow

15.0s sequence. A blazing phoenix composed of flowing flame and glowing embers spirals upward through the volcanic sky. Opposing it is a massive storm griffin whose wings generate violent wind currents and lightning arcs.

They clash mid-air above a floating lava river. The phoenix dives through the griffin’s storm vortex while fire and lightning collide violently.

Velocity Ramp choreography: a lightning claw strike freezes in ultra-slow motion as sparks and embers scatter through the air before snapping back to real time as both creatures spiral downward.

**Camera:**

Fast aerial tracking through lava-lit clouds, briefly passing behind a floating rock formation before revealing the full aerial duel.

**Style & Constraints:**

Photorealistic fire simulation, volumetric storm clouds, ray-traced lava glow, cinematic lightning illumination, stable geometry, 8K.
