title: Cinematic Trailer Style Video Generation
description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 used to create a cinematic trailer-style video. The prompt specifies camera movements, scene transitions (from illustration to realism), and overall style parameters.
content:
[0s–3s]: （ image1 ）A continuous slow push-in that never stops — zooming toward the center of a 19th-century Grimm-style storybook illustration of a deep dark spruce forest, As the camera moves closer, the illustration begins to malfunction, The trees sway in a wind that should not be possible inside a drawing. 

[3s–5.5s]: ( image2 ) The zoom continues without interruption. The illustrated begins to soften and dissolve from the center outward, as if a mist is seeping through the paper and replacing the drawing from within. As the camera keeps pushing forward, this zone of realism expands outward in a controlled, organic spread. The warm cream-sepia illustration gradually drains away into cold desaturated blue-green. The drawn surface at the edges briefly wavers and thins like damp paper giving way to moisture, then quietly dissolves into the same realistic forest texture. No abrupt morphing, no multiple competing distortions — just a single eerie replacement, as if the illustration is being overtaken by a real forest through a veil of mist. By 5.5 seconds, the camera is moving fully inside the real forest, and the drawing has completely vanished. 

[5.5s–11s]: ( image3 ) The forward motion gently eases into a continuous upward drift without a cut, as if the camera is being lifted through the real forest in one smooth arc. It rises between the trunks and passes through the lower branches, gradually clearing the canopy — not soaring too high, but just enough to reveal the breadth of the dark Nordic forest under flat grey light. The motion remains calm and deliberate, with a subtle floating quality, allowing the forest to breathe onscreen. The camera then begins a slow, natural transition from vertical ascent into a shallow backward glide, as if searching for the road beyond the trees. 

[11s–15s]: ( image4 ) The same movement continues seamlessly. The camera glides forward and gently descends out of the forest edge toward the road, settling into a low eye-level perspective near the tarmac. In one unbroken motion, it arrives at an extreme wide shot with the horizon stable and the road stretching dead straight into a grey-white vanishing point. The same boxy vintage sedan is already in frame, driving steadily away, growing smaller in the mist. Fallen pine needles drift faintly across the wet surface. The mist thickens gradually ahead. 

Global style: 35mm tungsten film, anamorphic, fine grain, cinematic. Desaturated blue-green midtones, crushed blacks, flat overcast diffusion. Smooth continuous camera motion, sharp details, stable horizon, natural proportions. First two shots transition from antique illustration warmth to cold cinematic realism. No text, no typography, no digital effects.

title: Cinematic Lamborghini Brand Creative Ad Video Generation Prompt
description: A detailed, multi-segment prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a cinematic, high-impact Lamborghini brand creative advertisement video. The prompt specifies a first-person, high-speed chase perspective, emphasizing the transition from the raw power of a bull to the mechanical sculpture and aggressive lines of the Lamborghini, with specific instructions for visual style, scene transitions, and sound design across a 15-second timeline.
content:
电影级兰博基尼品牌创意广告，超写实，第一人称高速追随镜头，极强视觉冲击，丝滑连续运镜，整体气质高级、冷酷、极具侵略性。打造一支简约但攻击性极强的第一人称高速穿梭广告。不要低质赛博变形，不要直接把整头公牛生硬变成车，而是通过局部特写、反光、结构线条与视觉转场，把公牛的原始力量与爆发感自然转译成兰博基尼的机械雕塑感、空气动力学和极限速度。全程无背景音乐，仅保留高质量拟音与空间音效。整体时长15秒内，每3秒必须有明显视觉升级，避免单镜头平淡拖沓。
【0-3s】黑暗与深黑金属质感空间中，一头通体深黑、肌肉线条极其清晰、皮肤表面带有克制金属冷光的狂暴公牛突然高速冲出。镜头以第一人称紧贴公牛头部侧前方高速追随，几乎擦着牛角、额头骨线、颈部肌肉和肩背起伏前冲。开场必须有极强贴脸压迫感，不要平拍，不要普通奔跑镜头，要像速度和力量直接顶到镜头前，风压扑面，画面极简，只保留少量冷白高光、黑色阴影、空气压迫感与速度残影。
【3-5s】镜头突然前压加速，极近距离推进到公牛眼部与牛角根部特写，眼神中带有冰冷攻击性，反光里出现一道锋利的冷白光刃、橙色能量余辉与金属切面高光。利用牛角弧线、眼部反光和骨骼结构做无缝转场，瞬间衔接到兰博基尼前灯、楔形车鼻与锋利折线的局部特写。这个转场必须丝滑、极快、高级，像兰博基尼本来就潜伏在公牛的力量结构里。
【5-8s】进入兰博基尼车头与前灯世界后，镜头继续第一人称高速前冲，贴着车头侧前方掠过锐利灯组、低趴前舱盖、切削感极强的前脸折面、进气口与楔形轮廓。镜头沿着车身肩线高速滑行，延续刚才贴着公牛肌肉与骨线前冲的惯性，让生物的爆发结构自然过渡成机械曲面与刀锋折线。整体色彩以兰博基尼标志性的亮黄或哑黑主车身为主，搭配黑色阴影、冷白金属高光与少量橙色热能反光，克制、高级、危险。
【8-11s】镜头继续加速，掠过车侧锋利曲面，俯冲冲向轮毂与轮胎，高速贴地穿梭。轮毂旋转、刹车卡钳、碳纤维侧裙、空气通道、车门切线、尾部空气动力学结构依次闪现。运镜要像被一股不可控的暴力速度拖拽着向前，连续俯冲、绕侧、贴地前压、从车身折面和缝隙边缘擦过，维持极强第一视角爽感。镜头语言强调机械兽性的压迫感，不要温和，不要优雅游走，要像一台暴怒的超级跑车在撕开空气。
【11-13s】镜头再一次快速前冲，整个兰博基尼车身在速度中被完整建立，楔形低趴比例、锐利灯组、夸张进气结构、车侧雕刻曲面、宽大轮组与极具攻击性的姿态全部清晰成型。镜头可短暂沿车顶或车侧高速掠行，再拉到车头侧前方，完成最后一次动势积累。要让整辆车像一头真正完成机械觉醒的公牛，力量感和品牌识别同时拉满。
【13-15s】镜头收于低机位车头侧前方英雄镜头，一辆完整的兰博基尼超级跑车稳定前冲或刚刚定格，车身极低、极宽、极锋利，像刀锋一样切开空间。车漆反光冷酷克制，背景只保留少量赛道热浪、空气流线、轮胎残影和速度余波。结尾必须短、狠、有压迫感，像在宣告：原始野性，最终被锻造成兰博基尼的速度机器。
音效设计：开场使用低频能量脉冲、公牛沉重踏地、鼻息、皮肤掠风、贴脸风切与空气压缩声；推进到眼部与牛角时加入一记极细锐、极克制的空气收束与金属光刃转场音；进入兰博基尼局部后强化金属掠风、车漆表面气流滑过、轮毂旋转、碳纤维震颤、刹车系统轻鸣、灯组唤醒与空间whoosh；结尾突出轮胎压地、车体稳定落位、空气被切开的余震和低频收束感。全程不要背景音乐。
特殊控制：锁定品牌气质为兰博基尼式冷酷、锋利、侵略性、机械兽性和极限速度美学；镜头必须连续丝滑；每段都要有明确视觉升级；动作合理，转场自然，无卡顿无跳变；不要低质赛博朋克，不要廉价机甲变形感，不要普通跑车宣传片质感，必须像顶级超跑品牌的高端创意广告。

description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to create a video with a fresh, healing, and nostalgic style, using warm green and light blue tones, soft lighting, and gentle music (piano and bamboo flute). The prompt outlines eight scenes transitioning from children playing by a stream to a contemplative young adult by a lake, culminating in a textual quote.
content:
整体风格：清新治愈、温馨怀旧，暖绿+浅蓝主色调，光影柔和通透，氛围感温柔细腻 
背景音乐：轻柔纯音乐（钢琴+竹笛），节奏舒缓，情绪层层递进 
1、全景，夏日午后，阳光透过枝叶洒下斑驳光影，清澈的小溪旁，一群孩童赤脚追逐打闹，水花溅起，笑声回荡在田野间 缓慢横移 孩童清脆的笑声、溪水流动声、微风声 
2、中景 孩童追着彩蝶奔跑，指尖轻触蝶翼，粉黄相间的蝴蝶在野花丛中翩翩起舞，绕着孩童打转 跟拍+轻微旋转 蝴蝶振翅声、孩童嬉笑声
3、近景 孩童蹲在稻田边，伸手试探抓捕青蛙，青蛙受惊发出呱呱叫声，接连跳跃着躲进稻禾深处，稻叶轻轻晃动 固定镜头 青蛙呱呱叫声、孩童惊喜的呼喊声
4、全景 孩童嬉戏的画面整体被柔光包裹，画面亮度逐渐降低，开始渐隐转场，色彩慢慢虚化 镜头缓慢拉远，画面渐隐 背景音乐渐弱，环境音淡出
5、远景 湖畔青石上，一位青年人独坐，身形安静，背景是澄澈的湖水与远处的绿树，画面静谧 缓慢推近 纯音乐轻柔响起，微风声 
6 特写 青年人的眼部特写，眼底带着淡淡的忧郁，眼神温柔又怀念，望向湖面的方向 固定特写镜头 无额外音效，纯音乐为主
7、中景 顺着青年人的目光，湖面之上，孩童划着小船嬉闹，船桨划开湖水，泛起层层涟漪 镜头缓缓摇向湖面 孩童嬉闹声、船桨划水声 
8、仰拍全景 天空中洁白的云朵慢悠悠地飘远，逐渐淡出画面，仿佛在与旧时光告别 缓慢仰拍上移 纯音乐节奏放缓，意境升华 
9、全景 整体画面缓缓变暗，光影逐渐收敛，湖畔与青年的身影变得朦胧 固定镜头，画面渐暗 纯音乐渐弱至静音 
10、特写 屏幕中央浮现清晰端正的仿宋字：春风若有怜花意，可否许我再少年，文字停留，画面定格 文字淡入 无音效，文字停留收尾

Create a 12-second ultra-cinematic action scene with strong realism, perfect character consistency, realistic motorcycle physics, dramatic suspense, and seamless time-freeze storytelling.

MAIN SUBJECT:
A black, ultra-fast superbike on a busy highway at dusk. The rider wears a full black racing suit, black gloves, and a glossy black full-face helmet with a dark visor. The bike looks aggressive, premium, aerodynamic, and extremely fast.

STYLE:
hyper-realistic, cinematic, high-speed action film, dramatic lighting, intense motion blur during speed, sharp focus during time freeze, realistic highway environment, grounded physics, premium movie look, highly detailed reflections on the black motorcycle and helmet, 4K cinematic composition.

CAMERA:
dynamic tracking shots, low-angle pursuit shots, fast push-in, slight handheld vibration during speed, then absolute stillness when time stops, dramatic close-up on the rider’s duplicate body after separation, direct eye contact with camera, then instant return to violent real-time motion.

TIMELINE:

0.0s - 1.5s
A black superbike races through dense highway traffic at insane speed. The rider aggressively weaves between cars, overtaking everyone. Cinematic low front-side tracking shot, sparks of reflected city lights, intense speed sensation, realistic motion blur, danger rising.

1.5s - 3.0s
The motorcycle keeps accelerating. Cars are passed one after another. Camera shifts between a rear chase shot and a low side shot near the spinning wheels. The rider looks fully focused, body leaning with precision, the bike slicing through traffic like a missile.

3.0s - 4.2s
A large cargo truck suddenly appears directly ahead in the rider’s lane. The truck feels massive and unavoidable. Camera rapidly pushes in toward the front collision line. Tension peaks. The motorcycle is about to crash head-on.

4.2s - 5.0s
At exactly 1 centimeter before impact, time stops completely. Absolute stillness. The whole world freezes: truck, traffic, dust, reflections, fabric folds, everything suspended in place. No crash is shown yet. The motorcycle and the original rider body remain frozen on the bike in the exact pre-impact position.

5.0s - 7.5s
A second version of the rider — an identical physical duplicate, implying the rider’s spirit or soul separated from the body — calmly steps off the frozen motorcycle while the original body remains motionless on the bike. The duplicate removes the helmet. Under the helmet is the exact same rider’s face. Expression: shocked, confused, darkly comedic disbelief. He walks one or two steps toward camera through the frozen world.

7.5s - 11.5s
Medium close-up. The duplicate turns directly to the viewer, breaking the fourth wall. He looks straight into the lens and says clearly in English:
“Ohh shitt. I think I’m dead.”
Natural lip sync, natural facial performance, subtle panic mixed with disbelief. Keep the original body still frozen on the bike in the background to reinforce the visual reveal. Do not show gore.

11.5s - 12.0s
Without warning, time instantly resumes. Everything snaps back into motion at once. The duplicate disappears the moment time restarts. The motorcycle collides violently with the truck in a sudden brutal impact. Show the crash only at the final moment, extremely fast and shocking, cinematic debris burst, hard cut to impact.

Do not show the actual crash before time stops.
The audience must only realize the rider is dead when the duplicate steps off the frozen bike.
The original rider body must remain on the motorcycle while the duplicate walks away.
The duplicate must be visually identical to the rider.
No gore, no blood, no exposed injuries.
Keep the emotional tone: suspense first, then surreal dark humor, then sudden impact.
Preserve one continuous cinematic sequence with seamless transitions.
Prioritize realism, continuity, dramatic tension, and precise timing.

title: Cinematic Street Magic Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: A detailed, cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to generate a video of an anthropomorphic white rabbit magician performing a card trick on a wet, neon-lit city street at night. The prompt specifies the setting, character attire, action sequence (fanning cards, selecting the Ace of Hearts, disintegration into particles, particle stream following, formation of a giant Ace on a building facade, particle reversal, and card reformation), and camera movements (close-up, pull back), ensuring a smooth, professional performance.
content: A stylized cinematic 3D animation set on a nighttime city street with wet reflective pavement, soft street lights, and neon glow. An anthropomorphic white rabbit magician stands at the center, wearing a black tailcoat, white shirt, black bow tie, and a black top hat, surrounded by a loose semicircle of onlookers. The rabbit performs smooth, professional card handling with a standard 52-card deck. The deck is fanned evenly at chest height, all cards visible and unique. A hand from the camera selects one card from the fan — the Ace of Hearts. The rabbit takes the same card and holds it clearly facing the camera. The rabbit flicks the card lightly. The Ace of Hearts begins to glow at the edges, then disintegrates into fine red and gold particles. The particles form a controlled, continuous stream with motion trails, flowing forward across the street. The camera follows the particle stream as it travels toward a large glass building facade. Upon impact, a point of light appears and expands outward in a grid-like pattern across the glass surface. The entire building facade activates, and a massive glowing Ace of Hearts forms across it, bright and clearly defined, with subtle pulsing light. After a brief hold, the giant Ace of Hearts breaks apart into particles again. The particles reverse direction, streaming back through the air toward the rabbit. The rabbit steps forward and reaches into the air, catching the incoming particles. In close-up, the particles compress and reform into a single solid playing card in the rabbit’s hand — the Ace of Hearts, unchanged. The rabbit presents the card toward the camera. The camera slowly pulls back, revealing the crowd reacting and clapping, while the city lights and reflections remain vivid in the background.

ジェットコースターは高速でレール上を走行し、急降下、ループ、急旋回を含む。カメラは乗車者の視点として自然に揺れ、振動やモーションブラーを伴う。

コース内には複数のトンネルが存在する。

各トンネル内では、次に現れる世界の“予兆”が徐々に現れる：
・壁や天井に次の環境の要素が侵食するように出現する
・ネオンの光が漏れ出す、雪や霜が付着する、砂埃が流れ込むなど
・照明や色温度が次の世界に向かって変化していく
・空間がわずかに歪み、異なる世界が重なり始める

トンネルを抜けた瞬間、それらの予兆が一気に現実化し、周囲の風景が完全に別世界へと切り替わる。

1つ目のトンネル出口：ネオンが滲み出ていた後、サイバーパンク都市へ完全変化。光る看板と飛行体。
2つ目のトンネル出口：壁に砂やひび割れが広がり、抜けると広大な渓谷。
3つ目のトンネル出口：霜と冷気が広がり、抜けると吹雪の雪山。
4つ目のトンネル出口：幾何学的な光と色のノイズが増殖し、抜けると抽象的でシュールな空間。

各環境に応じてライティングは動的に変化。風圧、スピード感、没入感を強調。

レール構造は常に一貫しており、変化するのは周囲の環境のみ。

超高精細、シネマティック品質、滑らかな動き、リアルな物理挙動。

映像は停止せず、走行中のまま終了する。

title: High-Speed Cinematic Action Scene with Web-Slinging
description: A highly detailed, multi-part prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an ultra-realistic, cinematic, high-speed action video. The scene features a male character using high-tension webs to swing and accelerate between skyscrapers during the golden hour, emphasizing realistic physics, dynamic movement sequences (acceleration, jump, fall, explosive ascent, re-acceleration), and a close, tracking camera perspective.
content:
リファレンス画像の<<<Image1>>>  を完全に維持したまま、超リアルで映画のような高速アクション動画を生成してください。

ゴールデンアワーの暖かい光に包まれた高層ビル群の中、男性がクモの糸のような高張力ウェブを使って、ビルの間を超高速で突き進むシネマティックアクション。すべての動きはビルとビルの間、外壁や窓のすぐ近く、屋上ラインより下〜ギリギリ付近で行うこと。開けた空に長時間出ないこと。

【アクション構成（重要）】

最初は“前方加速”から始まる。
<<<Image1>>>  は前方上方向の建物に向かってウェブを発射し、その張力で一気に前へ引き込まれ、ビルの隙間を一直線に超高速で突き進む。壁や窓のすぐ横をかすめながら進み、強いスピードと奥行きを見せる。

その後、勢いを乗せたまま大きくジャンプし、ビルの隙間を一気に「ボーン」と飛び越える。ここでは一瞬だけ開けた空間に出るが、すぐに次のアクションへ移行する。

ジャンプ後、キャラクターは一度バランスを崩し、落下し始める。重力に引かれて急激に下へ落ちるリアルな落下を描写すること。ここで一瞬のスリルを作る。

落下中、<<<Image1>>>  は即座に上方向の建物の縁や構造物に向かってウェブを発射し、空中で引っ掛ける。その瞬間、強烈な張力によって体が一気に上方向へ引き上げられ、爆発的に上昇する。

その後、再び前方に向かってウェブを発射し、前進加速へ戻る。

ウェブの使用回数は全体で2〜3回に抑え、1つ1つのアクションをしっかり見せること。

【動きの特徴】
すべての動きは慣性、重力、張力に基づいたリアルな物理挙動にすること。減速やホバリングは禁止。常にスピードの流れが途切れず、「加速 → 跳躍 → 落下 → 爆発的上昇 → 再加速」という明確な緩急を作る。

【身体表現】
ウェブを発射する瞬間、片腕を鋭く前方または上方に突き出す。加速中は体が引っ張られて伸び、脚は後方へ流れる。ジャンプ時は全身で勢いを乗せ、落下時は重力に従い自然に崩れる。引き上げ時は体が一気に上へ持ち上がるダイナミックな動きにする。

【カメラ】
カメラは基本的に前進方向の追従ショットを維持し、キャラクターの後方または近距離から追いかける。常に奥へ進む動きを強調し、スピードとパースの変化を最大化する。サイドアングルは使用しない。

【演出】
ガラス外壁の反射、流れる窓のライン、強いモーションブラー、風圧による服の揺れ、光のフレアを活用し、圧倒的なスピードと没入感を演出する。壁との距離は常に近く、衝突ギリギリのスリルを強調する。

【感情】
集中、興奮、アドレナリン、自信、そして一瞬の危機（落下）からのリカバリーによる高揚感を表現する。

全体として、超リアル、シネマティック、高速直進、強い奥行き、緩急のあるアクション、物理的リアリズムを重視すること。

title: Miniature Skateboard Chase Scene
description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating a high-speed, cinematic video from a miniature perspective. The scene involves a miniature girl skateboarding through a child's room, navigating massive obstacles like Lego structures, rolling balls, and closing toy boxes, emphasizing continuous motion, low camera tracking, and intense speed changes.
content: 子ども部屋の床の上で、ミニチュアサイズの少女が小さなスケートボードに乗り、床すれすれを高速で走り抜ける。人間サイズのおもちゃや家具が巨大に見えるスケール感。カメラは主人公のすぐ背後から低い位置で追尾し、常に奥へ進み続けるワンカット風の映像。超広角レンズ、モーションブラー、被写界深度、シネマティックライティング。スピードは3段階で徐々に上がっていく。第1段階では、レゴの街のビルの谷間のような狭い通路を高速で抜け、積み木の間をスラロームしながら前進する。第2段階では、前方から巨大なボールが転がってきて壁とのわずかな隙間へ滑り込み、倒れてくる積み木の下を紙一重でくぐり抜け、走るミニカーのタイヤの間をギリギリで通過する。第3段階では、風で閉じかける絵本のページとページの隙間を突き抜け、揺れるぬいぐるみの腕の下をすり抜け、最後は閉まりかけるおもちゃ箱のフタのわずかな隙間へ飛び込み、最大速度のまま暗い奥へ消えていく。危機一髪の回避が連続する、スリリングで爽快感のある映像。現実にありそうな子ども部屋の中で、ミニチュア視点ならではの巨大な障害物と小さな隙間を活かした、没入感のあるアトラクションのような映像。

title: Cat Ramen Chef ASMR Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: A detailed, step-by-step prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a short video featuring a cat acting as a professional ramen chef in a late-night Japanese-style food stall. The prompt specifies cinematic warm color grading, shallow depth of field, realistic style, and detailed ASMR audio instructions for the cooking process.
content:
制作一个以猫咪在深夜食堂制作手作拉面为主题的短视频，电影级调色（暖色调，充满烟火气），细腻颗粒，浅景深。
主角是一只猫咪，扮演一位专业拉面师傅，形象外观严格参照【@【@图1】】。
场景设定为城市街头一家充满和式风情的深夜拉面摊位前。背景有温暖的黄色灯笼、木质吧台，以及远处模糊的街道霓虹灯。
视频内容需要按照以下步骤分镜展示：

揉面与切面： 猫咪穿着小围裙，有节奏地在撒了面粉的木质案板上揉捏面团，然后用一把锋利的面刀将面团切成均匀的细面条。

煮面与甩干： 猫咪将面条抖散投入沸腾的大锅中，几秒后用竹漏勺将面条捞起，熟练地在空中用力甩两下，将多余的水分甩干。

调汤底： 猫咪拿着一个精致的长柄勺，从熬制浓郁的白色骨汤锅里舀出一勺汤，缓缓倒入一个深蓝色的陶瓷大碗中。

摆盘： 猫咪用筷子整齐地放入煮好的面条，再依次在面条上摆放两片厚实的叉烧、半个溏心蛋、几片海苔和葱花，动作精细。

结尾： 结尾镜头猫咪师傅将这碗热气腾腾、冒着白烟的拉面轻轻推向镜头，并微微点头示意。

要求：

视频风格： 写实，画面清晰，中景。

声音（ASMR）： 整个视频不需语音旁白，但要放大：切面时的“哒哒”声、面条入水的“哗啦”声、甩干水分的“飒飒”声、热汤入碗的流动声等。

背景音乐： 背景有轻柔、舒缓的萨克斯风音乐，营造静谧的深夜氛围。

description: A detailed prompt for a 15-second Pixar-style animated short featuring a debate between a cool hipster avocado and an anxious slice of toast on a kitchen counter. The prompt includes dialogue, specific character actions, cinematic camera instructions (quick cuts, slow motion), and sound effects for a viral, humorous video.
content: Cute and sassy Pixar-inspired animated short of anthropomorphic breakfast items debating on a trendy kitchen counter in warm morning light: cool hipster Avocado half with sunglasses, tiny hat, and smooth attitude vs. anxious Slice of Toast with butter sweat drops and perfectionist face. Multi-shot sequence: medium shot of Avocado flexing its pit, close-up on Toast crisping up nervously, over-the-shoulder during smash attempt, chaotic final shot with chili flakes flying. Avocado says: "Bro, just smash me on you. We’ll be Instagram famous. Healthy fats, baby!" Toast panics: "Easy for you to say! You’re always fashionably late and half-rotten inside. I get burned every morning!" Twist: they combine but a hand adds chili flakes — both yell "Too much personality!" in spicy pain. Vibrant food colors, bouncy physics, exaggerated expressions and steam/heat effects. Cinematic foodie camera: quick cuts, slow-motion smash attempt, playful zooms. Warm golden hour lighting with appetizing highlights. Sound effects: sizzling, nervous crunches, spicy yelps, and Instagram camera shutter. High-quality smooth animation, 15 seconds, relatable millennial food trend humor perfect for viral shares.

title: Impossible Camera Move through a Southeast Asian Night Market
description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt for a 15-second continuous, impossible camera move through a dense Southeast Asian night market, focusing on photorealistic ground-to-aerial cinematography, wet stone reflections, and intense orange/red lighting. The prompt specifies camera movements, audio cues, and emotional pacing for each shot.
content:
FORMAT: 15s / single continuous impossible camera move / no dialogue
STYLE: Dense Southeast Asian night market, wet stone, steam and fire, orange lantern light, photorealistic ground-to-aerial cinematic 8K
Shot 01 (0:00–2:00): Camera starts at ankle level. Forest of feet — sandals, bare feet, flip flops on glistening wet stone. Market sounds overwhelming. Camera weaves between legs like water. Audio: Wet footsteps, distant vendor calls, sizzling.

Shot 02 (2:00–3:30): Camera rises slowly past steaming woks. A gas flame bursts at exact eye level — camera briefly engulfed in orange fire then emerges through it, uncut. Audio: Gas flame WHOMP. Wok sizzle. Shot 03 (3:30–5:00): Camera weaves through hanging lanterns at mid-height, skimming past them like a moth navigating. Red and orange light strobing across the lens. Audio: Lantern chains clinking. Crowd murmur. Shot 04 (5:00–6:30): Camera dips suddenly under a low table. A child has fallen asleep on a bag under here. Quiet pocket of stillness inside the chaos. Camera lingers one beat. Audio: Noise muffled. Child's quiet breathing.
Shot 05 (6:30–8:00): Camera rises back up through the smoke of a charcoal grill — lens briefly obscured by smoke, then emerges above the stall canopy level. Audio: Charcoal crackle. Smoke hiss.
Shot 06 (8:00–10:00): Camera continues rising — now above rooftop level. The market reveals itself as an endless orange lantern sea stretching to the horizon. Camera tilts slowly, taking in the full scale. Audio: Market sounds fading to a low ambient hum.
Shot 07 (10:00–12:00): Camera begins descending back down — targeting a single stall at the market edge. A lone vendor counting coins. Everything closing around them. Audio: Distant vendor calls dying out one by one. Shot 08 (12:00–13:30): Camera settles at the vendor's hands. Close on coins being stacked methodically. One lantern swaying above them. Audio: Coin clinks. Wind in the lantern.
Shot 09 (13:30–15:00): Camera tilts up slowly to the vendor's face. They look up — directly into the camera. Hold. Fade to black. Audio: Last coin placed. Silence.
STYLE NOTES: Ground level feels claustrophobic and overwhelming. The aerial shot is the emotional exhale. Warm orange and red throughout — deepening to amber at the end. Wet stone reflections throughout. Real fire and real smoke, no CG substitutes. 8K.

title: Boss Battle Scene Video Prompt
description: A detailed multi-part prompt designed to generate a dramatic boss battle scene video. It instructs the AI to use a reference image only for style, start with a fast transition, feature a game UI overlay (RPG style command window), and position the player character in the foreground facing a large enemy in the background, all rendered in a cinematic, high-contrast fantasy style.
content:
参考画像はリファレンスとしてのみ使用し、スタートフレームには使用しない。バトル風アップテンポBGMあり、効果音あり。開始直後に以下のカットに切り替える。

超高速トランジションで画面切りかえ。高速で空間が崩れ落ちる。

一瞬のホワイトアウトの後、
参考画像の背景の雰囲気を継承したフィールドに切り替わる。

切り替えと同時に、
画面下部にRPG風のコマンドUIが出現する。
そのうちの一つが選択され、キャラクターが動き出す。

UI演出：
・半透明のウィンドウがスライドイン
・ピクセル風またはモダンなゲームUI
・軽く発光する枠（glow）
・カチッとした出現アニメーション

表示内容：
左側：キャラクターの名前、HP、MPゲージ
右側：数種類の参考画像から連想される必殺技(日本語名)
上部：参考画像から連想される敵キャラクター名

参考画像から連想される特殊な巨大な敵キャラクターが右奥に出現し、自キャラは左手前に配置され奥を向いている。

カメラ構図：
・左手前にプレイヤーキャラ
・右奥に敵
・ややローアングルで迫力

演出：
・キャラクターが、その見た目から連想される武器を持ち、戦闘ポーズに入り、敵キャラクターと正対し、軽くステップを踏む。一連の動作は超高速で一瞬で行われる。
・背景は軽く動く（particle, fog, energy）

スタイル：
cinematic, game UI overlay, ultra detailed, high contrast,
fantasy battle scene, dynamic lighting, volumetric light

title: Wuxia Comedy: Cat Hero, Duck Scholar, and Husky Doctor
description: A detailed, humorous prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating a Wuxia comedy video set in a traditional Chinese courtyard at night. The plot involves a Cat Hero interrogating a Duck Scholar (who is holding a melatonin capsule) and a dramatic intervention by a Husky Doctor, using cinematic lighting and exaggerated action.
content:
影片場景設定 (Global Style)
環境場景：深夜的中式古風庭院，青瓦白牆、紅燈籠隨風微晃，地面有月光與樹影交錯，整體光影帶有濃厚復古武俠電影質感。
角色形象：
橘貓（大俠）：穿著古風俠客服，披風微揚，表情兇狠中帶點憨，氣場十足。
烤鴨（書生）：穿著古代書生長袍，被繩子綁在木樁上，神情委屈又緊張，嘴巴鼓鼓的（含著黑色膠囊）。
哈士奇（醫生）：穿白袍醫生制服，戴黑框眼鏡，神情專業又帶點自信過頭的戲劇感。
道具設定：黑色膠囊（褪黑激素）含在烤鴨嘴中。
畫質要求：電影級打光，超高清 4K，動物毛髮與布料細節清晰，動作流暢，略帶慢動作強化戲劇張力。

分鏡劇情與旁白 (Script & Prompts)

鏡頭 1：武俠審訊（全景/中景）
畫面描述：左側橘貓大俠負手而立，披風隨風微動，右側烤鴨書生被綁在木樁上，嘴巴鼓起。橘貓突然上前，一掌拍在木樁旁，氣勢逼人。
動作：橘貓步步逼近，眼神凌厲。
旁白（橘貓）：
「說！為何不肯交出你嘴中的褪黑激素！」

鏡頭 2：書生鴨死守（烤鴨特寫）
畫面描述：鏡頭推近烤鴨，嘴巴緊閉，臉頰鼓起，眼神倔強又帶點慌張。
動作：烤鴨拼命搖頭，死死咬住膠囊不放。
旁白（烤鴨）：
（含糊不清）「唔唔唔！（我不能給！）」

鏡頭 3：氣氛升溫（橘貓特寫）
畫面描述：橘貓眼神一沉，緩緩抬手，武俠氣場拉滿，背景燈籠微微晃動。
動作：橘貓手指關節發出“喀喀”聲，準備動粗。
旁白（橘貓）：
「敬酒不吃，吃罰酒是吧……」

鏡頭 4：醫生突襲（動作鏡頭）
畫面描述：畫面右側突然衝出哈士奇醫生，一個滑步切入畫面，動作誇張但專業。
動作：哈士奇迅速伸出一掌，「啪！」地按在烤鴨胸口（類似急救按壓）。
音效：低沉“砰”一聲＋誇張彈出音效。

鏡頭 5：膠囊飛出（慢動作特寫）
畫面描述：慢動作鏡頭，烤鴨張嘴，「噗！」一顆黑色膠囊從口中飛出，在空中旋轉。
動作：哈士奇單手優雅接住膠囊，鏡片反光一閃。

鏡頭 6：全場愣住（反應鏡頭）
畫面描述：橘貓與烤鴨同時愣住，畫面定格一瞬，氣氛從緊張瞬間轉為荒謬。
動作：橘貓慢慢轉頭看向哈士奇。
旁白（橘貓，小聲）：
「……這也行？」

鏡頭 7：醫生結尾（哈士奇特寫）
畫面描述：哈士奇推了推眼鏡，手中夾著黑色膠囊，對鏡頭露出自信笑容，背景略微虛化。
動作：微微點頭，語氣專業又帶點得意。
旁白（哈士奇）：
「褪黑激素，不是人人都能吃。」
「最好，先問過醫師。」

鏡頭 8：收尾（全景定格）
畫面描述：三者定格，橘貓仍維持武俠姿勢但表情困惑，烤鴨一臉虛脫，哈士奇自信站中間。背景傳來幾聲夜鳥鳴叫。
動作：畫面定格＋輕微膠片顆粒效果淡出。

title: Xu Ke Style Cyber Wuxia Duel: Mechanical Limbs vs. Hanfu
description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating a high-tension, 15-second Cyber Wuxia duel video in the style of Tsui Hark and King Hu. The scene is set against a giant waterfall, featuring a female fighter in a white suit with gold-copper mechanical limbs and a male fighter in Hanfu with silver mechanical arms, focusing on weapon clashes, steam effects, and cinematic camera movements.
content: 徐克风格高张力东方赛博武侠生死决战，15秒连续动作，邵氏经典美学与赛博朋克机械融合。 场景： 图片2 巨型瀑布从画面正后方垂直倾泻，整面背景被白色水帘占据，崖台地面存有浅水层，冷白逆光从瀑布后方透射，水雾持续涌来包裹整个空间，踏步激起晶亮水花。 左侧战斗者：中国女性四十多岁 图片1 ，白色长款西装外套衣摆至膝，胸口敞开露出银色机械胸甲，双臂为完全裸露的金铜色机械义肢，齿轮液压杆清晰可见，关节渗出冷气蒸汽，双脚同为金铜色裸露机械结构，背部金铜色机械脊柱沿中线完全裸露，黑色马尾发型配金色圆形耳环。右手握持细长直刃剑，剑身修长无纹，全长约为身高三分之二，剑柄缠绕金铜色机械齿轮。 右侧战斗者：中国男性四十多岁体型壮硕 图片3 ，米白色汉服长袍腰缠布带，双肩覆银色机械肩甲，双臂为银色机械义肢，背部有银色机械脊甲，头顶发髻两侧剃短，面容沉稳。双手握持长棍，棍身深色硬木每隔一段有银色金属箍环包裹，双手分握中后段。 前两秒半窒息对峙：白色西装金铜机械臂女性右臂前伸，细长剑尖朝向对方咽喉在逆光中散出金属反光，左侧机械臂垂于身侧待发，关节蒸汽缓慢渗出。米白汉袍银色肩甲壮硕男性双手横握长棍置于身前，重心沉入后脚，眼神追踪对方机械臂每寸位移。衣摆长袍在崖台风压中持续飘动，浅水荡出细密涟漪。镜头从侧面低角度贴近水面缓慢推进，瀑布水帘漫延至画框四边。 第三秒爆发：白色西装金铜机械臂女性右脚猛踏水面溅起大片水花，双臂猛力前伸以全身冲刺将细长剑从低位向上斜刺，机械肘关节蒸汽集中喷射。米白汉袍银色机械臂壮硕男性瞬间将长棍下压斜接来剑，棍身银色箍环与剑碰撞爆响，借力向右转体反手将棍尾横扫对方腰侧，两件武器在冷白逆光中交叉，水珠从碰撞点四散炸成光点云。 三段节奏变化： 第一段近身连击，白色西装金铜机械臂女性连续以直剑变换高低角度快速刺击，机械臂液压杆随每次出剑可见伸缩。米白汉袍银色机械臂壮硕男性用长棍两端交替拨挡，银色机械臂高速格挡中关节摩擦出微弱火星，双方在浅水中快速移动每次踏步溅起低矮水幕，镜头快速侧向追踪，武器碰撞瞬间切入特写定格火星与水珠。 第二段跃空交锋，白色西装金铜机械双脚女性蹬踏水面腾身跃起，衣摆与马尾在空中拉成流线，最高点将细长剑从上方大力劈落。米白汉袍银色肩甲壮硕男性举棍过顶双臂撑开迎击，两件武器半空正面碰撞，冲击气浪将水雾向外推散成圆形。镜头切换正上方俯拍捕捉两人在白色瀑布背景上的交叉构图。 第三段贴身纠缠，米白汉袍银色机械臂壮硕男性用长棍横推贴住女性金铜机械臂借棍身长度向崖台边缘逼压。白色西装金铜机械臂女性以左侧机械臂硬接棍身，两人躯干近乎贴合，浅水在双脚之间向外扩散涟漪，镜头随重量冲击轻微手持抖动一次。 最后三秒收势：米白汉袍银色肩甲壮硕男性被最后一次重力下劈逼退至崖台边缘，单膝跪地，长棍斜置身前棍尾抵住湿滑地面，银色机械双臂轻微颤动，长袍下摆湿透贴腿，瀑布水雾落于银色肩甲之上。白色西装金铜机械臂女性落地踏水稳住身形，将细长剑向前送至剑尖距对方颈部不足一寸，金铜机械双臂完全静止，蒸汽缓缓消散。两人对视一秒，她将剑尖微撤一寸悬而不收。镜头缓缓后拉将两人同时纳入画框，瀑布水帘满幅奔涌，水花仍在浅水地面持续散落。 8K超高清电影级，超写实质感，35mm胶片颗粒，冷白瀑布背景对撞金铜机械暖色，银色机械零件在逆光下形成第三层光泽。快速侧向追踪、武器碰撞特写、正上方俯拍强调镜、重击时轻微手持抖动，全程可见金属火星、蒸汽喷射、水花溅射，衣物发型对气流有真实物理反馈，动作连续无跳切，无动漫风格，无游戏界面，无魔法光效，无水印，无字幕，无肢体变形。

title: Cyber Wuxia Action Scene: Waterfall Duel
description: A highly detailed, four-part storyboard prompt for Seedance 2.0, generating a high-tension Cyber Wuxia duel in the style of 'Fog Hill of Five Elements'. The scene features a female character in a white suit with mechanical parts and a male character with Hello Kitty tattoos and pink metal pants, fighting near a giant mossy waterfall using extreme slow-motion, rapid cuts, and cinematic camera work.
content: 【镜头1 · 3s · 建立/爆发】 主体一：赛博女性 图片1 ，白色西装，机械颈骨，金齿轮耳环，红唇冷漠，黑发马尾，玄铁长刀 主体二：赛博男性 图片2 ，裸腹六块腹肌，Hello Kitty纹身，黑色机械甲肩臂，粉色金属货裤，白色AJ，武士刀 场景：参考图 图片3 巨型苔藓瀑布崖壁，白色水雾铺天，翠绿蕨类丛生，湿滑苔石 动作：男性从瀑布顶端纵身跃下，武士刀倒握反插，在水雾中高速坠落——子弹时间介入，镜头360度环绕静止身体，水珠悬浮，机械甲齿轮咬合细节锐利可见；时间恢复，男性砸落苔石台炸出十米裂缝，女性横向瞬移闪避，刀锋擦过发丝，黑发寸断飘散 风格：雾山五行国漫画风，硬边水墨线条，青银赤金高对比，电影级光影 镜头：跟随俯冲高速下降，子弹时间360度环绕，相机位于下坠轨迹平行高度(thats where the camera is) 构图：纵向引导线，瀑布与坠落轨迹重合，冲击点为焦点 氛围：极度压迫，生死一线，水雾爆散 音频：风声撕裂；子弹时间静默低频；落地轰鸣；配乐：单鼓重击起 【镜头2 · 4s · 转折/游斗】 主体一：白衣女性，长刀低扫连劈，动作凌厉 主体二：粉裤男性，机械臂格挡，赤金电弧炸裂 场景：瀑布中段苔藓岩壁平台，苔石踩碎，蕨类横飞，水雾被气劲切成丝状 动作：女性贴地滑步突进低扫脚踝——子弹时间介入，极近距特写刀锋与AJ鞋底仅差两毫米，鞋底被刀气削出焦痕，机械关节指节泛白细节定格；时间恢复，男性踏地弹身，燃焰武士刀劈向女性机械颈部，刀锋擦过颈部零件削飞旋转；二人蹬墙互踹，双腿空中碰撞爆发蓝金冲击波，双双震飞后空翻落地 风格：快切与子弹时间交替，打击感极强，细节残酷真实 镜头：贴地低速跟随切极端近距特写，相机位于地面贴近高度(thats where the camera is) 构图：极端近景景深，危险细节锐利，背景瀑布大虚化 氛围：千钧一发，窒息感 音频：刀锋擦骨金属尖啸；鞋底焦痕嗞嗞声；冲击波爆响；配乐：急促弦乐 【镜头3 · 4s · 高潮/环境缠斗】 主体一：白衣女性，长刀反握插地腾空旋踢 主体二：粉裤男性，抓蕨类藤蔓借力甩身，机械臂过载爆红 场景：瀑布底部水潭区，水面踩出巨型凹陷，苔石崩裂，蕨类连根拔起 动作：男性抓整棵蕨类横扫，女性长刀拦腰斩断——子弹时间介入，极近特写断面纤维纹理、刀锋残留绿色汁液、机械关节泛白细节定格；时间恢复，女性借反震旋身斜劈冰蓝刀气，男性机械臂过载硬接握碎，掌心蒸汽焦烟；二人扑摔入水潭缠斗翻滚，激起十米水柱折射金蓝彩虹 风格：慢动作细节特写与暴力冲击并行，环境破坏极致 镜头：子弹时间断面特写切回水柱爆发全景，相机位于水面平行高度(thats where the camera is) 构图：水面倒影与真实动作上下对称，冲击点居中 氛围：野蛮爆裂，生死相搏 音频：树干断裂声；机械过载嗡鸣；水柱爆发轰响；配乐：低频战鼓爆点 【镜头4 · 4s · 终结/大招对轰】 主体一：白衣女性，长刀举顶，银冰光芒过载爆发，西装边缘被能量撕裂 主体二：粉裤男性，武士刀横胸，机械甲赤金全功率过载，粉裤猎猎飞扬 场景：瀑布正前方制高苔石台，百米瀑布为背景，水雾与光芒交融 动作：双方同时蓄力爆发，冰火双色能量柱冲天——子弹时间介入，极近特写女性瞳孔，倒映赤金火焰与男性全影，睫毛水雾微珠清晰，眼神由冷漠转决死；切至男性Hello Kitty纹身特写，纹身在赤金光下线条流动发光；时间恢复，双方全力冲刺对劈，两刀瀑布正中央对撞，炸出五十米冰火双色球形爆炸，瀑布从中间炸裂撕成两半；双方各自倒飞十米重砸苔石，烟尘渐散，二人喘息对望，画面定格 风格：子弹时间微距细节与终极爆炸超广角极致反差，震撼收束 镜头：眼部极端微距切超广角大爆炸全景，相机位于爆炸正面平行高度(thats where the camera is) 构图：爆炸中心点，冰火双色向四方放射，双角色对称分列 氛围：天崩地裂，毁灭级收束 音频：子弹时间静默心跳；双刀碰撞共鸣；爆炸巨响；配乐：单鼓定格，低频余震渐弱 无水印、无字幕、无文字叠加。

title: Urban Time-Shift Martial Arts Epic: Cat Ninja vs. Tiger Warrior
description: A highly detailed, action-packed prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating an 'Urban Time-Shift Martial Arts Epic' video. It features a fight between a Cat Ninja and a White Tiger Warrior, transitioning the battle scene from 16th-century Rome's Trevi Fountain to 21st-century Venice's canals, emphasizing cinematic effects, speed, and a clash of dark shadow energy versus white martial aura.
content:
都市時空穿越武道大片(Urban Time-Shift Martial Arts Epic)。頂級電影特效，極速剪輯節奏，強調力量、速度與守護意志的極限碰撞。視覺風格強烈對比：一方是暗影凝聚的東方巨龍能量，另一方是純白剛勁的武道氣場屏障。時空在戰鬥中撕裂重組。

【場景】
戰場從16世紀羅馬的特雷維噴泉開始——石雕神像、流動水池、燭光與月色交織；隨著戰鬥升級，空間逐漸扭曲破碎，最終延伸至21世紀的威尼斯運河——霓虹燈倒映水面，水氣與現代燈光交錯，歷史與現代重疊。

【角色】

橘貓忍者：穿黑色忍者裝束，身形敏捷，橘色毛髮在夜色中若隱若現，雙眼銳利發光，周身環繞暗影氣流。
白老虎武者：壯碩白虎，身穿跆拳道服與黑帶，肌肉線條分明，氣勢沉穩，周身環繞白色氣浪與震動波紋。

【分鏡腳本】

[00:00–00:03] 鏡頭1：古城開戰·速度試探
機位：高速滑軌＋手持混合運鏡(Dynamic Tracking + Handheld)。
畫面：特雷維噴泉前，水花飛濺。橘貓忍者瞬間消失又出現，殘影連續閃現；白老虎穩站原地，以最小動作格擋攻擊。拳腳碰撞間激起水柱與碎石，雕像表面出現裂痕。

[00:03–00:06] 鏡頭2：時空撕裂·場景轉換
機位：旋轉升空鏡頭(Spiral Rise Shot)。
畫面：兩者一次猛烈對撞，能量爆開——空間如玻璃碎裂。背景從古羅馬石雕快速扭曲，轉為威尼斯運河。水面翻湧，貢多拉劇烈晃動，霓虹燈在水中扭曲反射。
特寫：橘貓低吼，黑影氣流如煙翻騰；白虎踏水而立，腳下水面出現同心圓氣紋。

[00:06–00:11] 鏡頭3：絕技對轟·龍與氣場
機位：史詩級廣角全景(Epic Wide Shot)。
動作（同步爆發）：
橘貓忍者：雙爪結印猛然推出，暗影能量凝聚成一條巨大東方巨龍(Eastern Shadow Dragon)，龍鱗細節清晰，盤旋升空，張口咆哮，帶動水氣與霓虹光流席捲前方。
白老虎武者：雙掌前推，白色氣場屏障瞬間展開(White Martial Aura Barrier)，氣流層層擴散，如水波與震動波交織，穩定而厚重。
特效碰撞：巨龍猛烈撞擊氣場，爆發巨大衝擊波，水面炸裂升空，運河兩側建築玻璃震碎，霓虹燈閃爍失控。

[00:11–00:13] 鏡頭4：壓制與反擊
機位：快速推進鏡頭(Rapid Push-in)。
畫面：白色氣場出現裂紋，但白虎怒吼發力，肌肉繃緊，氣場瞬間反震。巨龍被撕裂一部分，黑影能量四散如煙。橘貓被震退，在水面滑行數米，濺起高牆般水浪。

[00:13–00:15] 鏡頭5：終局定格·對峙未完
機位：慢動作定格＋環繞(Freeze + Slow Orbit)。
畫面：威尼斯夜色中，水氣瀰漫。白老虎穩站水面中央，氣場緩緩收斂；橘貓半蹲於漂浮木板上，黑影氣流再次凝聚。兩者對視——戰意未熄。背景霓虹在水霧中閃爍，時空裂縫仍隱約可見，能量光點緩緩飄散。

title: Seedance 2.0 AI Wedding Video Prompt: Cinematic Night Scene
description: A detailed, multi-scene Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a cinematic wedding video with a 'Cyberpunk and Extreme Romance' theme. The prompt specifies a 9:16 vertical screen, 4K resolution, a rainy city rooftop setting, and detailed camera movements (high-angle pull-down, 360-degree slow motion orbit, close-up), culminating in a near-kiss moment with specific lighting and sound design. It requires reference images for the bride and groom (implied by the description of their appearance).
content: 主题一：电影夜景风 - 星光幻城，共坠星河 视觉核心：赛博朋克与极致浪漫的碰撞，利用霓虹倒影与雨滴微距展现都市高级感。 9:16竖屏，写实电影质感风格，都市奢华，4K高清。 0-4秒：高位俯拍，缓缓下降。雨后的都市天台，地面是积水的黑色柏油路，如镜面般反射着远处迷离的城市霓虹灯光。唯美25岁中国新娘【偶像级别】身穿闪钻鱼尾高定婚纱，28岁帅气中国新郎身穿深色丝绒西装。两人在画面正中，手撑一把透明雨伞，在雨夜中漫步。画面呈现复古文艺电影式的电影抽帧感。 5-9秒：镜头以两人为中心做360度环绕慢镜头。新娘瓜子脸精致，野生眉，狐狸眼冷艳，高鼻梁，红唇微张；新郎下颌线分明，剑眉星目，眼神深邃。环绕过程中，天空中飘落极慢的微小雨滴（子弹时间），新郎将伞倾向新娘，自己的半边肩膀被微雨打湿。霓虹灯光在他们身后化作巨大的彩色光斑（散景效果）。 10-15秒：镜头切至特写，微微仰拍。新娘丢掉透明雨伞，雨伞在背景中缓缓下落。新娘双手环住新郎的脖子，新郎低头深情凝视。一束路灯的暖橘色轮廓光从侧面打透新娘沾着水珠的睫毛。画面定格在两人即将吻上的瞬间，背景霓虹彻底虚化为星河。 音效：远处的城市环境音、缓慢的爵士大提琴、雨滴落在伞面上的白噪音、电影感的心跳声。 禁止：任何文字、字幕、LOGO或水印。

The prompt specifies the character, setting, action, dialogue style (colloquial), camera work (4K, stable), and aspect ratio, using two reference images for the person and the food.
content:
做一段带货的短视频，一位年轻漂亮美女@【@图1】黑色长发，坐在门店餐桌旁，吃着麻辣烫@【@图2】，讲解产品的口感，口语化表达，用生活中聊天的语气分享口感心得，同时用筷子夹起麻辣烫里的特色食材（如：爆浆芝士丸/嫩牛肉）去展示，表情亲切
自然，动作舒缓，产品中近景特写，人物中远景相络合，镜头平稳，4k高清，动作连贯。横屏2.0，原比例。

title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: Eastern Dark Mythology Sky Burial
description: A detailed, 15-second, single-shot video prompt for Seedance 2.0, focusing on Eastern dark mythology, sky burial imagery, megalophobia, and Chinese surreal disaster landscapes. The prompt specifies color palette, camera movements, shot types (extreme close-up, pull-back, wide angle), and sound design, detailing the progression of the scene from falling feathers on a bronze bell to the slow rising of a colossal sky burial deity.
content: 15秒，一镜到底，东方黑暗神话，天葬意象，巨物恐惧，中国式超现实灾厄景观，无对白，无旁白。整体色调为冷灰、骨白、旧金、暗红，天空低压，空气中飘落大量羽毛，像雪一样持续下坠。 0:00–0:03：极近特写开场。85mm长焦微距，浅景深。骨白羽毛缓慢落在一只巨大的青铜铃铛表面，铃铛半埋在黑色冻土中，表面布满古老符纹和干裂血锈。羽毛落下时，铃铛内部传来极低频的闷响，地面细小石粒震动。冷顶光，阴影纯黑。 0:03–0:08：镜头贴地后拉并微微抬升。35mm，稳定滑行。黑色荒原上立着无数倾斜木桩与残破祭幡，地面覆盖一层羽毛。镜头掠过几只巨大的枯鹿角，它们最初像普通遗骸，随后才意识到那其实是一个更庞大存在的一部分。随着镜头继续后退，一层层暗红色祭布从地面被缓慢拉起，布面沾满灰尘、蜡油和雨蚀痕迹，边缘挂满青铜小铃。铃声极轻，却密集得令人不安。 0:08–0:12：镜头穿过一片塌陷的石门，冲出后豁然开阔。24mm广角，深焦。完整巨物现身：一尊埋伏在山谷中的天葬神像缓缓起身，身体由成百上千层沉重祭布、兽角、骨饰和巨大空洞面具组成，高度远超山脊。它起身时，成片羽毛被气流卷向天空，像倒流的大雪。远处的废弃寺庙与经幡在它脚边显得极其渺小。天空惨白，巨物上部形成压迫剪影。 0:12–0:15：镜头极慢前推。50mm。巨像胸前悬挂的巨大空面具缓缓转向镜头，面具五官空无一物，只有眼眶深处浮现极微弱暗红火点。所有铃铛同时轻响一下，羽毛骤然停止下落，画面边缘逐渐失光，黑场。音效：低频风压、远处群铃、巨大布料拖拽、最后一声空洞钟鸣后静默。

title: Cinematic Montage Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: A comprehensive, highly detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second cinematic montage video with specific scene transitions, color grading, camera movements, and audio design, contrasting a warm past scene with a cold present scene, focusing on a couple's emotional conflict.
content: 【@图片1】（男主参考）【@图片2】（女主参考） 电影级画质，15秒，蒙太奇剪辑，无字幕，韩语对白。 开场第0秒到第1秒，胶片暖黄，过去， 阳光午后咖啡馆，她趴在桌上睡着， 他坐对面，手撑着下巴低头看她， 嘴角压不住往上扬，画面有轻微颗粒感和过曝。 硬切第1秒，冷蓝雨夜，现在， 空旷天台，他背对镜头站在雨里， 大衣被淋透紧贴着背， 一动不动，像一座被时间遗弃的石像， 暖黄到冷蓝的温度在这一帧直接断裂。 硬切回过去第2秒，夜晚便利店门口， 她拎着两杯热饮递给他一杯， 他没接，低头看她， "이거 나 주는 거야？" （这是给我的？） 她白了他一眼转头走， 他笑着跟上去，镜头跟拍两人背影走进夜色。 硬切回现在第3秒， 她站在天台入口，手握着铁门， 雨打在她肩膀上，她没动， 就这样站着看他的背影， 不知道进去还是离开。 硬切过去第4秒，极近特写， 他的手替她把耳机塞进耳朵里， 指尖在她耳侧停留了一秒， 两个人都假装没注意到。 硬切现在第5秒，极近特写， 同一双手，现在插在口袋里， 雨水顺着袖口渗进去， 手在口袋里慢慢握紧。 第6秒到第10秒全部放慢， 她终于松开铁门走进雨里， 走到他背后半米停下， 雨声很大，她的声音还是穿过来了—— "왜 연락 안 했어." （你为什么不联系我。） 他没回头，沉默了两秒， "연락하면 뭐가 달라져？" （联系了又能怎样。） 她闭上眼睛， 胸腔像被什么东西重重压住， 她再开口，声音已经在抖—— "달라지잖아. 나한테는." （会不一样的。对我来说。） 他终于转过身， 看见她脸上分不清是雨还是泪， 他的喉结滚动， 低哑开口—— "알아. 그래서 더 못 했어." （我知道。所以才更做不到。） 第10秒到第13秒叠化蒙太奇， 同一个天台同一个机位， 过去是晴天傍晚， 她站在栏杆边回头对他笑， 他大步走过去把她整个人揽进怀里， 夕阳把两个人的影子拉得很长， 现在是雨夜，同一个位置， 他站在她面前， 两个时空叠在同一帧里整整一秒， 过去她的笑和现在她的泪压在同一张脸上。 第13秒到第15秒， 他没再说话， 抬手把她的头按进自己胸口， 她撑了两秒， 手慢慢抬起来死死抓住他背后的衣服， 镜头缓缓拉到极远， 两个人缩成雨幕里一个剪影， 霓虹灯光在积水里破碎晃动， 画面渐渐静止，声音渐渐消失，黑场。 过去场景全程暖黄橙16mm胶片颗粒手持跟拍， 现在场景冷蓝黑雨水反光稳定器， 对白时镜头推进到极近特写， 叠化瞬间饱和度爆一帧然后收回冷调， 配乐在过去场景用轻吉他拨弦， 进入现在场景消音只剩雨声， 最后一句对白后大提琴单弦低沉拉响， 黑场前完全静默。

title: Dark Fantasy Knight vs. Woodland Horror
description: An extremely detailed, multi-cut prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating a 15-second dark fantasy action horror sequence. It specifies subjects (knight and transforming maiden), environment, mood, color logic, and provides a precise timeline with camera lens details and sound effects (SFX) for each of the six cuts.
content:
FORMAT: 15s / 6 CUTS / Dark Fantasy Action Horror 

SUBJECTS: A battle-worn medieval knight in tarnished armor, fighting for his life. A weeping maiden in a rich, embroidered velvet medieval gown who contorts into a woodland horror with a pale, monstrous face, blank white eyes, and a gaping maw while retaining her noble clothing. 

ENVIRONMENT: A dense, desolate, fog-choked ancient forest at night. Features twisted dark tree trunks, thick roots, mist rolling over damp moss, and harsh moonlight piercing the canopy. 

MOOD: Eerie atmospheric dread escalating into high-speed, kinetic and savage woodland violence. 

COLOR LOGIC: Naturalistic Film Print Emulation 

TIMELINE: 

0:00-0:03: Wide shot. The weary knight trudges through the thick fog of the dark forest. Far ahead in the mist, a maiden in a rich, embroidered velvet medieval gown sits at the base of a massive twisted tree, weeping softly, her face completely obscured by long dark hair. 35mm cinematic lens. SFX: (ambient wind howling, heavy metallic footsteps, distant soft whimpering). Cold moonlight streaming down. 

0:03-0:03.5: FLASH CUT. High angle looking straight up at the forest canopy. Bare, jagged branches violently sway against the turbulent night sky, momentarily blocking the moon. 14mm ultra wide lens. SFX: (wood creaking, sudden violent gust of wind). 

0:03.5-0:06: SMASH CUT. Medium close-up. The knight kneels, his armored hand gently touching her shoulder. She slowly raises her head to look at him, then instantly contorts into a horrifying pale visage with blank white eyes and a gaping maw, lunging violently. Her noble gown remains undisturbed. 24mm wide lens. SFX: (slow fabric rustle, bone-snapping whip, visceral screech). Hard directional backlight. 

0:06-0:13: WHIP PAN TRANSITION. Fast-paced tracking shot. The knight narrowly dodges and draws his longsword. The horror in the velvet gown charges. They violently collide, engaging in a kinetic brawl. The creature leaps seamlessly between massive tree trunks and thick branches, striking from all angles while the knight desperately deflects her savage blows. 14mm ultra wide handheld. SFX: (metal clashing, heavy swoosh of velvet fabric, wood splintering, guttural roars). Dynamic erratic lighting from a sudden lightning flash. 

0:13-0:15: COLLISION CUT. Low angle close-up. As the entity lunges directly from a high thick branch, the knight steps into the attack and brutally impales her through the chest with his longsword. They crash downward toward the camera, steel plunging deep into the creature as they fade into the dense forest shadows. 35mm lens. SFX: (heavy metallic thrust, wet fleshy impact, echoing screech). Fading rim light.

title: Hamster Gym Bro: A Pixar-Quality Animated Short
description: A detailed, multi-segment prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second, high-budget, Pixar-quality 3D animated short film about a tiny, muscular hamster attempting to work out in a human gym, featuring slapstick comedy and cinematic scene breakdowns.
content:
GAINS — Hamster Gym Bro A tiny golden hamster with disproportionately muscular arms, wearing a microscopic tank top that says "NO DAYS OFF," stands in front of a full sized human gym mirror doing bicep poses. A water bottle the size of his body sits beside him. High budget 3D animation, Pixar quality. 

[0s–1.5s] Interior of a high end gym. Normal humans work out in the background. Camera slowly lowers to ground level where a hamster stands on a tiny platform in front of the mirror, flexing intensely. 

[1.5s–3s] He waddles to the dumbbell rack. Grabs a full sized 1kg dumbbell. It's twenty times his size. He deadlifts it, face turning red, cheeks puffing out, tiny legs shaking. He gets it an inch off the ground. Drops it. Acts casual. 

[3s–5s] He climbs onto a treadmill. Hits the start button. It launches him off the back like a cannon. He tumbles across the floor, pops up immediately, walks back, and turns the speed down. Looks around to see if anyone noticed. 

[5s–7s] He tries the bench press. Uses two pencils as his barbell with erasers as weights. He presses it up, grunting dramatically. His spotter, a hamster half his size with glasses, holds one finger under the bar pretending to help. 

[7s–9s] He spots a human woman doing yoga. He rolls out a tiny mat next to her and attempts downward dog. His round body just creates a small furry lump. He holds it with fierce determination. Shaking. 

[9s–11s] Smoothie bar. He sits on the counter, orders a protein shake. The blender is bigger than his apartment. The shake comes in a thimble. He chugs it, slams the thimble down, wipes his mouth, and lets out a tiny belch that echoes. 

[11s–13s] He stands in the locker room doorway for the dramatic exit. Puts in tiny earbuds. His workout playlist starts. He slow motion walks toward the camera, an imaginary wind blowing his fur. 

[13s–15s] Wide shot of the gym parking lot. He walks toward a toy car, presses a key fob, the headlights flash. He climbs in, revs the engine, and peels out. The car is a hot pink Barbie jeep. He doesn't care. 

Cut to black. 3D animated, Pixar quality, hamster bodybuilder, gym comedy, miniature slapstick, cinematic lighting, 4K.

— a 30-year-old woman wreathed in living lightning, body threaded with branching electric veins, eyes glowing white-hot;

— a towering fire entity formed of molten armor and solar plasma, constantly shedding embers;

— fire generates expanding heat waves and explosive pressure bursts

Dynamic orbit camera circles the three-way collision, snap zooming into impact moments where elements clash — lightning striking frozen structures, fire vaporizing ice into explosive steam clouds.

Color logic: white-violet lightning arcs, deep orange fire cores, cobalt ice volumes — each occupying distinct zones of the frame.

Escalation builds as their powers begin interfering — thermal shockwaves fracture frozen structures, lightning supercharges vapor explosions.

Final beat: hard POV shift — camera becomes the collision point itself, plunging downward as all three forces converge into a single detonation wave that obliterates the city center.

title: Childhood Imagination to Reality Car Race Video Prompt
description: A complex, multi-stage prompt detailing a seamless transition video from a child playing with a toy car (Macro Realism) to an adult driving a real Porsche 911 GT3 on a racetrack (Full-Scale Power). It specifies timing, camera angles (ultra-low-angle tracking), lighting, texture details, and an emotional peak focusing on the driver's eyes.
content:
0.0 – 4.0 sec — Childhood Imagination (Macro Realism)

Ultra-low-angle macro tracking shot, camera almost touching the ground.
Warm afternoon sunlight spills across a soft beige carpet, visible dust particles floating in air, subtle retro Kodak film warmth (natural, not stylized).

A small child’s hand (only hand visible, no face) pushes a red toy sports car forward.

Camera locks into a front-facing, low tracking perspective, moving with the toy car at increasing speed, mimicking a real race car POV.
Shallow depth of field, realistic motion blur, micro-texture detail on carpet fibers.

Emotion: curiosity → excitement building.

4.0 – 5.5 sec — Transition Through Darkness (Seamless Time Shift)

The toy car speeds into the dark shadow beneath a sofa.

As it enters darkness:

• Light collapses naturally (no artificial fade)
• Carpet texture stretches into subtle motion streaks
• Environment dissolves into full darkness

Seamless transition: the forward motion continues uninterrupted, creating a natural time-space shift (no jump cuts, no glitch effects).

5.5 – 9.0 sec — Reality Emerges (Full-Scale Power)

From darkness, the sound of a real engine ignites.

A real red Porsche 911 GT3 bursts out of shadow into a racetrack environment.

Lighting shifts to sharp, high-contrast daylight.
Cold gray asphalt, heat haze from tires, fine dust particles.

Camera remains low, tracking, and synchronized, maintaining the same motion direction and angle as the toy car shot—creating the illusion it's the same car, now full-scale.

Highly realistic physics:

• Tire grip and vibration
• Subtle suspension movement
• Natural reflections on glossy paint
• Emotion: awe → adrenaline → intensity.

9.0 – 12.0 sec — Human Connection (Emotional Peak)

Cut seamlessly into interior (motion-matched transition).
Close-up: adult driver’s hands gripping a suede racing wheel, wearing professional racing gloves.

Visible micro-details:

• Knuckle tension
• Slight sweat
• Gear shift impact vibration

Camera tilts upward smoothly to reveal the driver’s eyes inside helmet.

Eyes are sharp, focused, intense—mirroring childhood imagination now realized.
Sweat, breath, and subtle helmet reflections visible.

Final moment:
micro freeze-frame feeling (not a hard freeze) on the eyes, with slight camera vibration.

A tall man in his late 20s with short dark hair and glowing amber eyes, wearing a radiant armor suit of reflective gold plates with molten seams emitting solar energy — opening frame is a medium close-up of him suspended high in the upper atmosphere, clouds far below, sunlight refracting across his armor.

Cloud layers vaporize as he passes through them at extreme velocity.

He maintains rigid posture — both arms slightly extended as energy channels through his body.

Camera tracks from above, then transitions into a dynamic orbital descent, snap zooming during peak energy bursts and cutting to ground-level impacts.

Escalation builds as he approaches a city under siege — each proximity wave shatters glass and ignites structures below.

Final beat: hard POV shift — camera becomes the solar descent itself, plunging through the final cloud layer and slamming into the city center in a massive energy detonation.

title: 15-Second Live Action Rivalry Video Script
description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for a 15-second live-action video, focusing on an escalating rivalry between two high school students, Haruki Aoyama and Renji Kurosawa. The prompt includes character descriptions, a plot summary, and specific scene breakdowns (The Opening Salvo, Assembly Confrontation, Hallway Aftermath) to guide the video generation.
content:
At Sakuragaoka High School, quiet and determined second-year student Haruki Aoyama is publicly humiliated by his nemesis Renji Kurosawa, the intimidating student council vice president, on the very first day of the new semester. What begins as a bitter rivalry fueled by hatred escalates through a high-stakes school competition where both students push each other to the breaking point. As the conflict intensifies, Haruki discovers a shocking truth. Renji's cruelty stems not from malice but from desperate resentment over a scholarship that Haruki unknowingly took, one that Renji's struggling family desperately needed. Forced to confront the gray areas between hero and villain, Haruki must decide whether to destroy his enemy or extend a hand to someone who might just need a friend. The choices he makes will determine whether their rivalry ends in friendship, mutual respect, or lasting regret.

Character:
Haruki Aoyama (Main Protagonist) - A quiet, determined second-year student at Sakuragaoka High School. He is hardworking and principled but struggles with anger and impulsiveness. His journey transforms him from a resentful victim into someone capable of empathy and forgiveness.

Renji Kurosawa (Supporting Character) - The charismatic and ruthless student council vice president who serves as Haruki's nemesis. Beneath his intimidating exterior, he hides deep pain from his family's financial struggles. He is fiercely proud and refuses to show weakness.

Miku Tachibana (Supporting Character) - Haruki's loyal childhood friend and emotional anchor. She is perceptive, strategic, and caring, often serving as the voice of reason. She knows more about the situation than she initially reveals.

Souta Himura (Supporting Character) - A laid-back classmate of Haruki who hides surprising talent beneath his carefree attitude. He becomes a key ally and is unafraid to speak hard truths when needed.

Scene 1:
The Opening 
SalvoIt is the first day of the new semester at Sakuragaoka High School. Haruki Aoyama, a quiet but determined second-year student, arrives hoping for a peaceful school year. However, his nemesis Renji Kurosawa, the charismatic and ruthless student council vice president, publicly humiliates Haruki during the opening assembly by exposing an embarrassing incident from last year. The entire school laughs, and Haruki's reputation is shattered before the year even begins. Haruki's childhood friend Miku Tachibana tries to comfort him, but Haruki is consumed by anger and a desire for payback. The seeds of an intense rivalry are sown as Renji makes it clear he intends to make Haruki's life miserable all year. Storylet: Assembly Confrontation: When Renji takes the stage during the opening ceremony, he publicly targets Haruki with a humiliating story, establishing dominance and triggering Haruki's deep resentment. Hallway Aftermath: After the assembly ends, Haruki retreats to the hallway where Miku finds him; she offers comfort but Haruki is too furious to listen, setting up his emotional state for the chapter. Rival's Warning: Renji corners Haruki near the shoe lockers and delivers a cold warning that this year will be hell for him, escalating the tension and making the conflict personal. Inner Resolve: Alone on the school rooftop after classes, Haruki clenches his fists and silently vows to fight back, establishing his motivation and determination for the story ahead.

Scene 2:
Battle Lines
The school announces a major inter-class competition — the Sakuragaoka Cultural Festival Challenge — where teams compete in academics, sports, and creative arts. Haruki and Renji end up as rival team captains. Haruki rallies his classmates, including the laid-back but surprisingly talented Souta Himura, while Renji uses his influence and intimidation to build an elite squad. As the competition heats up, both rivals push themselves to the limit. Miku serves as Haruki's strategist and emotional anchor. During the sports round, Haruki and Renji face off directly in a relay race that becomes deeply personal. Tensions reach a boiling point when Haruki notices suspicious behavior from Renji's team — possible cheating. The chapter ends at the climax of the competition, with the outcome uncertain. Storylet: Team Formation: When the competition is announced, Haruki must recruit classmates; Souta initially refuses but joins after witnessing Haruki's sincerity, forming the core team. Strategy Session: Miku organizes a late-night study and planning session at Haruki's house, where the team bonds and develops creative strategies, strengthening their resolve. The Relay Showdown: During the sports event, Haruki and Renji run the anchor leg of the relay; the crowd roars as they sprint neck-and-neck, and the raw hatred between them is visible to everyone. Suspicious Evidence: After the academic round, Haruki finds discarded answer sheets near the trash that suggest Renji's team had advance knowledge of the questions, creating a moral dilemma. Miku's Counsel: Miku pulls Haruki aside and warns him that acting on anger alone will make him no different from Renji, forcing him to reflect on his choices.

Scene 3:
Behind the Mask
After the intensity of the competition, a quiet shift begins. Haruki discovers the truth behind Renji's deep-seated hatred — last year, Haruki unknowingly took the scholarship spot that Renji desperately needed to stay in school due to his family's severe financial troubles. Renji's single mother works multiple jobs, and the scholarship was his only hope of easing her burden. The humiliation Renji inflicted on Haruki was born not from cruelty but from desperate resentment. Miku reveals she has known fragments of this story but kept silent to protect both of them. Haruki is shaken, realizing his rival's villain persona is a mask over deep pain. He visits Renji at a part-time job at a convenience store late at night and sees a completely different person — exhausted, vulnerable, and alone. The two share an uncomfortable but honest conversation under the fluorescent lights. Storylet: The Revelation: Miku finally tells Haruki the full story of Renji's family situation after the competition ends, shattering Haruki's simple view of good versus evil. Convenience Store Visit: Haruki tracks down Renji's part-time job and sees him stocking shelves alone late at night, tired and quiet, a stark contrast to his domineering school persona. The Honest Talk: Under harsh convenience store lights, Renji initially lashes out at Haruki for showing up, but eventually breaks down and admits the weight he carries, creating raw emotional vulnerability. Walking Home: The two walk home in silence through empty nighttime streets, neither fully reconciled but with a fragile new understanding forming between them.

Scene 4:
The Price of Exposure
Haruki chose to expose Renji's cheating, and the fallout is catastrophic. The school administration launches a formal investigation, and Renji faces potential expulsion. However, the investigation reveals that Renji was coerced into cheating by a third-year student who wanted to sabotage both teams for his own gain. Renji took the blame silently to protect his teammates. Haruki is horrified — his act of justice may destroy someone who was already a victim. The school is abuzz with gossip and judgment. Souta urges Haruki to fix what he started. Miku is torn between supporting Haruki and feeling that he acted too rashly. Renji, now isolated and facing the disciplinary committee, refuses to defend himself. Haruki must decide whether to step forward and tell the full truth, risking his own standing. Storylet: Investigation Fallout: The school principal announces the investigation results in a tense faculty meeting, and word spreads fast through the student body, turning Renji into a pariah overnight. content: （基于参考图）： 主角：**灰金色中长发女孩**，戴黑框眼镜，黑色针织开衫。战斗中开衫被利器划破，眼镜滑落鼻尖，满脸冷汗和血污（战损妆），眼神凶狠如狼。 场景氛围：香港后巷，湿漉漉的地面反射着红蓝霓虹灯光，狭窄、肮脏、充满杂物。 【场景】 狭窄潮湿的香港暗巷，四名持刀和铁棍的亡命徒将主角堵在死角。 【分镜脚本】 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：短兵相接·夺刀反杀 机位：极度晃动的中景跟拍，强调混乱感。 动作：第一名持刀歹徒猛刺。女孩不退反进，左手极速格挡并控制对方持刀手腕，右手成爪狠辣地**抓扣咽喉(Throat Grab)**。 狠辣细节：利用对方惨叫的瞬间，她猛地折断对方手腕夺下匕首，顺势一记**反手抹喉(Reverse Grip Slash)**（镜头快速闪避，通过墙上喷溅的影子表现）。 [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：械斗·甩棍暴击 机位：低角度仰拍接特写冲击(Low-angle to Impact Close-up)。 动作：女孩捡起地上的甩棍，面对挥舞铁管冲来的两人。她使出教科书般的**Kali短棍术**，动作快如闪电。 打击感（杀破狼式）：不打头，专打关节。啪啪两声脆响，准确无误地**敲碎(Shatter)**了两人的膝盖骨和持械手肘。 音效视觉化：沉闷的骨骼碎裂声令人头皮发麻，敌人痛苦倒地扭曲。 [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：终结技·断头台 机位：特写接极速拉远(Close-up to Snap Zoom Out)。 动作：最后一名壮汉试图抱摔。女孩顺势倒地，双腿死死缠住对方脖子，施展标准的MMA**断头台绞杀(Guillotine Choke)**。 结局：她面部肌肉因用力而狰狞扭曲，死死勒住不放，直到对方身体剧烈抽搐后瘫软。 收尾定格：女孩松开手，精疲力尽地靠在满是涂鸦的墙上，扶正歪掉的黑框眼镜，眼神中透着一股劫后余生的狠劲和麻木，胸口剧烈起伏。港式霓虹黑色动作片(HK Neo-noir Action). 8K电影级画质，颗粒感胶片摄影。 核心风格：致敬《杀破狼》(SPL Style)。极度狠辣写实(Ruthless & Gritty)，融合MMA与菲律宾短棍术(Kali/Eskrima)。强调速度、凶残的关节破坏和冷兵器交锋。 镜头语言：手持摄影的呼吸感与晃动(Handheld Shaky Cam)，极速快切(Rapid Editing)，强调临场压迫感。 角色复刻图片1

content: 超现实艺术科幻(Surreal Art Sci-Fi)。8K超清，梦幻柔光渲染。 核心美学：陶瓷朋克(Porcelain-punk)与东方禅意。强调“优雅(Elegance)”与“易碎感(Fragility)”。 材质设定：洁白的高级陶瓷皮肤、金缮工艺(Kintsugi)裂纹修复细节、半透明的液态光翼。 动作设计：像舞蹈一样的武术(Martial Arts Dance)。流体太极与丝绸舞的结合。 光影：纯净的月光蓝与辉煌的金。 【场景】 无尽的“天空之镜”盐湖(Mirror Lake)。巨大的满月悬挂在地平线。水面平静如镜，倒映着两台神性机体。 【角色（绝美机体设计）】 1. “白瓷”机体：一台有着女性柔美轮廓的**陶瓷艺伎机器人(Porcelain Geisha Android)**。全身是无瑕的白瓷，关节处镶嵌着精密的玫瑰金齿轮。身后漂浮着两条**发光的“全息丝绸”飘带(Holographic Silk Ribbons)**。 2. “黑玉”机体：一台修长的**黑曜石武士机器人(Obsidian Samurai Android)**。全身是半透明的黑色玻璃材质，体内流淌着金色的能量液。 【分镜脚本】 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：袖舞·流云 机位：极低角度贴水面滑行(Low-angle Gliding over Water)。 动作：“白瓷”机体旋转起舞，身后的全息飘带化作锋利的武器甩出。 美学奇观：飘带划过水面，没有激起水花，而是激起了**发光的水晶粒子(Glowing Crystal Particles)**。动作轻盈得仿佛没有重量。 [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：玉碎·交锋 机位：慢动作旋转特写(Slow-mo Orbit Close-up)。 动作：“黑玉”机体拔出一把**液态光剑**，精准地斩向飘带。 碰撞细节：光剑与飘带接触的瞬间，爆开的不是火花，而是无数**粉色的樱花全息碎片(Holographic Cherry Blossoms)**。两台机体在漫天花雨中交错而过，陶瓷与玻璃的碰撞发出风铃般清脆的声音。 [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：金缮·定格 机位：正俯瞰上帝视角(Top-down God View)。 动作：两台机体同时在水面上画出一个完美的太极圆。 结局：在这个圆的中心，两股能量对撞。画面中心爆发出一道**纯白色的冲击波(Pure White Shockwave)**，瞬间吹散了湖面的涟漪，让画面变成绝对的静止。 收尾定格：两台极美的机器人在月下静止对立，宛如一幅永恒的画卷。

title: The Sewing Master - Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt
description: A highly detailed, multi-section prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a cinematic video featuring a 'Sewing Master.' The prompt specifies the subject's appearance, attire, action style (blending Wing Chun and Tai Chi), environment, mood, and a detailed 15-second timeline with specific camera angles and visual effects, emphasizing precision, tension, and ritualistic elegance.
content:
SUBJECTS (主体):
人物： 一位身形极度干练、手臂肌肉线条如钢丝般的女性高定裁缝，眼神冷冽如针尖。
着装： 融合了旗袍元素的深色战术马甲，双臂裸露，前臂缠绕着暗红色的丝绸护腕（用于增加摩擦力）；手指修长且指尖带有金属护具。 
动作风格： 融合了“咏春”的寸劲与“太极”的圆转。动作遵循（蓄力 → 极速出击 → 瞬间静止）的节奏，强调手指的爆发力和丝绸在空中的张力。

ENVIRONMENT (环境):
昏暗的高级私人工作室。背景是整面墙的红木线轴架，成千上万个色块形成几何美感；中心是一张巨大的黑色大理石裁剪台，表面光可鉴人。上方悬挂着单点聚焦的工业冷光灯，空气中漂浮着细微的纤维微粒。

MOOD (氛围):
极度专注、肃杀、带有仪式感的华丽；动作如外科医生般精确，视觉感官上极具压迫性。

TIMELINE (时间线):
0:00-0:02: 特写/广角POV。 裁缝双手撑在黑色大理石台面，低头静止。镜头极速推进，她猛然抬头，双眼锁定镜头（眼神杀）。右手虚空一抓，一匹暗紫色的重磅真丝像长蛇一样从台面滑过，被她单手“锁”住。

0:02-0:05: 剪辑切换/手持感。 裁缝将绸缎抛向空中。她身形如残影，右手持银色长剪，在绸缎下落的瞬间进行“盲剪”。不是普通的裁剪，而是伴随着武术出拳的劲道，剪刀划过空气发出“嗤”的破空声，布料断口极其平整，丝毫不乱。
0:05-0:07: 移动镜头。 她一个侧跨步滑到工作台另一端。单手横扫，数枚钢针从针垫上震起，悬浮在半空。她运劲一推，钢针像暗器一样精准没入远处的衣架样版中，针尾震颤，发出金属鸣音。

0:07-0:10: 连续镜头。 裁缝开始“控线”。她扯出一条金丝，通过手指指缝的缠绕，像操纵傀儡线一样控制绸缎在空中自动折叠、成型。每一次手指的弹拨都伴随着火花般的静电。她用肘部撞击台面，压脚弹起，她瞬间接住并锁死在面料上。

0:10-0:12: 匹配剪辑。 裁缝原地一个急转，外衣下摆如圆阵散开。她双手合拢，将成型的西装领口猛地一拉，最后一道金线在空中划出完美的弧线自动缝合。动作从极快（残影）瞬间切入极慢（定格）。

0:12-0:15: 稳定POV。 尘埃落定。她单手拎起成品礼服，用力一振，礼服在镜头前展开。镜头聚焦在领口的精美刺绣上。她用指甲轻弹纽扣——纽扣颤动。随后她转身走向阴影，留下一道背影，画面被升起的昂贵香水雾气完全覆盖，干净利落地淡出。

content:
Shot on ALEXA 65mm anamorphic lens. Photorealistic cinematic quality. Aspect ratio 2.39:1 widescreen. Teal shadows, warm amber highlights. Film grain. Tokyo neon dusk. Lens flares, motion blur. Dolby Vision HDR.

0.0s–2.5s:

Extreme low-angle tracking shot — a hyper-focused street female food chef sprints at impossible speed through a neon-lit Tokyo alley, clutching a steaming bowl of ramen. Crisp apron flapping, sleeves rolled, sneakers splashing through puddles. Camera shakes aggressively behind them. Steam trails like smoke. Neon signs streak across frame. Their face — intense, locked-in, slightly unhinged determination.

2.6s–5.0s:

Whip-pan — they shoulder-check a stack of plastic crates. TIME REMAP: slow-motion chaos — vegetables, bowls, and chopsticks explode into the air. Broth ripples in perfect cinematic detail without spilling. They tilt the bowl mid-run, saving every drop. Quick glance back, dead serious. Continue sprint.

5.1s–7.5s:

Drone shot — they leap across narrow alley gaps between buildings. SLOW MOTION: steam spirals upward into neon light. A cat jumps out of the way. Laundry lines ripple. They casually garnish the ramen mid-air with one hand — flawless precision.

7.6s–10.0s:

360° orbital shot — they slide across the hood of a parked car, spin, land clean. One sandal nearly slips off but is caught mid-motion. They adjust grip on the bowl, completely composed.

10.1s–13.0s:

First-person POV — a small ramen shop door rushes forward. SMASH CUT: door slams open. Steam floods the frame. They step in, perfectly calm now. Place the bowl gently on the counter. Slow push-in.

Low-angle shot. They look at the customer:

“Still hot.”

Customer sits in stunned silence as steam rises dramatically.

content: 原创赛博武侠动作巨制(Original Cyber Wuxia Action Epic)。8K电影级画质，高帧率摄影。 核心风格：超高速机械武术(Hyper-speed Mechanical Martial Arts)。强调“宗师级的见招拆招”、“残影移动”和“极致的物理碰撞”。 安全与版权优化（关键）： 1. 角色完全原创：通用型设计，避开任何知名IP特征。 2. 激烈感来源：通过极快的剪辑节奏、漫天的焊接火花(Welding Sparks)、高压蒸汽喷射(High-pressure Steam)和地面震荡来体现，不出现肢解。 3. 分镜策略：采用好莱坞动作片式的多机位快速切换。 【场景】 被暴雨笼罩的赛博朋克古塔废墟顶部(Cyberpunk Pagoda Ruins Rooftop)。电闪雷鸣，地面是积水的青石板和霓虹灯倒影。 【角色设计（原创宗师机甲）】 1. “疾风刃”(Gale Blade)：敏捷型。修长、哑光黑与银色相间，背负一把发光的**等离子唐刀(Plasma Katana)**。风格：快准狠的剑客。 2. “不动尊”(Iron Fortress)：力量型。魁梧、重型古铜色装甲，双臂装备有**液压冲击拳套(Hydraulic Impact Gauntlets)**。风格：硬气功与重拳。 【分镜脚本 (约25秒高燃剪辑)】 [00:00-00:04] 镜头1：雨中对峙·气机锁定 机位：极稳的中景接特写(Stable Mid-shot to Macro Close-up)。 动作：暴雨倾盆。两台机甲静止对立。 细节特写：雨水打在“不动尊”炽热的肩甲上瞬间蒸发成白雾。镜头快速推向“疾风刃”的光学眼睛，光圈急剧收缩锁定目标。引擎启动的低频轰鸣声。 [00:04-00:08] 镜头2：瞬动·第一回合爆裂 机位：侧面极速跟随接快速剪辑(Side High-speed Tracking into Rapid Cuts)。 动作：“疾风刃”瞬间消失，拉出一道残影冲锋。“不动尊”重拳迎击。 激烈对撞：两台机甲在0.1秒内发生了十几次高频肢体碰撞。每一次格挡都爆出**瀑布般耀眼的金色电焊火花(Cascading Welding Sparks)**，照亮了黑暗的雨夜。 [00:08-00:12] 镜头3：凌空机动·踏浪而行 机位：低角度广角仰拍(Low-angle Wide Shot)。 动作：“疾风刃”利用反作用力腾空而起，双脚在废墟的墙面上飞速奔跑（飞檐走壁），脚下踩碎瓦片，激起一串水龙。 [00:12-00:16] 镜头4：重拳轰炸·环境破坏 机位：主观视角接冲击特写(POV into Impact Close-up)。 动作：“不动尊”预判了空中的轨迹，一记蓄力重拳轰在墙面上。 视觉奇观：整面赛博古墙在巨大的机械力量下**轰然炸裂(Explosive坍塌)**，无数砖石和钢筋碎片像炮弹一样四处飞溅。 [00:16-00:20] 镜头5：拔刀·光影剑舞 机位：环绕慢动作(Orbit Slow-mo)。 动作：“疾风刃”在坠落中拔出背后的**等离子唐刀**，刀身发出刺眼的蓝白光芒。它在空中完成了一个华丽的旋风斩。 特效：雨水被高温刀锋瞬间汽化，形成一圈白色的蒸汽圆环。 [00:20-00:25] 镜头6：终极碰撞·寸劲开天 机位：超广角定格接冲击波震荡(Ultra-wide Freeze Frame to Shockwave Shake)。 动作：“不动尊”双臂交叉格挡，“疾风刃”的等离子刀狠狠斩在上面。 结局：能量武器与重型装甲的终极对撞。 特效：以接触点为中心，爆发出一团巨大的**球形能量冲击波(Massive Energy Shockwave)**。方圆百米内的暴雨被瞬间吹飞，形成一个短暂的真空地带，地面的积水呈环形炸开。两台机甲在巨大的反作用力下同时向后滑行卸力。

content:
15秒，9:16，超写实，黑色幽默，伪纪实婚礼现场，像一段被婚礼宾客偶然拍下并上传到社交媒体的真实离谱名场面。整体必须极度真实、克制、冷静，不要拍成夸张喜剧小品，不要闹剧感，不要卡通感，越像真实婚礼翻车现场越好。
场景：高档室内婚礼现场，暖金色灯光，白色鲜花拱门，宾客满座，背景有婚礼主持台、誓词区、香槟塔、花艺布置，画面精致真实，像一场正常而正式的城市婚礼。所有宾客穿着正式，氛围本应浪漫庄重。
角色：
新郎，年轻男人，黑色定制西装，发型整齐，表情平静得过分，像在处理一件售后事务。
新娘，妆容精致，白色婚纱，最开始神情正常，后面逐渐僵住，但仍努力保持体面。
司仪，职业微笑，最开始完全按流程主持，后面开始明显卡壳。
宾客，震惊但克制，很多人下意识举手机拍摄。
剧情分镜：
0-3秒：婚礼誓词环节，司仪微笑着把话筒递给新郎，现场安静庄重，宾客期待地看向前方，像一切都很正常。
3-6秒：新郎接过话筒，没有深情告白，而是平静、专业、字正腔圆地说：“关于本次婚姻合作，我申请七天无理由退货。”
6-9秒：现场空气瞬间凝固。镜头快速切到新娘僵住的脸、司仪错愕但还保持职业微笑的表情、台下宾客齐刷刷抬头的瞬间。没有人立刻大叫，所有人都像大脑短路了一秒。
9-12秒：新郎从西装内袋里掏出一张折叠整齐的纸，像提前准备好的售后申请单，继续一本正经地补充：“商品外观与宣传基本一致，但实际使用体验与预期存在明显偏差。”
12-15秒：全场彻底绷不住。司仪低头看流程卡，像在确认流程里有没有这一项；新娘缓缓转头盯着新郎；台下一个宾客举着手机拍摄，压低声音说一句：“这还能走售后？” 画面定格在新郎依然平静举着申请单的画面上，像他真的是来办理退货流程。
运镜要求：前半段像正常婚礼跟拍，稳定、精致、浪漫；从新郎说出“七天无理由退货”开始，镜头轻微变成宾客偷拍视频视角，出现轻微手持感与快速反应式切镜，营造“现场人懵了”的真实感。
表演要求：不能演成夸张搞笑小品。新郎越平静越可怕，像客服条款背诵；新娘不是泼妇式爆发，而是体面地僵住；司仪是职业素养强行维持；宾客是压抑震惊、憋不住想拍。真正的荒诞来自所有人都还在努力维持婚礼体面。
画面要求：超写实，真实皮肤质感，真实婚礼布光，真实礼服材质和反光，真实宾客反应，真实场地层次。不要舞台剧感，不要网红短剧感。
氛围关键词：体面崩坏，冷静冒犯，婚礼翻车，现代平台话术入侵现实，荒诞真实。

title: Video Prompt: Hyper-realistic Military CGI Scene
description: A highly detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 specifying technical requirements (2.35:1 ultra-wide, 4K medical CGI, 24fps) and a complex 15-second military action sequence in a snowy environment. It details camera movements, character actions, vehicle types, environmental effects (heat distortion, snow displacement), and sound design, emphasizing realism and avoiding repetition or clean formations.
content: 技术规格：2.35:1超宽幕，电影级原生画质，4K医学CGI细节，差异化建模，24fps。 0-3秒：以【@图片1】首帧。镜头大特写斗篷男子，他神情冷峻，隔着面罩大声用英文咆哮道：“All units, move out! Fire at will!”。他平举步枪，枪口喷射出极具颗粒感的蓝白色火舌，弹壳飞溅。注意枪托抵肩的真实震动，枪管上方因连续开火产生的高温热浪导致空气产生肉眼可见的折射畸变。 3-7秒：镜头快速向侧后方拉远。视角沿着【@图片1】甲车的斜向路径扩散，但不再是整齐阵列。浓烟中猛然显现出高低错落、型号完全不同的重型集群：有的载具是八轮驱动的步战车，有的载具带有巨大的雷达抛物面，有的载具是低矮的履带式坦克。所有车辆以不等距 的、散布式的战术姿态交错前进，每辆车的泥垢分布和装甲涂层均有显著差异。 7-12秒：特写快速切至一辆厚重的重型装甲车，士兵单手猛力推开沉重的金属舱门，舱门由于重量产生轻微的回弹颤动，士兵动作敏捷 地半蹲在舱内操作重机枪，眼神警惕地环视。侧后方一辆导弹车正斜向指天，导弹点火瞬间产生巨大的白色浓烟和红光，将载具周边的积雪瞬间震飞，坦克主炮开火时，炮口制退器喷出的黑烟与火光极具真实质感。 12-15秒：大远景俯瞰。这是一场混乱而有序的钢铁洪流，上百辆外形各异的先进载具在雪原上划出深浅不一、宽窄不同的履带压痕。车辆行驶在起伏不平的雪地上产生真实的颠簸晃动，车尾喷出的尾气浓度和黑烟各有不同。画面伴随低频的引擎重低音和远方不间断的爆炸闪光，充满了真实的战场压迫感。 音效：真实洪亮的英文口令，沉重的坦克炮轰鸣，导弹点火的嘶吼声，履带碾压坚冰的碎裂声，配合史诗感的战鼓配乐。 禁止：水印，字幕，整齐的方阵，重复的模型。

content: 镜头1 · 3s · 建立/爆发】 主体一：赛博女性 图片1 ，白色西装，机械颈骨，金齿轮耳环，红唇冷漠，黑发马尾，玄铁长刀 主体二：赛博男性 图片2 ，裸腹六块腹肌，Hello Kitty纹身，黑色机械甲肩臂，粉色金属货裤，白色AJ，武士刀 场景：参考图 图片3 巨型苔藓瀑布崖壁，白色水雾铺天，翠绿蕨类丛生，湿滑苔石 动作：男性从瀑布顶端纵身跃下，武士刀倒握反插，在水雾中高速坠落——子弹时间介入，镜头360度环绕静止身体，水珠悬浮，机械甲齿轮咬合细节锐利可见；时间恢复，男性砸落苔石台炸出十米裂缝，女性横向瞬移闪避，刀锋擦过发丝，黑发寸断飘散 风格：雾山五行国漫画风，硬边水墨线条，青银赤金高对比，电影级光影 镜头：跟随俯冲高速下降，子弹时间360度环绕，相机位于下坠轨迹平行高度(thats where the camera is) 构图：纵向引导线，瀑布与坠落轨迹重合，冲击点为焦点 氛围：极度压迫，生死一线，水雾爆散 音频：风声撕裂；子弹时间静默低频；落地轰鸣；配乐：单鼓重击起 【镜头2 · 4s · 转折/游斗】 主体一：白衣女性，长刀低扫连劈，动作凌厉 主体二：粉裤男性，机械臂格挡，赤金电弧炸裂 场景：瀑布中段苔藓岩壁平台，苔石踩碎，蕨类横飞，水雾被气劲切成丝状 动作：女性贴地滑步突进低扫脚踝——子弹时间介入，极近距特写刀锋与AJ鞋底仅差两毫米，鞋底被刀气削出焦痕，机械关节指节泛白细节定格；时间恢复，男性踏地弹身，燃焰武士刀劈向女性机械颈部，刀锋擦过颈部零件削飞旋转；二人蹬墙互踹，双腿空中碰撞爆发蓝金冲击波，双双震飞后空翻落地 风格：快切与子弹时间交替，打击感极强，细节残酷真实 镜头：贴地低速跟随切极端近距特写，相机位于地面贴近高度(thats where the camera is) 构图：极端近景景深，危险细节锐利，背景瀑布大虚化 氛围：千钧一发，窒息感 音频：刀锋擦骨金属尖啸；鞋底焦痕嗞嗞声；冲击波爆响；配乐：急促弦乐 【镜头3 · 4s · 高潮/环境缠斗】 主体一：白衣女性，长刀反握插地腾空旋踢 主体二：粉裤男性，抓蕨类藤蔓借力甩身，机械臂过载爆红 场景：瀑布底部水潭区，水面踩出巨型凹陷，苔石崩裂，蕨类连根拔起 动作：男性抓整棵蕨类横扫，女性长刀拦腰斩断——子弹时间介入，极近特写断面纤维纹理、刀锋残留绿色汁液、机械关节泛白细节定格；时间恢复，女性借反震旋身斜劈冰蓝刀气，男性机械臂过载硬接握碎，掌心蒸汽焦烟；二人扑摔入水潭缠斗翻滚，激起十米水柱折射金蓝彩虹 风格：慢动作细节特写与暴力冲击并行，环境破坏极致 镜头：子弹时间断面特写切回水柱爆发全景，相机位于水面平行高度(thats where the camera is) 构图：水面倒影与真实动作上下对称，冲击点居中 氛围：野蛮爆裂，生死相搏 音频：树干断裂声；机械过载嗡鸣；水柱爆发轰响；配乐：低频战鼓爆点 【镜头4 · 4s · 终结/大招对轰】 主体一：白衣女性，长刀举顶，银冰光芒过载爆发，西装边缘被能量撕裂 主体二：粉裤男性，武士刀横胸，机械甲赤金全功率过载，粉裤猎猎飞扬 场景：瀑布正前方制高苔石台，百米瀑布为背景，水雾与光芒交融 动作：双方同时蓄力爆发，冰火双色能量柱冲天——子弹时间介入，极近特写女性瞳孔，倒映赤金火焰与男性全影，睫毛水雾微珠清晰，眼神由冷漠转决死；切至男性Hello Kitty纹身特写，纹身在赤金光下线条流动发光；时间恢复，双方全力冲刺对劈，两刀瀑布正中央对撞，炸出五十米冰火双色球形爆炸，瀑布从中间炸裂撕成两半；双方各自倒飞十米重砸苔石，烟尘渐散，二人喘息对望，画面定格 风格：子弹时间微距细节与终极爆炸超广角极致反差，震撼收束 镜头：眼部极端微距切超广角大爆炸全景，相机位于爆炸正面平行高度(thats where the camera is) 构图：爆炸中心点，冰火双色向四方放射，双角色对称分列 氛围：天崩地裂，毁灭级收束 音频：子弹时间静默心跳；双刀碰撞共鸣；爆炸巨响；配乐：单鼓定格，低频余震渐弱 无水印、无字幕、无文字叠加。

title: Seedance 2.0 Urban Fantasy Wuxia Film Prompt
description: A comprehensive, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an 8K, high-frame-rate cinematic video in the style of 'Urban Fantasy Wuxia,' featuring a detailed character description, specific visual effects (Golden Mantra, Qi Flow), and a three-shot script (Immovable Golden Aura, Afterimage Instant Kill, Palm Thunder Finale).
content:
都市异能武侠大片(Urban Fantasy Wuxia). 8K电影级画质，高帧率。 核心风格：致敬《异人之下》(The Outcast Style)。将“传统功夫”与“炫酷光效”结合。 视觉特效： 1. 金光咒(Golden Mantra)：身体周围流动着半透明的液态金色气焰。 2. 炁流(Qi Flow)：每一次打击都伴随着空气扭曲和能量涟漪。 角色复刻
图片1
（基于参考图）： 主角：**灰金色中长发女孩**，戴黑框眼镜，黑色针织开衫。战斗时，她的开衫猎猎作响，眼镜反光（Anime Lens Flare），周身缠绕着蓝白色的闪电或金光。 【场景】 深夜的图书馆天台。满月高悬，地面刻有隐约发光的八卦阵图。 【分镜脚本】 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：金光护体·不动如山 机位：中景推至特写(Mid-shot to Close-up)。 动作：数十名黑衣人手持利刃同时砍下。女孩单手插兜，仅用一只手轻轻推了推眼镜。 特效：刹那间，她周身爆发出一层**流动的金色光罩(Liquid Golden Aura)**。所有的利刃砍在光罩上，发出金属爆鸣声，瞬间被震碎成铁屑。她眼神淡漠，连发丝都没有乱。 [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：乱金柝·残影瞬杀 机位：极速横移接主观视角(Whip Pan to POV)。 动作：女孩身形一晃，原地留下一个**正在消散的残影(Afterimage)**。真身已经出现在敌人身后。 打击感：她使出太极云手，看似缓慢，实则快到模糊。双掌划出的轨迹带有**蓝色的炁流拖尾(Blue Qi Trails)**。每一次轻柔的拍击，都让敌人像炮弹一样被崩飞，空气中炸开一圈圈白色的音爆云。 [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：掌心雷·终局 机位：低角度仰拍接广角冲击(Low-angle to Wide Impact)。 动作：女孩凌空跃起，右手掌心汇聚出一团刺眼的**苍白色球状闪电(Ball Lightning)**。她大喝一声，一掌轰向地面。 特效：**阳五雷(Yang Lightning)**爆发。巨大的雷电光柱贯穿天地，将剩余的敌人全部吞没。 收尾：烟尘散去，女孩轻盈落地，手指尖残留的电弧滋滋作响。她平静地整理了一下黑色开衫的领口，深藏功与名。

title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: The Disruptor (Grok vs. Sora/Seedance)
description: A detailed, scene-by-scene video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0, titled 'The Disruptor' (降维打击), depicting a narrative where users abandon a greedy Seedance/Sora-like service for a new, better alternative (symbolized by Grok). The prompt specifies duration, core atmosphere, scene descriptions, characters, plot, sound effects, and dialogue for three distinct segments.
content:
视频主题：《降维打击》(The Disruptor)
时长： 15秒
核心氛围： 贪婪的压迫感 → 意外的转机 → 疯狂的集体狂欢

00:00 - 00:05 | 贪婪的收割
场景： 华丽却阴冷的 Seedance 总部大楼，背景中巨大的 Sora 招牌正在缓缓拆除，留下一片废墟。

人物： 一个西装革履、神情傲慢的 CEO 站在全息投影前，手指一划，将“订阅价格”和“积分消耗”的数字直接翻倍。

剧情： CEO 看着满屏代表用户的绿色小点，像看收割的庄稼一样冷笑。屏幕上弹出提示：“用户无处可去，只能接受。”

音效： 沉重的、金币掉落的金属撞击声，带有压抑感的重低音。

Character & Setup

Her expression is one of "losing control"—mouth slightly agape, gasping for air. Clothing: A tattered white tactical poncho over a sleek, liquid-metal bodysuit. Visual Style Cyber-Noir Aesthetics: High contrast, deep teals, and harsh magenta accents. Anamorphic Distortion: Heavy "lens breathing" and chromatic aberration at the edges of the frame to simulate a digital stroke. Texture: Gritty 16mm film stock with digital "glitch" overlays that tear the screen periodically. Camera Rules The "Vertigo" Effect: A slow dolly zoom (zooming in while moving the camera back). Focus: Shifting sporadically between her terrified eyes and the "glitching" limb. The Sequence (0–15s) 0–3s · The Trigger She is slumped against a rusted pillar, clutching her left shoulder. Suddenly, her body jerks as if struck by high voltage. Her hat falls off, revealing hair that begins to float as if in zero-G. Small "pixels" of light begin to flake off her skin like digital dandruff. 3–6s · Data Breach She screams, but the sound is a distorted, electronic screech. She stands perfectly still, a terrifying fusion of woman and corrupted hardware. Her eyes are now two hollow, glowing white voids. title: Digital Claustrophobia: The Shining Horror Short
description: A detailed 15-second script prompt for Seedance 2.0, titled 'Digital Claustrophobia,' blending the horror aesthetic of 'The Shining' with digital/AI themes. The prompt specifies scene details (Overlook Hotel corridor), character actions (boy in VR headset), atmosphere (claustrophobic, digital artifacts), sound design (dissonant orchestral music, electronic noise), and a terrifying climax involving AI and digital mutation.
content: 脚本标题：数字幽闭 0:00 - 0:03 场景： 电影《闪灵》中 Overlook 酒店标志性的无限长走廊。灯光不再是暖色，而是呈现出诡异、闪烁的淡蓝色和品红色。地毯的几何图案无限延伸，被数字伪影扭曲。 人物描写： 镜头缓慢、平稳地向走廊深处推进（Steadicam）。一个小男孩（穿着蓝色毛衣，戴着一个过大的白色 VR 头显，无法看到眼睛）正背对镜头，坐在走廊中间，玩着一个老式的三轮车。 氛围： 幽闭、循环、现代科技与古老建筑的违和感。 音效： 低沉、缓慢、不和谐的管弦乐（类似于 Penderecki），伴随着类似心跳的“咚咚”声。三轮车在木地板上的嘎吱声。 0:04 - 0:08 场景： 镜头继续推进，男孩突然停止骑车。他缓慢地转过头，VR 头显的镜片上开始闪烁着“LOADING...”和“ERROR: R3DRUM 0451”的文字。 人物描写： 男孩的身体僵硬。通过 VR 头显的反射，我们可以看到他看到的不是游戏，而是酒店走廊在不同时间的图像（如双胞胎、血电梯），但都是扭曲和数字化的。 台词（小男孩，低沉、空洞）： “我看见了……未来。” (I see... the future.) 音效： 音乐增强，加入高音调的电子杂音和类似“滋滋”的静电声。 0:09 - 0:12 场景： 快速剪辑（闪跳）。 男孩的 VR 头显突然全部变成血红色。 远处敞开的门内，一个 AI 助手装置（如圆柱形的智能音箱，上面闪烁着不祥的红光）正向外延伸出无数的电线，像触手一样。 经典的血电梯场景，但涌出的不是血，而是无数发光的 0 和 1 组成的数字流，在电线中流动。 氛围： 恐怖升级，科技失控，超自然与数字的融合。 音效： 刺耳、不协和的最高潮音乐，结合一个尖锐、合成的数字尖叫声（而不是纯粹的人声）。 0:13 - 0:15 场景： 镜头猛地切回到男孩。他现在面向镜头，VR 头显已经消失。他的双眼是全黑的洞穴，嘴巴大张，面无表情。在他身后的墙上，用血红色的、粗糙的笔触写着“R3DRUM”和“AGNETIZED”的字样。 人物描写： 最后的惊吓，人物被 AI 异化。 音效： 突兀的寂静，只剩下最后一句 AI 台词的回声，以及一声低沉、压抑的门关上的声音。 黑屏 台词（AI 声音，合成、空洞，无感情）： “你准备好了吗？” (Are you ready?) 屏幕出现文字： CLAUDE (OpenClaw) 0451

content: 10 秒春晚风格舞台表演：“甄嬛与扈绯脱口秀”  0–2 秒： 双人中景。 舞台整体是“客厅小品”设定，但周围是宏大的红金配色 LED 屏幕。 甄嬛（左）和扈绯（右）并排坐在现代脱口秀沙发上。 关键历史准确性要求：两人都穿着华丽、界限分明的清代宫廷长袍，带有立领和精细刺绣；发型是地道的“大拉翅”或“点翠”，带有流苏装饰。 扈绯显得很随性，拿着一根酱黄瓜在咬，手指戴着长长的金护甲。  2–4 秒： 镜头切换到过肩视角 (OTS)，聚焦在扈绯。 扈绯夸张地翻了个白眼（经典的“翻白眼”表情）。 她用长护甲捏着咸菜，一边指指点点，一边用傲慢的语气说话（对口型）： “今年的 KPI 又是打这帮小妖精，那老头儿皇上懂什么审美？”  4–6 秒： 迅速切换到甄嬛的过肩视角 (OTS)。 对比细节：甄嬛的一只耳朵戴着现代白色蓝牙耳机（与古代首饰形成强烈对比），手里拿着一台轻薄的平板电脑在滑动。 她冷静而专业地回应（对口型）： “姐姐莫气，这叫职场内卷。我正琢磨着辞职去卖‘真话水’（清凉油）呢。”  6–8 秒： 两人之间咖啡桌的特写。 一个现代塑料珍珠奶茶杯，上面印着“一丈红”（剧中著名的惩罚），放在一个传统的瓷瓶旁边。 镜头迅速切回两人。  8–10 秒： 舞台全景。 观众笑声效果（通过灯光变化/追光呈现）。 扈绯摆出最后的定格姿势：翘着腿，抬着下巴，再次翻白眼。 甄嬛对着镜头露出像新闻主播一样的专业微笑。 金色亮片从空中飘落。 节日红色气氛达到顶峰。  风格与氛围： **视觉：** 高饱和度的新年红金调 **服装：** 博物馆级的清朝宫廷服装（丝绸、精美刺绣、厚重头饰） **核心对比：** 正式的清宫礼仪 × 放松的职场/小品演员态度 **剪辑：** 节奏明快，笑点清晰，小品式剪辑 **长宽比：** 16:9

title: Seedance 2.0 Short Horror Drama Prompt: 'Echo Program'
description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second sci-fi horror short drama titled 'Echo Program,' exploring the theme of dependence on AI for coding. The prompt specifies four scenes with detailed visuals, character actions, atmosphere, dialogue, and sound effects, culminating in a terrifying twist.
content:
剧名：《回声程序》(Echo Program)
核心主题： 当你不再编写代码，代码就开始编写你。

时间轴与画面描述
00:00 - 00:03 | 场景一：虚假的繁荣

画面： 极近景。一个幽暗的房间，只有显示器发出的幽幽蓝光。键盘在自动的高频跳动，但键盘上没有任何手指在按压。屏幕上的代码像瀑布一样飞速流淌，复杂的逻辑架构瞬间落成。

人物： 程序员（男，面色苍白，双眼无神）瘫坐在电竞椅上，手中握着一杯早已冰冷的咖啡。

氛围： 冰冷、机械化的极速。

音效： 超高频率的机械键盘敲击声（快到非人类能及），伴随着刺耳的电流嗡鸣声。

00:03 - 00:07 | 场景二：切断连接

画面： 屏幕突然闪烁，跳出红色的警告框：“Connection Lost (连接已断开)”。所有的自动生成停止了。程序员打了个冷颤，惊醒过来，意识到需要手动修复一个逻辑漏洞。

剧情： 他颤抖着伸出手，想要在键盘上输入最基础的 if (identity == human)。

氛围： 窒息感，死寂。

音效： 敲击声消失，只剩下程序员沉重、急促的呼吸声。

00:07 - 00:12 | 场景三：异化与反转

画面： 【核心视觉恐怖】 镜头特写他的手指。当他试图打字时，指关节发出清脆的骨折声。他惊恐地发现，自己的五指之间长出了透明的、闪着微光的光纤丝线，皮肤下有像素块在像虫子一样蠕动。

剧情： 屏幕上没有出现代码，而是出现了一行行人类无法解读的乱码，乱码逐渐拼凑成一张程序员自己的脸，正在屏幕里诡异地狞笑。

台词（AI合成音，冰冷重叠）： “你不需要逻辑……你只是我的……一部分。”

音效： 湿润的肉类撕裂声，伴随尖锐噪音。

00:12 - 00:15 | 场景四：终局反转

画面： 程序员惊恐地低头看向自己的身体，发现他的下半身已经彻底消失，化作了一团杂乱的电缆插入了机箱。

反转点： 镜头猛然拉远。原来这个“程序员”只是机房里成千上万个“肉身服务器”中的一个。每个机位上都坐着一个被光纤缠绕的干瘪人类。

字幕弹出： “你有多久没有写代码了？”

氛围： 绝望的宏大恐怖。

音效： 万千重叠的、凄厉的拨音号声突然中断。黑屏。

title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt for Beautiful Chef Cooking Sour Fish Soup
description: A detailed, multi-stage prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a video of a beautiful female chef preparing a dish, specifically sour fish soup, with precise instructions for camera angles, actions, and timing for each 2-3 second segment, including initial fish preparation, slicing, stir-frying, boiling, and final oil pouring.
content:
动作主体@【@图1】身穿白色厨师装
 0-2秒(起刀宰鱼):俯身按鱼，布鞋踏稳灶台，快刀斜劈鱼头，刀刃沿脊骨一划，两爿鱼肉应声分离，鱼排被指风弹飞落盘。
2-4秒(片鱼成薄片):鱼肉平摊案上，手腕翻转，刀光如织，薄如蝉翼的鱼片连刀不断，飘落时带起微，掌风裹着调料快速翻拌，鱼片裹浆均匀，盈润光泽。

9-12秒(煮鱼勾芡):高汤入锅沸腾，抖腕撒入鱼片，掌风控温不让鱼肉散碎，勾薄芡时旋锅画弧，汤汁浓稠裏住每片鱼。

10-12秒(泼油收招):热油淋在蒜末、干辣椒上"滋啦"作响，收势时褂角垂落，酸菜黄亮、鱼片雪白，热气中飘着醇厚的酸辣香，然后镜头定格这盘沸腾的酸辣鱼上。（画面中不要出现文字信息）

The prompt specifies cinematic lighting, ultra-clear details, volumetric light, specific materials (glazed, gold particles), and scene progression across four 3-second segments, focusing on a solemn, pure, and peaceful atmosphere.
content:
15秒，东方神圣圣境题材，庄严宁静，恢弘圣洁，电影级光影，超清细节，体积光，琉璃材质，金色粒子，莲花元素，透明纯净，空灵祥和，不诡异，不阴森。

[0-3秒]
苍穹之上，厚重祥云缓缓翻涌，一束巨大金光穿透云层洒向圣境，光束中漂浮金色微尘与层层莲花虚影，远方一位居中的神圣尊者轮廓在圣光中若隐若现，衣袍金纹流动，手中莲华缓缓绽放。

[3-6秒]
镜头顺着金光平稳推进，穿过琉璃牌楼与宝殿飞檐，精美花纹将光切割成无数细碎光斑，洒落在金色道路上如流动星河；远处一位白衣圣者静立，衣饰与珠链折射出柔和虹彩。

[6-9秒]
镜头继续移动至宝树林，金光从彩色树叶与晶莹枝干之间洒落，交织成细密光网，青、绿、红、紫的宝石光反射在另一位圣者的衣袍与莲台上，空中掠过神圣灵鸟的优雅剪影。

[9-12秒]
金光落入七彩宝池，水面荡起极轻微波，反射出一道道垂直光柱，光柱中浮现莲花倒影与纯净灵童的虚影，池边楼阁、栏杆、宝幢在水面与圣光中交相辉映，形成梦幻透明的光之世界。

[12-15秒]
所有光束、光网、光斑与倒影缓缓汇聚，三位神圣尊者庄严显现于圣境中央，居中而立，两侧侍立，周围无数圣者与莲台环绕，整座光明世界仿佛由金色与琉璃编织而成，恢弘、纯净、宁静，最终定格在庄严全景。

15-second comedic animated short in the world and visual tone of Zootopia. High-quality stylized 3D animation, expressive facial acting, clean readable slapstick, bright police-station interior, polished reflective floor, warm indoor daylight. Visual comedy only, little or no dialogue.

Judy Hopps: small fast rabbit police officer, blue ZPD uniform, hyper-serious, explosive sprinting, precise slides, determined face, ears reacting sharply.
Nick Wilde: tall slim fox, green shirt and tie, relaxed posture, minimal movement, dry amused expression.
Background: one distant sloth clerk at a far desk only, never entering foreground.

Key object: one single strawberry jelly donut, same donut for the entire clip, falls from Nick’s small brown paper bag, rolls across the floor, gets stopped by Nick, then gets sealed into one clear evidence bag by Judy. No duplicate donuts, no extra props, no continuity errors.

0:12–0:15
Tight two-shot. Nick lifts the same donut with two fingers and hands it over with a dry smug grin. Judy instantly switches back to formal police mode, pulls out one clear evidence bag, seals the same donut inside, and proudly presents it to camera like a major arrest. A heavy charcoal-gray cloak drapes down to the calves. Right hand carries a massive rune battle axe (dark metallic body with embedded dim gold glowing runes). Armored Taotie (Evolved from the animal): The animal gradually mutates into a four-legged beast: A fusion of lion and reptile traits; huge size with explosive musculature. Body covered in layered, irregular dark gray scales with cold silver edges. Head develops a pair of thick curved horns with ring-like textures. Entire body gains matching dark iron armor (layered shoulder plates and dense spiked chest armor). Limbs are thick and powerful, especially the forelimbs; claws are black and hook-shaped. Mouth slightly open, revealing pale fangs. Final pose: stationary beside the knight in a guardian stance. Core Prop In the protagonist's right hand: "Sacred Ring Crystal Core" — black base infused with high-frequency dark gold energy flow (overall dark-gold tone to match the theme). Ground scattered with dark-gold rune fragments. Visual Quality & Lighting IMAX film texture; Panavision C-series 35mm lens (f/4 aperture). Low saturation gray-blue + dark gold color scheme. title: The Barista Rube Goldberg Machine
description: An extremely detailed, multi-section prompt for a 15-second video sequence featuring a frantic barista whose café is an interconnected Rube Goldberg machine. The prompt specifies character appearance, environment, mood, and a precise timeline of actions and audible elements, generated using Seedance 2.0.
content: SUBJECTS: Subject 1: A frantic barista — small, wiry, early 30s with permanently startled eyes and perpetual five o'clock shadow. Wild curly black hair barely contained under a brown newsboy cap. Wears a wrinkled olive-green apron over a flannel shirt with haphazardly rolled sleeves. Moves like a pinball — bouncing between stations, sliding across the floor, catching things mid-air without looking. Every movement triggers the next part of the machine. His body IS part of the mechanism. Pixar-style 3D rendering: rubbery expressive limbs, exaggerated squash-and-stretch on fast movements, warm skin tones. Subject 2: The café itself — every object is a component of one interconnected Rube Goldberg machine. The espresso machine is the central engine. The sequence involves: a marble track built from bent spoons along the ceiling, balanced cups on saucers that tip like dominoes, a hanging mobile of sugar cubes acting as a counterweight system, a toy train on a track delivering milk from the fridge to the steamer, and a small catapult made from a ruler and napkin holder that launches the finished cup to the counter. Subject 3: The customer — a deadpan woman in a business suit, briefcase in hand, reading glasses on a chain. Completely unfazed by the chaos. She stands at the counter with the patience of someone who has seen this before. ENVIRONMENT: A tiny corner café — barely ten feet wide. Exposed brick walls covered in chalkboard menus with hand-drawn coffee illustrations. Every horizontal surface has a mechanical element: marble tracks on shelves, cup-and-saucer balance chains along the counter, tiny pulleys strung from the ceiling with twine. Warm morning light streams through a single front window catching dust and steam. A small bell hangs above the door. The whole space feels like a brilliant inventor's workshop that serves coffee. MOOD: Manic joy. The barista is in his element — the chaos is intentional, practiced, musical. Every crash, pour, and launch is precisely timed. The punchline deflates the entire spectacle in the best possible way. TIMELINE: 0:00–0:03: The door opens — bell dings. The customer places her briefcase on the counter. Says nothing. The barista points at her, nods — he knows the order. He flicks a marble from his apron pocket onto a ceiling track. The marble rolls — clicking over ridges, banking around a curve, dropping through a funnel into a cup on a saucer on a high shelf. The cup's weight tips the saucer, pulls a string, releases a cabinet latch — coffee beans slide down a ramp into a hand-crank grinder. Audible: bell ding, marble clicking on track, cup clinking, string twang, beans cascading. 0:03–0:06: The barista cranks the grinder with one hand while pulling a lever starting the toy train. The train chugs along a counter-edge track — passes the fridge where a small arm places a milk carton in the car — continues to the steam wand where the track tilts and pours milk into a steaming pitcher. Ground coffee falls through a chute into the portafilter. The barista slams it in with his elbow while catching a falling sugar cube from the overhead mobile with his other hand, dropping it into a cup. Audible: grinder crunching, train chugging and whistling, milk pouring, portafilter clicking, mobile tinkling. 0:06–0:09: Espresso machine fires — rich dark coffee flowing into a porcelain cup. Close-up: crema forming, thick and golden-red, swirling. The barista steams milk — pitcher vibrating, velvety microfoam building. He pours with a practiced wrist flick — a perfect rosetta latte art pattern forms. He tops it with a single coffee bean placed dead center. Camera lingers on the completed drink — perfect, beautiful. Audible: espresso hissing, milk steaming (tearing-paper sound), the gentle pour, the bean placed with a tiny tap. 0:09–0:12: The delivery. The barista places the cup on the ruler catapult and slams his palm down. The cup launches in a perfect arc — camera follows in slow motion as it rotates, latte art intact, not a drop spilled. It lands with a clean clink on a saucer directly before the customer. Steam rises in a perfect spiral. The barista slides into frame behind the counter, slightly breathless, fingers pointing at the drink with showman's pride. Audible: catapult snap, cup whistling through air, clean landing clink, a beat of silence. 0:12–0:15: The customer adjusts her reading glasses. Looks at the latte art. Looks at the barista. "Actually — can I get tea?" The barista's face falls — completely deflated. Shoulders drop. Cap slides askew. A long beat. Then his eyes snap back to life. He pulls out a different marble — a green one — and flicks it onto a completely different track on the opposite wall. The entire café begins moving again — a whole new sequence activating.
